name: Special Elections Update
subject: We could FLIP Ohio and Florida!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | **ALERT:****Special elections could give Democrats the chance to WIN Ohio and Florida!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19033%2E9716520%2EDUPz6C)
**Urgent Request:****[We have to get to work right away to flip seats like these and take away Trump's Senate majority -- so please, rush $5 or more to fight for a blue Senate>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19033%2E9716520%2EDUPz6C)**
| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19033%2E9716520%2EDUPz6C)

**It's now or never, team. Special elections could be coming up in Ohio and Florida -- but if Democrats don't come together right now to prepare, we could _lose our chance_ to win these states and flip the Senate!**

MAGA Republicans want to replace JD Vance and Marco Rubio with more Trump loyalists -- so it's up to us to take these seats back and put a check on Trump's power. We need EVERY Democrat in this fight. **We're still behind on our must-hit $250,000 end-of-month fundraising goal to get to work, so we have to ask:**

**[Will you join Democrats across the nation and chip in $5 to help Democrats stop Trump, win in states like Ohio and Florida, and flip the Senate blue?>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19033%2E9716520%2EDUPz6C)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

| [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=11&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241129-SpecialElectionsUpdate-TwoSpecialElectionsOurChanceFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19033%2E9716520%2EDUPz6C)

Folks, we hope you had a great Thanksgiving filled with good food and wonderful memories with your loved ones. We know you’re getting a ton of emails right now — largely of the Black Friday and Cyber Monday variety — but we hope you can take just a few minutes to hear us out. Month after month and year after year, we help elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot, in New Mexico and across the country. [**_NO BALLS IN MY STALLS._**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ffb1cf7071654a15b887d26283b5a9b0&_e=msgxU1SgdeiT5rlS_yqRltmx1NbfxqCRQkZkpJOnu5NRHSJYvy9n15CBA4f38dgiZGgy-LmO7V2-lN8JKySEP7CWu10zK-u8bSGQ4GSSdvLV4nhg8DFNEkUEJfJvEk3us9P6yv0Z6V8vRmckkmQVtjka7wYreW3Llix_mfhB8vxvDIkTYljai2sHHhX7wWk5UyofVYHkc20c7PGIT5jDSXU2OdT1pcYk3dmfOp2TozS776TD6g8NGw3U3GQ_oik3njExGT8_1D4hRTe6waGy4509BH2ht-IqRr6-i26cxxZgm6wE-JtMG2Jc8csFV9UacQ1yQzoYKr2QQ9ogTvoCYKXaU8-t7QQFpwElLqEE6fUiXcDxXLPbGqSAN8-g8yWrh_JjCjL56CBdQKqTQ_DMSUxN84w9XRi0Hl2s8CpCko4%3D)
**It 's Nancy Mace, and I'm not backing down.**
The Radical Left, led by AOC, _is**losing their minds** over something as basic as **keeping NAKED MEN out of WOMEN 'S PRIVATE SPACES.**_
They're twisting the truth --_like they ALWAYS do._
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ffb1cf7071654a15b887d26283b5a9b0&_e=msgxU1SgdeiT5rlS_yqRltmx1NbfxqCRQkZkpJOnu5NRHSJYvy9n15CBA4f38dgiZGgy-LmO7V2-lN8JKySEP7CWu10zK-u8bSGQ4GSSdvLV4nhg8DFNEkUEJfJvEk3us9P6yv0Z6V8vRmckkmQVtjka7wYreW3Llix_mfhB8vxvDIkTYljai2sHHhX7wWk5UyofVYHkc20c7PGIT5jDSXU2OdT1pcYk3dmfOp2TozS776TD6g8NGw3U3GQ_oik3njExGT8_1D4hRTe6waGy41nEL53ZRhtBYBCw1ovXypeDYnHa-IW4qo72G6x-ZklTLM1BJTA5XIQyOzQd1DYvuOef4u87bwXXu0OiFY0BbzH_svmK-BNIZ1lDbSJUmWVkPwhG_4LvseaCMe5CpHqI5vrFm4yICErUQrn3V1Huoy8%3D)
**AOC is RALLYING Americans AGAINST ME.**
She called my stance "GROSS" and said "EVERYONE SHOULD REJECT IT."
Let that sink in.
_**The Left thinks protecting girls is "GROSS." **_
**They want to throw open the doors of women 's bathrooms and locker rooms to men**, all in the name of their twisted agenda.
This isn't just absurd -- it's an attack on every woman and girl in America.
But I'm NOT backing down.
J.K. Rowling is with me. Speaker Mike Johnson is with me. **THOUSANDS of Americans are with me** -- men and women standing together to say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.
**And guess what? IT 'S WORKING.**
[A school board in Wisconsin just voted to BAN males from girls' restrooms and sports. ](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ffb1cf7071654a15b887d26283b5a9b0&_e=msgxU1SgdeiT5rlS_yqRltmx1NbfxqCRQkZkpJOnu5NRHSJYvy9n15CBA4f38dgiZGgy-LmO7V2-lN8JKySEP7CWu10zK-u8bSGQ4GSSdvLV4nhg8DFNEkUEJfJvEk3us9P6yv0Z6V8vRmckkmQVtjka7wYreW3Llix_mfhB8vxvDIkTYljai2sHHhX7wWk5UyofVYHkc20c7PGIT5jDSXU2OdT1pcYk3dmfOp2TozS776TD6g8NGw3U3GQ_oik3njExGT8_1D4hRTe6waGy4_xu13sUqY-l50VFCCUL76jr48RVprl2vtrTl9Qn7Z95Joobj91ytnlTHIsVt8RHh7t4g-KCJn6ECo3XGWP_rE382E4GKjPBmhsUeRySHyBxJY_1wlZF8ezSav0l_YMA_8X7FbmDheE-vu6Fzn2cr5w%3D)
**This is just the beginning.** America is waking up, and we're taking back our common sense.
But I need YOU with me to keep up this fight.

name: Letitia James
subject: We know the GOP's to-do list, so we made our own
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97872989/514883804/-1997846888?refcode=jtk1741-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI0YWE5OC1iOGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qfHnfG6yvbeRibzTk-POjCxY5w_U4yRRDy5U88cmork=)
---
Peter, as far-right extremists prepare to take over Washington, you can already guess what's on their agenda: attacking our voting rights, barring abortion access, and dismantling our democracy.
But I will not stand idly by and watch them destroy what we’ve worked so hard to build. As attorney general of New York, it's my responsibility to defend the rights of all New Yorkers and uphold the rule of law – **and I will not back down, no matter what the GOP throws our way.**
The fight for progress is more urgent than ever. And right now, we need bold, fearless leaders – guardians of justice who are ready to stand firm in the face of extreme opposition. I am prepared to take on the GOP’s attacks, but I can’t do it alone.
**Will you stand with me in this fight?[I need your help to reach $10,000 goal so we can continue to protect our rights and secure a brighter future for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97872990/514883805/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1741-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI0YWE5OC1iOGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qfHnfG6yvbeRibzTk-POjCxY5w_U4yRRDy5U88cmork=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97872991/514883806/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1741-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI0YWE5OC1iOGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qfHnfG6yvbeRibzTk-POjCxY5w_U4yRRDy5U88cmork=)
---
We know what's on the far-right's to-do list, Peter. So we've made one of our own. As long as I'm attorney general, we will:
**✅ Defend reproductive rights** from all attempts to ban abortion.

**✅****Protect New Yorkers** from harmful cuts to vital programs and services.

**✅****Fight for justice** for the most vulnerable and marginalized in our communities.

✅ **Hold the powerful accountable** , whether it’s corrupt corporations or law-breaking individuals.
Rest assured, I will not break, I will not bend, and I will not allow extremists to wreak havoc on New York or our nation. Together, we can withstand whatever they throw at us – **but I need your support to make that happen.**
**[Please, contribute $5 or more before midnight to help us respond to every attack, protect critical resources for New York, and defend our shared values.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97872992/514883807/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1741-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzI0YWE5OC1iOGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qfHnfG6yvbeRibzTk-POjCxY5w_U4yRRDy5U88cmork=)**
Thank you for fighting by my side.
Letitia James
| With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families?

body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/a3323b0d2e57dabb/?utm_campaign=20241127&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Dear Friend,

The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I
dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.

To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up
_EVERYTHING_ I own – including my dignity.

That’s why I have OFFICIALLY APPEALED this outrageous ruling that
would leave me on the streets.

As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the
Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater
“heavenly treasures” await us.

Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_
more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen
and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”

AND WHEN I SEE THAT TWO OF THE RIGGED CASES BROUGHT AGAINST PRESIDENT
TRUMP HAVE NOW BEEN DISMISSED AND “DELAYED INDEFINITELY,” I HAVE
HOPE THAT I CAN WIN MINE TOO!

_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until
justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind
souls like you, Friend._

Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so
family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give
if you can’t!

BUT IF YOU CAN FUND MY BATTLE TO APPEAL THIS UNJUST RULING, PLEASE
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION OF ANY AMOUNT TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE
RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND NOW THAT I’VE OFFICIALLY APPEALED THIS

To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up EVERYTHING I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have OFFICIALLY APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” AND WHEN I SEE THAT TWO OF THE RIGGED CASES BROUGHT AGAINST PRESIDENT TRUMP HAVE NOW BEEN DISMISSED AND “DELAYED INDEFINITELY,” I HAVE HOPE THAT I CAN WIN MINE TOO! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Friend. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! BUT IF YOU CAN FUND MY BATTLE TO APPEAL THIS UNJUST RULING, PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION OF ANY AMOUNT TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE TRUST – THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND NOW THAT I’VE OFFICIALLY APPEALED THIS UNJUST RULING. [] [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] CONTRIBUTE $100 [] CONTRIBUTE $250 [] CONTRIBUTE $500 [] CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you and God bless you, [] Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

We won’t let Republicans gut our earned benefits – Seniors have paid into Social Security most of their lives, _and so many rely on those payments to survive!_ **[_We need a MASSIVE wave of support – 20,000 voices strong – to DEMAND that Congress protects Social Security! Join us now to save Social Security »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241129_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22587%2E4449941%2E4s5qyY)** | [20,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BEFORE MIDNIGHT: ADD YOUR NAME TO SAVE SOCIAL SECURITY »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-petition?source=FFR_20241129_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22587%2E4449941%2E4s5qyY)

name: Team Vasquez
subject: We think you’re gonna want to read Gabe’s email:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Just checking in

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=0%2FUWESUbEPEN%2FtVAHkJUCr1CuR2cJsDYKViWmAGdp8WvwlZ7W%2Fvv4ZxMyUjDctqTk76ucfLvN5NWlch62gz1%2BNBayTPPimrMVPvkMVjtHwgHU7WZ7DI5XANxqBSaQok6x1Kr9DNYdlLSpqilETvGRfuL7cfAUuvW2VGcrD8gFjYI9uWBuDkpxr%2BpabOb%2FgOJlDYx%2F2zhzBaXxazTtsrAcbksyWg5q8TFudSp%2BKaeB0JC7ACs%2FojV%2F%2Bj35Ukiy6ySvyxz2TD7PQLdMDdhCAwzhXGrJtQxKtVPHT%2Bp9gDd1OZOdUsXuTgwg14%2BxpQQtOwQJxKM6SxCE2EsgaS25i7viR%2BSJ%2BEBNa9dw8KcGe4fB3rvzKuMijai32Jjzu7bsVBt3jHBxGY3MSoJ4e4%2FRp99SNfLEltKB1jXk40P9bmpzLY%3D)
---
| | Team, happy Friday! We know it’s getting late and you likely want to get ready for the weekend, so we promise to make this quick. We just wanted to check in with you and see if you got Gabe’s email from earlier today? It’s a confusing, unprecedented time right now, and we know it’s been a chaotic few weeks following the election — but Gabe sent an important message today, and we hope it’ll give you some solace as we prepare for the road ahead. Can we count on you to take a moment to read his email today? We’re forwarding it below for ease of access. And if you can, consider chipping in whatever you can to support our team as we get ready for what’s coming up in 2025: [secure.actblue.com/donate/gvfc-em-nov24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97873132/514888346/246296706?source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_112924_2_2_EOM_FWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjEzZTkyMy1jMGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fr7VTyu0Bhgg0YzKENLRMSwn_WkB4oV16OPpu9I5RA=) Thank you! — Team Vasquez \---- Forwarded message below ----
* * *
Saludos, I hope you’re enjoying the holidays with your loved ones. As we close out the Thanksgiving festivities, we’re also coming close to the end of November, and that means we’re coming up against our first major test since the election — our November fundraising deadline. [At the end of this email, I’m going to ask you to chip in $10 but I want to take a moment to explain why first:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97873135/514888348/246296706?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_112924_2_2_EOM_FWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjEzZTkyMy1jMGFlLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5fr7VTyu0Bhgg0YzKENLRMSwn_WkB4oV16OPpu9I5RA=) We’re at a crossroads right now. After Inauguration Day, we will officially be led by a Republican trifecta in Washington, and it’s going to be up to all of us to keep fighting back against MAGA extremism. Tomorrow night, we’re going to be up against the first test of Team Vasquez’s strength since Election Day, and there’s too much on the line for us to falter. name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0hdtblps9qocohnu94gl0h8bukn743uk14qm8c8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhm0o74cth2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zkjojv2pn8fa1mcck2oisfsqsc4abiuraoq4hajg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhm0o74cth2bs)
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors--material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished.

However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom--a truth of extraordinary significance.
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1hn2kbts22e1gu0oq54tadh2v3sqg0fkg6ka2a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhm0o74cth2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfjdoljtoa7r7ibegs4rbmqnsv4c0e4o80vrmpd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhm0o74cth2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. clean_body: In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors | | | | | Dear Friend, In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors--material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished. However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom--a truth of extraordinary significance. Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise. Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, Victor Davis Hanson , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--Victory and the Savior Generals --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders. You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes. This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day. Claim your complimentary copy of Victory and the Savior Generals now through this secure link: Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history! subject: What are your priorities?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
**[I was just elected Senate Republican Conference Chair.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ndRCKO-HIipdG8HVorP-bQ~~/AAVLBgA~~~)**

[The mission is simple: pass President Trump's agenda and put Americans first.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ndRCKO-HIipdG8HVorP-bQ~~/AAVLBgA~~~)

_As Conference Chair, one of my main jobs will be setting messaging priorities._

**[I'm coming to you with my first request: Will you fill out this survey to let me know what issues you're most concerned about?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ndRCKO-HIipdG8HVorP-bQ~~/AAVLBgA~~~)**

[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ndRCKO-HIipdG8HVorP-bQ~~/AAVLBgA~~~)

**[Just as we depended on your support during the campaign, we're counting on your input as we move forward.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ndRCKO-HIipdG8HVorP-bQ~~/AAVLBgA~~~)**

It's time to make America strong again.

In service,

Tom Cotton

body:
We’re in BIG TROUBLE if we come up short

|

| | |
Dear Friend,

We are at a critical juncture in our nation's history. With many NEW Conservative leaders preparing to take office, it is critical that we fight for a strong Republican majority in the House of Representatives.

_That's why our November deadline is so crucial._**We must demonstrate our commitment to the conservative agenda** and show the American people that we are dedicated to fighting for the values that have made our country great.

name: Kari Lake
subject: The Left’s goal? Financially destroy me and my family.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.

| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztq8gsri5210kvu49p7r2bbjv0308l9b03jfnovg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhmcpb2cdh2bs)**
---
|
---
| | Dear Friend, Today I need your help to defend myself against the Left’s “lawfare” before they can financially destroy my family.All I ask is that you **[Rush a “FIRST AMENDMENT FUND” Emergency contribution before midnight tonight.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc844gv2h29vpf31rindrb3ikhtpbpl46h9q007g_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhmcpb2cdh2bs)** When an Arizona Election Official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself in this defamation case – and I'm afraid this battle is only getting started. Think about it. The Left wanted to force me to pay a multi-million-dollar legal judgment because I told the truth and called out election fraud.Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity.Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American. It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections.That’s what happened to me. Each day that the weight of this lawfare feels too much to bear, I think about President Trump and how he takes every attack head-on and never once thinks about backing down.Just think about what’s happening to him.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him -- his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom. **And he fights on.** So, if the Left thinks that some liberal-packed court threatening me with a hundred-million-dollar fine will get me to back down from this fight, **then they know _nothing_ about me.**And they know nothing about _you_ , too.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.This is about protecting their rights, giving them a prosperous America to live in, and defending our family name.To me, that was worth the millions of dollars this could have cost.Because nothing in this world can come between me and my family.Not the Left’s lawfare. Not power-drunk liberal prosecutors.Not litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.Thankfully, a generous group has stepped up and is willing to help me cover my legal expenses.So today, I must ask you to contribute to this new**“First Amendment Fund”** to help me defeat the Left’s sham lawfare. [**My friend, could you rush back a generous, tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to help me cover the court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsels, and so much more?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z34qd9kdvg13ip3eo2f4h3vlog512mrir8q7lo98_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhmcpb2cdh2bs) The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility. They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrso5kf1pmki3245hk2qbbm1cpgpkfc32n1pofdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhmcpb2cdh2bs)
---
Every dollar given to this **“First Amendment Fund”** will help me finish this fight – without financially destroying my family.Together, we can win this battle in court. And we can send the message that the Left’s lawfare will not crush us.Thank you for always being there for me. name: Alan Cohn
subject: It's worth fighting for
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97873704/514889322/1096283482?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJjMmViY2EtZThhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2l4ldfoqLkyzp4O7xfL-0MbpBgdjJXxXijmfTAIg4FA=&emci=f4bbcd92-c3ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=32c2ebca-e8ae-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=16746905)

Hi Friend,
We hope you had a great Thanksgiving and had a chance to enjoy family and friends.

The holidays remind us our community and our nation are worth fight for.

This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with members of Congress like Senator-Elect Adam Schiff, Hakeem Jeffries, Dan Goldman, and Cory Booker to end lifetime appointments to the Supreme Court and enact 18-year term limits.

SCOTUS is the essential institution of our democracy, and its broken. There are no guardrails stopping justices like Clarence Thomas from taking millions in gifts from his billionaire friends. There’s no way to stop the radical right-wing majority from eroding our right to privacy, the rights of women to make their own healthcare decisions or doing anything about the role of money in politics.

Poll shows over 70% of Americans agree with SCOTUS term limits. We launched our efforts a year ago with eight co-sponsors in the House. Today, there are 65 co-sponsors of the TERM Act in the House and 9 in the Senate.

We need majorities in both chambers. We’re backing candidates who pledge to support the Term Act.
With so much on the line, we’d be grateful for your help!
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/term-limits-yes-inc-1**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97873705/514889323/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJjMmViY2EtZThhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2l4ldfoqLkyzp4O7xfL-0MbpBgdjJXxXijmfTAIg4FA=)
SCOTUS is the pillar of our democracy, but it's cracking under a relentless assault.
**[>>>That’s why our movement is thriving, and we’ll be successful with your support!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97873706/514889324/-859072474?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJjMmViY2EtZThhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2l4ldfoqLkyzp4O7xfL-0MbpBgdjJXxXijmfTAIg4FA=)**
Alan Cohn
Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

**[Please pitch in what you can today to support the national campaign to create term limits for the Supreme Court.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97873707/514889325/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJjMmViY2EtZThhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2l4ldfoqLkyzp4O7xfL-0MbpBgdjJXxXijmfTAIg4FA=)**
[CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97873708/514889326/1643639367?refcode=-footer-&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDE4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzJjMmViY2EtZThhZS1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2l4ldfoqLkyzp4O7xfL-0MbpBgdjJXxXijmfTAIg4FA=)

subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1slesj403f5biv34v676gcp1706r5r34qgf0it8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhm1o32c9h2bs)

| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5hhen9a375v113t8esrb01ibhff0rfddh57rmbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhm1o32c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbmflm74v2he34d40d16v1nfc328t0abds1matr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjhm1o32c9h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcduiijlvr31b6i9rivaujbtb210j7qi3egjbqc8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm0pr4cdh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9qm7lk89adqn3ja6u7nkv34d8eqv7nrpv8gkq4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm0pr4cdh2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgfqo6jvro9dkqbt27ejsfb1id37jo3pfri1ek08_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm0pr4cdh2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

clean_body: Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile. "Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser. But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol. " Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol ," by clicking on the link below. And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9pk968i4qhc3lrpegoja2ssmabblsngmeh95vh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm8or6chh2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z494bu15pgd2vrup7gbfvhg0h0d66kk53vt7os7o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm8or6chh2bs)
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors--material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished.

However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom--a truth of extraordinary significance.
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za5eu745enn7352569jggorj4kmk27mea8j796f0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm8or6chh2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn7fietuirq3f5451ep7qni4unke5b3q0441bes8_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm8or6chh2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

name: The New York Sun
subject: The New York Sun is different
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vstwy5XWNG

For a limited time, join for just 1¢.

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've
experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad
journalism

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/ostwy5XWNG

FROM THE
DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ

Dear
Friend,
In over
sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand
the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly
the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things
right.

In
today's media landscape there are far too many publications that
get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political
implications of a story than the basic facts.

The New
York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over
politics and people over party.

Its
in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President
Trump serve as a case in point.

When I
defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an
avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to
fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's
deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky
and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the
Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be
first rate.

It will
be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can
be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that
its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments
in American journalism.

I've been
impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an
uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

The Sun's
success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of
truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage
you to join the Sun today.

Every
person matters in this effort.

Don't
wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.

Join the
Sun Now →

Alan
Dershowitz
Columnist
for The New York Sun

The New
York Sun Company, LLC, 300 Park Ave, 2nd Floor, New York, NY
10022, United States

In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ Dear Friend, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism - mostly the latter - and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from First Look Newsis on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4f90clptqqce44l0dar1cotfl3r02gjeudsl6so_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjmcob4c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3vgj4cjafatntjgqcj5h0ukj012un51e2ppd26o_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjmcob4c9h2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3bmbsvn9isreu6ngviplt8lq86ss7cb5b3207d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjmcob4c9h2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

name: Team Cruz
subject: Ramping up for the battles ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:

| | Fellow Conservative, Ted was the National Democrats' #1 target this year. We faced our greatest challenge yet.

But in the end, voters saw through their dishonest attacks and backed Ted in a big way...

We came out on top here in the Lone Star State, and in other battleground states across the country, and now it's time for our new Republican Senate majority to get to work to dismantle the left's disastrous policies and get America back on track!

Here at Team Cruz, we're rebuilding for the fight before us. Ted is fired up and ready to go.

**[Will you make a special contribution to support our efforts?](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MzM1LTFmODY1ZTAzZWZkNDQ2ZjY4YThhZWRiYzM5NWMxYzg2IiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVkLWNydXovcGdfZV9yZWN1cnJpbmctYXNrLTEtd2R2XzIwMjQxMTIxX2Ffb3RoZXI_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9SZWN1cnJpbmctQXNrLTFfMjAyNDExMjEmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1SZWN1cnJpbmctQXNrLTEmdXRtX2FnZW5jeT1QRyZhbW91bnQ9NzUmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUifQ/0I-RDTGktrdjxNT50FxPLg)**

We're asking Pro-Trump Conservatives from every corner of this country to back President Trump and Republicans' efforts.

| |

| | | **President Trump 's incoming White House Press Secretary just confirmed plans to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat.**

After the 47th President is sworn into office, he will work with House Republicans to mandate voter ID laws in all 50 states. **SUPPORT OUR ELECTION INTEGRITY PLAN:**

_This would be a huge win for election integrity._

Radical Democrats have spent YEARS attempting to undermine our elections. This year alone, a Chinese national ILLEGALLY voted in Michigan, Gavin Newsom BANNED voter ID mandates in California, and the Biden/Harris DOJ SUED Alabama and Virginia for removing non-citizens from their voter rolls.

**Luckily, the American People chose to reject their political games.**

With President Trump and House Republicans in power, we'll charge ahead to put our plan into motion. _**[We're asking Pro-Trump Conservatives from every corner of this country to back President Trump and Republicans' efforts.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7fe89540d80f4e50af4a2d19ab89559f&_e=_HX7skl2wiNVKe1sGWpuj0WtTK1LKtVydIUOhJc4bOsnKmSG1sB5sqTDOUhwgVB1dHsHkTsGubMmadAWLrjlOezQ1IUq4DKmYttRUqzuaL-q0e9zjmDIWPaPsbQUePnnYyZPVc459G-05CLvMAZsuHrZZueoARn7Qk5PGbPhuE-oYJfAEDW2j4UeY7lVGgywKG9O62S8Jysu7orlrICv9xgn5WgpwYJdaGqefSdhOaUxUv8_3ymRgv07pH-VXisBz1FH5vkB9m1EDFOkaz9Oaz0c1rjdvTmwgZq8tLGCEBYQgauT2AuSP3zEc14DqjTuCfiyg9sFmHDoY_g7RvFuiJbLJuUEBvxy2TYThV8rsdFR1fybK13oBizIf5FqlORRzGiiaKHEVhs3tNrBYFdUmwNeVcrwx4MNoRnzetpbyd-2hK53_liY7TEAgIyPSp5vLvw6Nfv210GPS_XqkeV5BCIpeCecLkyWhgflcWJOrfY%3D "We’re asking Pro-Trump Conservatives from every corner of this country to back President Trump and Republicans’ efforts.")**_

_If you believe in one person, one vote ... If you believe every voter should be required to prove their identity with a photo ID..._

_Then we need to hear from you IMMEDIATELY._
**SUPPORT OUR ELECTION INTEGRITY PLAN:** | | [CONFIRM HERE](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=7fe89540d80f4e50af4a2d19ab89559f&_e=_HX7skl2wiNVKe1sGWpuj0WtTK1LKtVydIUOhJc4bOsnKmSG1sB5sqTDOUhwgVB1dHsHkTsGubMmadAWLrjlOezQ1IUq4DKmYttRUqzuaL-q0e9zjmDIWPaPsbQUePnnYyZPVc459G-05CLvMAZsuHrZZueoARn7Qk5PGbPhuE-oYJfAEDW2j4UeY7lVGgywKG9O62S8Jysu7orlrICv9xgn5WgpwYJdaGqefSdhOaUxUv8_3ymRgv07pH-VXisBz1FH5vkB9m1EDFOkaz9Oaz0c1rjdvTmwgZq8tLGCEBYQgauT2AuSP3zEc14DqjTuzjYW3JCwy4w5CHxiVzveKsTEGW5lKDsZe8LyiwhQlzmo5U099GTxDyU9EhqoK3K09vAUJWQodzwUheCVf0w3oMyh2ab8te9JVP8wkVj5Dfg75KQRRqGnCUKtlr800zKycbWSFkESlfgNuBbNnDwMbBOB6skR1fmpY9IjT81Yr88%3D "CONFIRM HERE")

subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c708a1ed10a545b7a37c114ca29d47c7&_e=vxk-OtJ15OJ91MZhhU9a6Nri2cSOQ7Hy9haf078sLueH10mCNmAMyb9mAT301a1Z7ZHqpzUsd8a3Z8W4NMQcUW8mdgJsOwmtL2NnSa8o6WIfGEDUIiJQtBuGweupcyurHXIhFLmOUjTE6FJo2HI7CvpRz6Rghm4atMl71voHwWiUVEsdViICuPsntXYHzPseKghxzEqSCJbCU_MYgtszGFelBoRqVnLs6qhj05n1aXIWqmOa17cu8QlCpIP5iiHlbp5wGuvOfC0-59uaEWFzCtJzkOJ-HyWBcgLcBm_rPc_wUkK6GByQPoJiEBrzS_3S1IVhvIbC9ojhZD4wEXDUYbZV7kYoGYpOjLy1KXQgstu2vmJNmxXbJVhaY0Vja86Y)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c708a1ed10a545b7a37c114ca29d47c7&_e=vxk-OtJ15OJ91MZhhU9a6Nri2cSOQ7Hy9haf078sLueH10mCNmAMyb9mAT301a1Z7ZHqpzUsd8a3Z8W4NMQcUW8mdgJsOwmtL2NnSa8o6WIfGEDUIiJQtBuGweupcyurHXIhFLmOUjTE6FJo2HI7CvpRz6Rghm4atMl71voHwWiUVEsdViICuPsntXYHzPseKghxzEqSCJbCU_MYgtszGFelBoRqVnLs6qhj05n1aXLd-VCTPHqL9hTXfNzGUxxicB2z-xhsedqn-lxJbRnIapebjPRlzbKQTP-lIV8vhUMXzW8EXLoWqbyBB5W6hxvhrxfMTSi7AXL93e3lXmRfbaccSj3kDryGBJZ7VQW5hu3Z9A7bd-KNmy_9no8FPv-c)
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors--material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished.

However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom--a truth of extraordinary significance.
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c708a1ed10a545b7a37c114ca29d47c7&_e=vxk-OtJ15OJ91MZhhU9a6Nri2cSOQ7Hy9haf078sLueH10mCNmAMyb9mAT301a1Z7ZHqpzUsd8a3Z8W4NMQcUW8mdgJsOwmtL2NnSa8o6WIfGEDUIiJQtBuGweupcyurHXIhFLmOUjTE6FJo2HI7CvpRz6Rghm4atMl71voHwWiUVEsdViICuPsntXYHzPseKghxzEqSCJbCU_MYgtszGFelBoRqVnLs6qhj05n1aXKMjKmujKSN7SU4UTdO0EKscrISPy5x4tsZg4Nmfy2o6HDvDSTvUy65xkYYSmbzfHput-NEjDQw4JkIRdhScnyaK5XdrvjgZHHEfFgbxSfv9CExyqwTf-o6C-2LWe71n85PkY6HLmchVTFT5dkzAvXS)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Your American News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqakqrat0m2hgr9ckrnn5ot67n6polsddn3p8ai0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm1o72c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zspkk2dr147a06bog7aghtblmais7bbvdps1c3a0_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm1o72c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zc715scrjujo57ngrf4ttduq3i9vbo4lqgs54uto_rp22sh2s8i6epj2cjjm1o72c9h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Your America
---

name: Troy Downing
subject: Happy Small Business Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
| | |
# _Happy Small Business Saturday!_
---

Our local small businesses are the lifeblood of your community and are the glue that holds our district together. They create jobs, bring innovation, and give our communities their unique character.

---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDg4MjgxNTEsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMjg5OS1kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MzM1LTA0NWU4MGI1MzRkZjRlMjhiNWE3ODA3MDI4MjliYmRlIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRyb3lkb3duaW5nLmNvbS8_ZXhfdGlkPSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249In0/1L8Pe8F4tlia6YE06D1HqA)
---

Today, take a moment to support a small business – it makes a bigger impact than you might think. Whether shopping for Christmas gifts at a local family-owned store or grabbing a meal from a neighborhood restaurant, your choice helps strengthen the heart of our community and keeps it thriving.

Thank you,
Troy Downing
---
| |
---
|

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: No More Blue’s Clues Pride Parades
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWIalOXWNJ
As someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I
want to say:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWIalOXWNJ

You are
absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into
your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms
children.

Fellow
Conservative,
As
someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, I want
to say: You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is
reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment"
that grooms children.
Today
when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the
Pride Parade on Blue's Clues...

And the
result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where
children lecture you on what you can and cannot say…
...and
they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean"
ideas.
But you
and I know your ideas aren't old-fashioned or mean at all. They
are the same biblical values that made America the greatest
country on earth.
That's
why I'm reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance
to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and
grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.
Today,
I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first
children's television show that actively fights back against the
groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical
values that made America great.
And it's
only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to
see a Christian resurgence in America like you.

Introducing: Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.
This
ground-breaking live-action television show captivates
children...
...but
more importantly, it builds their character at the same time.
Imagine a
children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a
greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.
Courage,
honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a
biblical and traditional lens.
Imagine a
children's show that brings families together instead of driving
them apart.
Now
imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible.
Because I
can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding
Supporter.
Season
One of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk has ten lesson-filled
episodes planned.
And each
episode costs around $70,000 to produce.
I know
that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it
would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio.
And
obviously we won't work through Hollywood.
Hollywood
has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and
hijack our children.
We
parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to
rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture.
That's
why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to
help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.
Whether
you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything
higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are
needed and greatly appreciated.
As your
special "Thank You" for joining me as a Founding Supporter at the
$35 and above level, we'll send you all ten episodes of
Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk for your family to enjoy FREE
on DVD.
Hollywood
groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we
rebuild from the ashes.
And it
starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with
faith and family -- not filth.
Thank you
for joining us as a Founding Supporter.

Kirk
Cameron
Actor,
Author, and Father

Kirk
Cameron
Actor,
Author, and Father

DONATE

Brave
Books
13618
Poplar Cir, Suite 302
Conroe,
TX 77304

body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZKXx0Rh5rkw7sfIQB4A_uQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLYZ-P0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJFTkVGSVRTX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEzMFcDc3BjQgpnRi7vSmcU0zSPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZKXx0Rh5rkw7sfIQB4A_uQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLYZ-P0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJFTkVGSVRTX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEzMFcDc3BjQgpnRi7vSmcU0zSPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZKXx0Rh5rkw7sfIQB4A_uQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpLYZ-P0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9scC5oaWxsc2RhbGUuZWR1L3RoZS1ncmVhdC1yZXNldC1jY2EvP3NjPTAwMTIzTjAyNDJMMDZET0RFRVMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aGVncmVhdHJlc2V0JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUJFTkVGSVRTX1BBLVJPTi0yMDI0MTEzMFcDc3BjQgpnRi7vSmcU0zSPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | ~~ | | ~~ Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we... Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations. Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.** ~~ Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~

subject: DON’T take magnesium unless…
body:
Do you sleep poorly? Do you feel sluggish or anxious? Is it difficult
for you to lose weight? These are WARNING signs that you’re
magnesium-deficient, and it’s going to get worse if you don’t do
something about it.

Believe it or not, 80 percent of Americans are suffering from
magnesium deficiency—and this includes many who are already taking
a magnesium supplement.

And that’s no good because... the fact is, magnesium is vital for
human health. It's involved in more than 300 metabolic processes...

And if you're not getting enough magnesium, it could be hurting your
sleep, your energy levels, your mental state, and even your ability to
lose weight. So if you have any of these symptoms, it's time to act,
now, not later.

A lot of people turn to the nearest magnesium supplement for help.
Only problem? They are pretty useless, and I’ll prove it to you...

Go get the bottle and read the label. Does it include one or more of
these?

* Magnesium Oxide
* Magnesium Glycinate
* Magnesium Citrate

BAD NEWS: Magnesium oxide is ineffective for increasing overall
magnesium levels.[1] Which explains why you can take a magnesium
supplement and STILL be deficient.

What’s more, magnesium oxide doesn’t help reduce anxiety—which
is one of the biggest reasons why people take magnesium in the first
place.[2]

And if all this wasn’t bad enough, magnesium oxide has a laxative
effect. So unless you’re constipated, you might find yourself
urgently looking for the nearest bathroom.

What about the other two? Magnesium Glycinate and Citrate aren’t
bad, but here’s the problem. If your supplement has only one or two
forms of magnesium, that means it’s INCOMPLETE.

You see, most magnesium supplements are missing at least 5 of the 7
MOST important forms of magnesium. These 7 forms of magnesium work
TOGETHER to support more than 300 metabolic processes so that you can
sleep better, have a calm state of mind, feel energized, and burn
fat.

Fortunately, there IS one magnesium supplement that is truly complete.
And works. It's got ALL 7 of the highest quality forms of magnesium
you can get. Plus, it comes with a special vitamin that enhances the
effects of magnesium inside your body.

==> Try this "super magnesium" with ALL 7 forms of magnesium for
better sleep, more energy & fat burning
[https://www.google.com/url?q=https://organixx.com/magnesium-7-b2go?a_bid%3Dc40e0793%26a_aid%3DEmAb%26utm_source%3Daffiliate%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_content%3Da(EmAb)%26data2%3D20241130-CA-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa%26chan%3D20241130-CA-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1732673139799454&usg=AOvVaw16Dv0xrkpDz8xs5yCWnmhM]

It’s the most powerful blend of magnesium out there, and you deserve
to find the one that works best for you.

CONSERV ALERT

P.S. Thanks to the special relationship I have with Organixx, I'm able
to offer you a Special Flash Sale
[https://www.google.com/url?q=https://organixx.com/magnesium-7-b2go?a_bid%3Dc40e0793%26a_aid%3DEmAb%26utm_source%3Daffiliate%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_content%3Da(EmAb)%26data2%3D20241130-CA-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa%26chan%3D20241130-CA-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1732673139800667&usg=AOvVaw1980EhL8ud6eGDOznjS_dV] on
their new doctor-formulated Magnesium 7 supplement – no
subscriptions or strings attached.

Why are they doing this?

It's simple...

They want to prove to you that Magnesium 7 is one of the best
magnesium supplements on the market for supporting...

* Improved sleep
* Higher metabolism
* An elevated mood
* And a feeling of calmness

They also know the people on my list are serious about their health,
so that's why they agreed to give you a free bottle of Magnesium 7 as
part of this Flash Sale
[https://www.google.com/url?q=https://organixx.com/magnesium-7-b2go?a_bid%3Dc40e0793%26a_aid%3DEmAb%26utm_source%3Daffiliate%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_content%3Da(EmAb)%26data2%3D20241130-CA-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa%26chan%3D20241130-CA-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1732673139802558&usg=AOvVaw3uUvf1NBd_mlg5TXVnBH8G].

Supplies are limited, so I'd hurry if you're interested.

name: avoid magnesium - Republic News Update
subject: DON’T take magnesium unless…
body:
Do you sleep poorly? Do you feel sluggish or anxious? Is it difficult
for you to lose weight? These are WARNING signs that you’re
magnesium-deficient, and it’s going to get worse if you don’t do
something about it.

Believe it or not, 80 percent of Americans are suffering from
magnesium deficiency—and this includes many who are already taking
a magnesium supplement.

And that’s no good because... the fact is, magnesium is vital for
human health. It's involved in more than 300 metabolic processes...

And if you're not getting enough magnesium, it could be hurting your
sleep, your energy levels, your mental state, and even your ability to
lose weight. So if you have any of these symptoms, it's time to act,
now, not later.

A lot of people turn to the nearest magnesium supplement for help.
Only problem? They are pretty useless, and I’ll prove it to you...

Go get the bottle and read the label. Does it include one or more of
these?

* Magnesium Oxide
* Magnesium Glycinate
* Magnesium Citrate

BAD NEWS: Magnesium oxide is ineffective for increasing overall
magnesium levels.[1] Which explains why you can take a magnesium
supplement and STILL be deficient.

What’s more, magnesium oxide doesn’t help reduce anxiety—which
is one of the biggest reasons why people take magnesium in the first
place.[2]

And if all this wasn’t bad enough, magnesium oxide has a laxative
effect. So unless you’re constipated, you might find yourself
urgently looking for the nearest bathroom.

What about the other two? Magnesium Glycinate and Citrate aren’t
bad, but here’s the problem. If your supplement has only one or two
forms of magnesium, that means it’s INCOMPLETE.

You see, most magnesium supplements are missing at least 5 of the 7
MOST important forms of magnesium. These 7 forms of magnesium work
TOGETHER to support more than 300 metabolic processes so that you can
sleep better, have a calm state of mind, feel energized, and burn
fat.

Fortunately, there IS one magnesium supplement that is truly complete.
And works. It's got ALL 7 of the highest quality forms of magnesium
you can get. Plus, it comes with a special vitamin that enhances the
effects of magnesium inside your body.

==> Try this "super magnesium" with ALL 7 forms of magnesium for
better sleep, more energy & fat burning
[https://www.google.com/url?q=https://organixx.com/magnesium-7-b2go?a_bid%3Dc40e0793%26a_aid%3DEmAb%26utm_source%3Daffiliate%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_content%3Da(EmAb)%26data2%3D20241130-RNU-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa%26chan%3D20241130-RNU-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1732673358118053&usg=AOvVaw0ILaLbUDS3xonybQcvTTl-]

It’s the most powerful blend of magnesium out there, and you deserve
to find the one that works best for you.

REPUBLIC NEWS

P.S. Thanks to the special relationship I have with Organixx, I'm able
to offer you a Special Flash Sale
[https://www.google.com/url?q=https://organixx.com/magnesium-7-b2go?a_bid%3Dc40e0793%26a_aid%3DEmAb%26utm_source%3Daffiliate%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_content%3Da(EmAb)%26data2%3D20241130-RNU-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa%26chan%3D20241130-RNU-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1732673358118985&usg=AOvVaw0dg6Jcfqybi13tU-e8Qk99] on
their new doctor-formulated Magnesium 7 supplement – no
subscriptions or strings attached.

Why are they doing this?

It's simple...

They want to prove to you that Magnesium 7 is one of the best
magnesium supplements on the market for supporting...

* Improved sleep
* Higher metabolism
* An elevated mood
* And a feeling of calmness

They also know the people on my list are serious about their health,
so that's why they agreed to give you a free bottle of Magnesium 7 as
part of this Flash Sale
[https://www.google.com/url?q=https://organixx.com/magnesium-7-b2go?a_bid%3Dc40e0793%26a_aid%3DEmAb%26utm_source%3Daffiliate%26utm_medium%3Dcpc%26utm_content%3Da(EmAb)%26data2%3D20241130-RNU-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa%26chan%3D20241130-RNU-emab-mag7-b2g1-cpa&sa=D&source=editors&ust=1732673358120190&usg=AOvVaw3TsQnKuFC0zlifmNGOrIl0].

Supplies are limited, so I'd hurry if you're interested.

anxiety & stress (detailed guide). Be Brain Fit.

[2] Ibid.

body:
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06909c94ae73410cb129954f28b6d1f5&_e=llR_SHINjGdUkL56_2_5b3WiuxABiAzL6WZOj7I3cFpof49k3P_LagAnFyaKH1Csd2tiOk8DNF1xgRqYRZh6SnE47HJMaO2latiEOEmSXDaRRXimBTyB4jYCUkRSJhAJLv1KM2EGcNbCY5-HWNEr_Rpzz413B-QndbEOhnfhtqvTdmAMAwICXTYgS8drA4dy1o6nWWyccrYqm9A3GFibQbXuhLK3lWkuAe0SlloSfwltB0nVhpIIavNYXZldQzxofFFDKTh3P5S6zeJcmq-4CVLiLU1lR5z3pDaNOZPqZlKHt2D2I2253KkP0QzFvdsG9Rl81WY6MAOjPNfvqvV7ZnD9khEH-kELWdlP9npLX4zmW_CwrDH1GDhtXXZLQ852WgXWTEkI6dJTlg_5eu2AbQ%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend, [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06909c94ae73410cb129954f28b6d1f5&_e=llR_SHINjGdUkL56_2_5b3WiuxABiAzL6WZOj7I3cFpof49k3P_LagAnFyaKH1Csd2tiOk8DNF1xgRqYRZh6SnE47HJMaO2latiEOEmSXDaRRXimBTyB4jYCUkRSJhAJLv1KM2EGcNbCY5-HWNEr_Rpzz413B-QndbEOhnfhtqvTdmAMAwICXTYgS8drA4dy1o6nWWyccrYqm9A3GFibQbXuhLK3lWkuAe0SlloSfwk6j9UDM9FT7hWlxT0REkX2d1Ppn4MBAjJRlw7mXZeF2cKo72whS8pNLnWkGgLB_kD8N4XbUDkQpTYzhJ8XC9Zxl_o1tD4DQS5jZ_WnZ9uvqPCRp8EV1CVc7v_dyZrYJx6M3w7k08lQ1fqfeeCxB2_BwhvaCkLP9tBVV-2Iwa6ngg%3D%3D)
In the annals of history, military triumphs and defeats have been attributed to a host of factors--material resources, manpower, pre-war strategies, and tactical doctrine all play a part in determining the victors and the vanquished.

However, as we delve deeper into the past, we uncover a truth that surpasses conventional wisdom--a truth of extraordinary significance.
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06909c94ae73410cb129954f28b6d1f5&_e=llR_SHINjGdUkL56_2_5b3WiuxABiAzL6WZOj7I3cFpof49k3P_LagAnFyaKH1Csd2tiOk8DNF1xgRqYRZh6SnE47HJMaO2latiEOEmSXDaRRXimBTyB4jYCUkRSJhAJLv1KM2EGcNbCY5-HWNEr_Rpzz413B-QndbEOhnfhtqvTdmAMAwICXTYgS8drA4dy1o6nWWyccrYqm9A3GFibQbXuhLK3lWkuAe0SlloSfwmI9rCW42N3I_cdQ4ARfFnsvvhZsY7jvajY7NRbpq4XWI3z1CbSEjawBEkL8Ue6HDlM6lr_XVlrDDWpv4eOyycwRyOo95wRuNmIOmfhzVJ417IDd2-ea0lWWbZn0YBbMB9lnHCFaJqOslSYvm4Sd3c4Aa0N9BqEW9ik-2mVTRGbjQ%3D%3D)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=06909c94ae73410cb129954f28b6d1f5&_e=llR_SHINjGdUkL56_2_5b3WiuxABiAzL6WZOj7I3cFpof49k3P_LagAnFyaKH1Csd2tiOk8DNF1xgRqYRZh6SnE47HJMaO2latiEOEmSXDaRRXimBTyB4jYCUkRSJhAJLv1KM2EGcNbCY5-HWNEr_Rpzz413B-QndbEOhnfhtqvTdmAMAwICXTYgS8drA4dy1o6nWWyccrYqm9A3GFibQbXuhLK3lWkuAe0SlloSfwlMRmbhuXxTQkp1g3w_TjQ0dmDpTIWxe9_MM3FwhVtBqEblD9hINmgC9si1aW4z4hrjz0kFXhAaXhneAxIzytqMAJJTgSJihpCs8nviWH52QOjsj3_Ot3z9gBP5u5PunuiNmbJqDwnCMbWZHb_pNSo4OxZTnBDHuA3COY4F1_ZCNQ%3D%3D)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University
