name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=284143fec2fa48ecae54a3502ce3b90d&_e=wTfr4inPmg03em5ipuqLfRtw3jXLUnxAHIdMpTpNfIMIjAZlx1vaemqnLAK-HoQ5ayMUTdLjFBko_j3dI4OqzGKYK63IEhyuMBAAdoqXl26XsoZijeztOj-C8HBVLJcRDaOf4_uQOC28HUshtomJ0ogjOrOX5G6oZx3C7MiciqTn8oDvttHS1Dvtfcx5JucDgFBVBWnfsM9vbC1iPD8MstIukJf7X-W3w_6kND24gysA1LEQL7AKSp3QQ9wonAuqh6OkK8ig8vm1MFtlrBdtiYQs1Onh80J5U4hIfFtIpt6F6XS_T5IX39nAjzhZqRo809tGTPyRenRlpREWVLTDJf1tuJQFMc1bk5cLeb3Ilu9JwIb5XaRPjSQyMR0FBHK7aMWq26Jvbj6xYDU1uHHvujJb9fBh4v_Rr9etMvgWs74%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=284143fec2fa48ecae54a3502ce3b90d&_e=wTfr4inPmg03em5ipuqLfRtw3jXLUnxAHIdMpTpNfIMIjAZlx1vaemqnLAK-HoQ5ayMUTdLjFBko_j3dI4OqzGKYK63IEhyuMBAAdoqXl26XsoZijeztOj-C8HBVLJcRDaOf4_uQOC28HUshtomJ0ogjOrOX5G6oZx3C7MiciqTn8oDvttHS1Dvtfcx5JucDgFBVBWnfsM9vbC1iPD8MstIukJf7X-W3w_6kND24gysA1LEQL7AKSp3QQ9wonAuqh6OkK8ig8vm1MFtlrBdtiUykjUrrgKf3LgW38iZzeTg3tt7krBTTSJiiKaZtKFOyiGFC9K4lfxlSO27A-ihCznM6MJhS-lxN9q4rnJBrVDc6rIr1g-uXBi8sJVMvWxpvhrupssW2QkcOPxwgbv7YfGluNWAafS1VNmOl_nkUJwE%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=284143fec2fa48ecae54a3502ce3b90d&_e=wTfr4inPmg03em5ipuqLfRtw3jXLUnxAHIdMpTpNfIMIjAZlx1vaemqnLAK-HoQ5ayMUTdLjFBko_j3dI4OqzGKYK63IEhyuMBAAdoqXl26XsoZijeztOj-C8HBVLJcRDaOf4_uQOC28HUshtomJ0ogjOrOX5G6oZx3C7MiciqTn8oDvttHS1Dvtfcx5JucDgFBVBWnfsM9vbC1iPD8MstIukJf7X-W3w_6kND24gysA1LEQL7AKSp3QQ9wonAuqh6OkK8ig8vm1MFtlrBdtibwN8qXLMnwshiBefTze70CMurbvbbiWSSrR1LCuGtjLjhhguBSohaBTeGxWt5dhXZulcXrFCnsCTHEvtSLM0THwS02XfgZ8q9kKnlC9tSzVm5E1kQ9h3tDtLiIV2we1s-orWFA7DJ5I_bapc3PFPMg%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=284143fec2fa48ecae54a3502ce3b90d&_t=H35Qgy1uoKFRlReMQR6OwNcqMeIGcQ5lUohBbSfdZ8UJ9EVhpsoxQsjwSKnurQpSu1GWAoEzcxxiQNO1oJGKhS_asMb62WE2_1yIG42b5hzIAfyCY1e4DP7oXM4XQuVZnJJoFTuP6bPnhBlpFfNMBRE2YsxzqBQDv4BrrRqOLXw%3D)

| Peter, Trump isn’t in office yet, but we need to gear up to fight back now. Trump has already promised to use the military for mass deportations, imprison his political enemies, and wreak havoc on our democracy. Plus, with the GOP in control of both parts of our Congress, we need to raise major resources to take them down and regain Democrats’ power in the House and the Senate. Key elections in 2025 and 2026 can turn the tide and usher in a progressive wave to combat Trump’s efforts to ruin our country. During this election cycle, the GOP was able to outspend Democrats and rally undecided voters to their side. We can’t let that happen again – there’s way too much at stake. Early investment in Democrats could be crucial to winning back the majorities we need to prevent Trump and his MAGA cronies from dealing America too much damage. [If you want to help, can we count on you to chip in $10 to Blue Amp Action today so we can fund key Democrats across the country and take our government back from the far-right and their dangerous agenda?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T40c10c9d-59e2-4da8-8540-70078b5a6ac0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Trump’s new Attorney General pick Pam Bondi has thrown the radical-left into a frenzy.
They’re TERRIFIED of what Pam will do when she’s AG.
**Just take a look at her America-First Record:**

* Pam Bondi has stood by President Trump’s side as his lawyer during the SHAM impeachment trials.
* Has been TOUGH on ILLEGALS invading Florida.
* SAVED countless lives by reducing the flow of dangerous fentanyl.

As the Attorney General, she will show JUST how corrupt DC has become, _**but her chances of being appointed are slimming by the second.**_
But as you read this The Fake News has launched a devastating onslaught of attacks, calling her another MAGA Extremist & DESTROYING her good name.
_**[Sadly, she could be disqualified if we don’t act.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wOz/?__vbtrk=MjYyNTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ _**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wOA/?__vbtrk=MjYyNTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9wOA/?__vbtrk=MjYyNTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjYyNTQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Razor Wire Decision, Longhorns Vs. Aggies, and The Great Light Fight
body:
The No. 3 Texas Longhorns and No. 20 Texas A&M Aggies face off today for the first time in 13 years at Kyle Field in College Station. The longtime rivals haven’t played each other since Texas A&M joined the SEC in 2012. Texas joined the conference this year.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kDFvgzAUhH-N2YJsP4Nh8FApypauHa0HfoAlG5Dt0OTfV6Rzu959Ot3d193e0Qe_zp8YyZTntFnJpboIcQFuHfrwsqpyZuCuFxUZoUH2bQutrhYz0CD1OGDjmn5EriY-UN9opTUN2k2u8uYMEwK4ELLjXa2gGwkUCoWT7nXDFCfny5bqslChJ-YpvLaDUj1usQpmKWXPDD6YvDF58-tBudQ7jpi3kzhluD1KtHl7pJEYXF1Mv37A1fl13nEmJtuTieT8IzK47pjKSikvfhcdv0Aj7Hsvk21ZMVL-h7GC66YD4B3vq2Tc_u1D8LnVTPE5og_v5uXPKw8jfwIAAP__rT108A) | |
# Saturday, November 30, 2024
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1835, [David N. Burke](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQAL8GOlssEIgLite4y2uvtHB2sVEwRJizk78_5fprp5jRfN2mm48p5uW_38i1VyiTFFJ3AJ0SE_qY3pPm6GaBA3ByYJUcjFHG8vUDzQVQmdmgEsEAqjBcZrRkQRkKPLqPDEAJAHkV116r652U9qB9sIO9MC0IYyu1bys1evk9pHc5qPb3svHk1taeO1P_mByZHM_z7Nu--pJTzNSXujA5rj7jXMqDyZFyq5F2Jsf5uz6oQ39E7DKvDp9nTCnuxjItls3H9Btofx4fTv4EAAD___VzWQQ) arrived in Texas with a company of about thirty volunteers from Mobile, Alabama, under his command. Most of the Mobile Grays would be killed during the Goliad Massacre in March of the following year. We're highlighting the renewal of the longtime rivalry between the Texas Longhorns and Texas A&M Aggies today. Check out [our coverage](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPtCAYBOBfgx0GXhC1oPgau_3aKw3Kq7JB2AAnu__-sptrr51Jnkzm6zbfjPMu7P_Nibo8tzgDA0k5p4LN1jj_mmVj9cLsyBvUvBcwKiVU3xya4Wq3jrFOjHwwC7KNL9DxTikwCmFtnH5jnAvGOQxsaKUYVhTScGm2fuw7IhlaV2Jqy4EFnyZv_hUvTO0az8bro5RHJuIfgYnAVGtts3tXBKY1eo87EpiKOb8JTAFrJjD5GDAXk2g-YrWxBppwiSnQD08NPanZd4eZXvk38zHsR0wh00fCy2GljN_tXbKqroE1SdtHdd67rHoi2X4a5z_7yp-HXRp-AgAA___ZtG9M) in _The Roundup_! Today's edition is slightly shorter than usual as we continue to spend time with our families over Thanksgiving. We'll be back to our standard format on Monday. Later today, we'll be sending you a special message featuring our sponsor, [Pacaso](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx8kDFvwyAUhH8N3mI9wMYwMFSKsqVrR-sFnm0ksC0gafLvK6dzu959Ot3d13W8YohhnT8xka3PaRsFiO7E-UnC6DHE19g13t7AG96Q5YMURimphmaxBowSTve3yRAIz1WP_qbQg_MOULkm2COMcwmcCw267aR2JDvkHU6DGXrWAflQt9zWhSo9sUzxtT0ot25LTbRLrXth8oOJCxOXsD6o1HZHh2U7iEOWl3tNY9nu2RGTZ5_yrx9x9WGdd5yJCXUwiXy4JybPO-a6Ui5L2LmGkzR6fO9lQtUVE5V_mJHD0GspQYNpsvX7d4gxFDWwDuaEIb6b1z-vfFjxEwAA__8qeXSX), offering an investment opportunity in their innovative luxury vacation home platform before their share price changes on Dec. 5. We hope you find their offer beneficial.

## Court Sides With Texas Over Razor Wire Fencing
A federal appeals court blocked the Biden administration from [removing razor wire fencing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuhDAURL_GdHflFxgKF2noNm1KdBdfwJKxke195esjtk83mpGOjubnOl3RBx_Xb9zJ1teSJsmlBiFA8cmhD-9JN87euBtEQ1YYJYeuU51pNmv03Lezkf1iOKm2NYvivVBSiUEJaofG2xMmhOJCyJ73F636mZRGoXExg2mZ5uR8TflSN6r0wrKEd3pQvsxpb4Ldaj0KU19MjkyO8X2kUs-JyfEkMzkKcWbD5HgvEOlZmBzxOAhDgTndc4UNQy1w844ibJizL4Bu9xGWnHbItKeHjytk_E0Znj4TLBTns8KQ4gofLbil7CgzOTbZuuPpQ_ClM0zzdUcfPrr13_8eVv4FAAD__1j2ckk) installed by Texas National Guard troops along the US-Mexico border, marking the latest development in a back-and-forth legal battle that started when the state sued the federal government last October. In a [2-1 ruling Wednesday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1uwyAURp8Gb1j8GeyBoYu3dO1oXcMlQSImAhKSPn2V7N0_fefo_Jy2E8QUj_M3XNG2Z8ibYEJRzqlkm4eYXpsavN2ZX_iAlhspFq2lNsPFLgLm3TEVQPBJop6cVIFrh15Pbt7lEO37jHPJOBczm0clZ4dSAVcQzGImohj62HIZ2wUbPqGG9MoPLKPL1yHZS2u3SuQXESsRa-99DPlp4F5bPN4TItYDeyVidfleGi33hJUG9JU6OBr1WFvJL1rgNxfaY0EKKR9n-mHRPRePZSjW33pMKVZtiGLnK8T0EWj_FnlY8RcAAP__ZcVlpg), the Fifth Circuit Court of Appeals stated Texas is likely to succeed in its lawsuit against the federal government, which argued that the fencing interferes with Border Patrol duties and that enforcement of federal immigration laws is solely its responsibility. Texas, on the other hand, maintained that the fencing is [intended to prevent trespassing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-OszAQxJ8GukX-B4bCxdfQ5WuvRBu8JJYMRmsnhHv6UyJdec0UM9JPM_N1mS4YYthu_3ElV15LmpRQBqQELSaPIZ6Tqb27Cj_Impy0Wg1dpztb3x36GYdhNlaL1gjVt8t10eTb1iyyHxTVwb1hUmohpepF3xjdz6QNSoOLHWxbGUE-lMRNuVOhF-YlnulJ3MxpraO7l7LnSv-r1Fip8TiOhulRiPM7fzuJo6_U-MgfgRm3LRXwlAunEz5EYPxODEdggjXcGLcCV2QOxID7ThgzzOnBBTKeGX7nK1upsWbn9yPEGHJnKyNuK4b46Vb-POvp1E8AAAD__zsjbTI), an argument the court agreed with. Gov. Greg Abbott praised the decision and promised to continue installing razor wire to deny illegal entry into Texas. Earlier this year, Abbott reported that the state had [installed over 100 miles of fencing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvgzAQBeBfY7ZD9tkFPHjowpauHZGDD7Bkcsh2SdJfXyV75-_p6el9X6aLjyne1i-_k6uPhSeUaEAp0HIKPqbnZJrgrjJY1ZBTvUbbdbrrm80Z1NabOZilW0zw3aztoOdrj6QoWLJNdK8ypbRUCgc5tEYPM2njlfFLb_sPYSSFWDm3daNKD1-W9OSTcjvz3iS31XoUoT8FjgLHlc_2HWpXPgWON7oXgePBpQoc3wKBjsTPAjtngrr5GygpYY-JCvAC2f9yhnt8IUOh-ScTXDkHyk124bjHlGLpemHkuvuY3jvqv8ecDv8CAAD__wCUZzU) along the border.
## Landowners Fight Highway Plan
A landowner in eastern Williamson County has [mobilized her neighbors](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOgzAQheGnMd0g3wKhcLENXbbdEk2YAaw1NsJOCG-_Svqtj_Tp6P-5DTf0wcf5G1d25TWlQUttQSkwciD04RxsRe4uqVMVO9Ua3TWNadpqcVJRY2XTdfauJdm2w4bY0IiTudNFU-XdG1PKSKX0VV5ra64jG4vK4tR27UVYyeRL2uuycOEX5imc6cl7Paa1Cm4pZcvCfAndC90fx1H_vjC-R6F7H5-ci5-x-BSz0H3mECDtcKYHzFxge-SFCdKjwMeGbU8b7-WEdETeM0w4MigLhCfw6iPHApRW9BGIkYKPLHRf7Y62w4fgc9MKK-cVffgcLP8Wezr9FwAA__8HmnDb) against a proposed thoroughfare, highlighting the challenges of property owners facing potential eminent domain claims. This past spring, Angela Wetuski was informed about plans to [build a highway through 3.5 acres of her parents’ property](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8tqxCAYQOGn0Z3BX42XhYuhkM0w3XYZTNREMHUwksvbl3bfFziH7-s1vlzK6Xv5dFuw7YplZJQJAkA4Hb1L-R4F9nai3gAOFhRnRkouFV4tgO7lBFxGL5WgzGgDUUSqZS8iZRNO9jcGwCkA01R3gus5cOFAuKiM6pGgwadWatfW0MLl9pjvcoTazWXD2a6tvXfEH4gNiA3neXZnynNpV7eUA7EBuDKIDY_aQk0ukyeJpW6h5pt8lFqTL5U8cbX-faac0y4VEnTZXMp_g_av-LDsJwAA__-4dFcD), prompting her to rally over 150 people to attend a town hall meeting on the project earlier this year. A [state law that went into effect in 2022](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DFv8jAQxvFP42xE9p2Jk8HDi1D0DqVDGTpGDj4Hq5c6ig0l376CvftPzyP9P0_DyUWO39O7m8mWR0gDSNA7pXYoB-8ib4OuvB2l71RFVhmErmmwMdXVSgiAzQgq-GACIpHbB-ONasmPvpNVtM8xpVAqBa1sa43thVA7pV0wndkLLcnHkta6XKnQw-XAW7rTWl_SXLG9lrJkgf8E9AL6i1tiSVy_YD2lu4B-jMyc0tdtEdAfIvP5Ns9u3WqXl4fA_o2mM-Us8NiaDwHNkwg8_j-AQVmt1i8_kTnmxggtp9lFfl2XP1vcLfwGAAD__3ElYGQ) governs how a property can be condemned through eminent domain. In fast-growing areas like Williamson County, residents whose property the government wants for public use are increasingly confronted with a difficult dilemma. “ _At some point, eminent domain comes into play. You either have to sell or you get pushed out_ ,” said Wetuski.
## Longhorns And Aggies Renew Rivalry
The No. 3 Texas Longhorns and No. 20 Texas A&M Aggies [face off today for the first time in 13 years](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPtCAYBOBfgx0GXhC1oPgau_3aKw3Kq7JB2AAnu__-sptrr51Jnkzm6zbfjPMu7P_Nibo8tzgDA0k5p4LN1jj_mmVj9cLsyBvUvBcwKiVU3xya4Wq3jrFOjHwwC7KNL9DxTikwCmFtnH5jnAvGOQxsaKUYVhTScGm2fuw7IhlaV2Jqy4EFnyZv_hUvTO0az8bro5RHJuIfgYnAVGtts3tXBKY1eo87EpiKOb8JTAFrJjD5GDAXk2g-YrWxBppwiSnQD08NPanZd4eZXvk38zHsR0wh00fCy2GljN_tXbKqroE1SdtHdd67rHoi2X4a5z_7yp-HXRp-AgAA___ZtG9M) at Kyle Field in College Station. The Aggies, sitting at 8-3 after a tough loss to Auburn, must win for a shot to play in the SEC Championship game next weekend, while the 10-1 Longhorns aim to dispel any doubt about whether they belong in the postseason. Longhorns starting quarterback Quinn Ewers is [nursing an ankle injury](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OrDAMhZ8GuqA4CT8pUtyGbm67JTLEQKSQjJIszLz9itl6G-uzZH0-Ol-P6YHOu7D9x4NMea1xElwoBsAknyw6_55Ubc3MrYaaDPRS6K6TXV_vRq-ore2g1aqd1Uy67WdaFM16BbvypXbmlgFIDiAGPjRKDgtJhaBw7XXfVoqTdSWmpuxU6IV59e94UmqWeNTe7KU8cyX_VWKsxHhdVzN_p1BiwrBRwOJiuC8rMd6PKjEC3DzcQ0k-CH7jR8x8DNseU8jsd8eD4bY5ygztiWEhy3LBktkz0enoqpOxz8t573LXV4pvBzr_yVX-LOo04icAAP__5HFq2Q) but is likely to play, while the Aggies’ stout pass rush will look to cause him trouble early. Aggies sophomore running back Rueben Owens, who suffered a knee injury during training camp, is listed as questionable and could make his season debut in today’s contest. Texas, on the other hand, maintained that the fencing is , an argument the court agreed with. Gov. Greg Abbott praised the decision and promised to continue installing razor wire to deny illegal entry into Texas. Earlier this year, Abbott reported that the state had along the border. Landowners Fight Highway Plan A landowner in eastern Williamson County has against a proposed thoroughfare, highlighting the challenges of property owners facing potential eminent domain claims. This past spring, Angela Wetuski was informed about plans to , prompting her to rally over 150 people to attend a town hall meeting on the project earlier this year. A governs how a property can be condemned through eminent domain. In fast-growing areas like Williamson County, residents whose property the government wants for public use are increasingly confronted with a difficult dilemma. “ At some point, eminent domain comes into play. You either have to sell or you get pushed out ,” said Wetuski. Longhorns And Aggies Renew Rivalry The No. 3 Texas Longhorns and No. 20 Texas A&M Aggies at Kyle Field in College Station. The longtime rivals haven’t played each other since Texas A&M joined the SEC in 2012. Texas joined the conference this year. The matchup carries for both teams. The Aggies, sitting at 8-3 after a tough loss to Auburn, must win for a shot to play in the SEC Championship game next weekend, while the 10-1 Longhorns aim to dispel any doubt about whether they belong in the postseason. Longhorns starting quarterback Quinn Ewers is but is likely to play, while the Aggies’ stout pass rush will look to cause him trouble early. Aggies sophomore running back Rueben Owens, who suffered a knee injury during training camp, is listed as questionable and could make his season debut in today’s contest. Arizona's SunFed Produce has [recalled cucumbers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UL3SpCAQfBrMtJhBRw0ILiHbSy-0WBh2uULZQlzLt7_y8i_qDvqv-s9jediY4vb6bVfWNeQFJfYtQKvk4m1M19I3XgdmZNWwhlHhTNQTNm9NzwE8oWRLcnIoRyKYB7YD9TaAm5qo7zQAJQEUKugmN0iSPtDsCdhPopfsY82l-5vjVt8c0pW_XDqX1ybpd62fXahfAo1Ac55nd-y2Zm-vWyDQ7DWXS6BZ88Y3hpy9QHO3CjQAN58FGne4Y31yaQs7m1K723RbUrLtfmyBffsp2R-OBZqRaCA1opSjQNMU7T9nTCnuNIpevlYb0_959ae7vhr_BQAA__-zF2l9) sold in 26 U.S. states, including Walmart, Wegmans, and Albertsons, due to potential salmonella contamination. The recall affects cucumbers [sold between October 12 and November 26](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAQxvGnwRsRHDYOA0MXb-na0SLmSKjOxuJwqrx95e7dTjrpp7--r9t8C5ny9vgMK_qWygwKeqm1NGqOIdN77rvoEyKg6dDr0YCztrfQPT0GC04lTA6DWawbXQxKDeN1GGB0iF32p6a1UVobMPpyXQZlVUzWRasxXkWvMOZW6uW75K09MdG7vLBelrJ25J-t7SzMh4BJwLS998LtfAmYTljApPV5OwHT_eC8IbOAKdUjN8nHvlPGKvnYEka51xKPBWXFJRCxXI7lWO9YWXKhKPMmwUpuoSHLs0FyoLVsSBRkwlBPuas-7j-ZKLMdRa8ea8j0F9v-G-_l4TcAAP__JoNyLA), and found on store shelves in New York, New Jersey, Connecticut, Pennsylvania, Massachusetts, Alaska, Arkansas, California, Colorado, Florida, Idaho, Illinois, Indiana, Kansas, Maryland, Minnesota, Missouri, North Carolina, Oklahoma, Tennessee, Texas, Utah, Virginia, Washington, and Wisconsin. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecc5305fceb04cbea57cb8175fc086fa&_e=f3zfJ33eSlUitFHthhZIW33UrTrDiBOpVuO1YjxzafAvfhcGPaMDZTsImW3I_T6vhJHNUzpwYXNzPW4MGYFP9tPn4A-2n4-GMqgvlF3VzgayWeLR9w8NU2CYvuyzo-d1-FaNrtLopD9jATtZ7TrzRXlK3SSZjO7w5Az8oCiDGmYpNgRQysHWCo7NI0wToscLq-5iSVL81BE2y2Q2GYhJkz84NTYrWSAF1Qng_RbDN1j_6drPP8Qbt0YDbSyP3zvzQVBhKJBwqODSdzLlU7bu_QYcpcClwTWJQ8u9KfXH_9AJd8xvrOAGDHaXvGfMKqdeMGvQVk8LfsqIIMWsAfQTlx_gY5gYpO73SqYnksnYfYttBze9Q7kSiKZVR-zKMOU_rKReyNb0H7AaagHvhlskqA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecc5305fceb04cbea57cb8175fc086fa&_e=f3zfJ33eSlUitFHthhZIW33UrTrDiBOpVuO1YjxzafAvfhcGPaMDZTsImW3I_T6vhJHNUzpwYXNzPW4MGYFP9tPn4A-2n4-GMqgvlF3VzgayWeLR9w8NU2CYvuyzo-d1-FaNrtLopD9jATtZ7TrzRXlK3SSZjO7w5Az8oCiDGmYpNgRQysHWCo7NI0wToscLq-5iSVL81BE2y2Q2GYhJkz84NTYrWSAF1Qng_RbDN1j_6drPP8Qbt0YDbSyP3zvz0mu2tx_Z7nyXV1iw5N2ZzwCK8FefVPBhio4x3rahCCdwx-eHo1DZYhdk047IS4U_L87rJ33KbYJro70PZ3HrxgzlRQcFgfE7Jk5Eao6EqGhOjTYKtc0LDQEnGRWf2FEiUQyx1BAMwj-Ou5PKj5JZtg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ecc5305fceb04cbea57cb8175fc086fa&_e=f3zfJ33eSlUitFHthhZIW33UrTrDiBOpVuO1YjxzafAvfhcGPaMDZTsImW3I_T6vhJHNUzpwYXNzPW4MGYFP9tPn4A-2n4-GMqgvlF3VzgayWeLR9w8NU2CYvuyzo-d1-FaNrtLopD9jATtZ7TrzRXlK3SSZjO7w5Az8oCiDGmYpNgRQysHWCo7NI0wToscLq-5iSVL81BE2y2Q2GYhJkz84NTYrWSAF1Qng_RbDN1j_6drPP8Qbt0YDbSyP3zvzBKKzAMXCRGG7Xvyk-GrR9pFYXBM6_rdTED1Zzad9tCAsOoRrwLMeeVQamR_0HNev7ugbbTf4lwMq8vyhRDGwh3Bc2Rey8h6Ey_AoXUSuyzPd6kjq_ZRMyQ-ShKTrdFaxN8DT8GpmWdW5z_44TSc18w%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: History Facts
subject: The first president to fly in a plane
body:
On October 11, 1910, former President Theodore Roosevelt took to the skies above St. Louis, Missouri, aboard a Wright Company aircraft. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cmo131lpzzab2m4az4wdslj6jgy4glx6q5pa8a1hb7j0tk67juixnyzusjzf8pvovg96oxnqc4109mbhfnz375wbrm7kba97u5b41zb2t6bq0h95029u1mkwos873z06cmfhjj4p0g127tj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Teddy Roosevelt was the first president to fly in an airplane.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O n October 11, 1910, former President Theodore Roosevelt took to the skies above St. Louis, Missouri, aboard a Wright Company aircraft. This unprecedented event, which took place roughly 19 months after Roosevelt left office, made Roosevelt the [first U.S. president](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to fly in an airplane. The decision to fly was off the cuff: Roosevelt was visiting Missouri to support state Republicans in their election campaign when he was invited to hop aboard the airplane by aviator Arch Hoxsey. He initially declined, but then changed his mind and climbed aboard. The plane took Roosevelt to “a height of less than one hundred feet,” according to a _New-York Tribune_[article](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), and covered 3 miles over the span of 3 minutes and 20 seconds. Roosevelt was described by a reporter from the United Press as having “[defied death](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)” in front of 10,000 breathless onlookers, and emerged [saying](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), “That was the bulliest experience I ever had.”
---
Teddy wasn’t the only Roosevelt to make aviation history. In 1932, his fifth cousin Franklin Delano Roosevelt flew from New York to the Democratic National Convention in Chicago to accept the party’s presidential nomination. FDR later became the [first president](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) to fly on a plane on January 13, 1943, when he flew to Morocco to meet with British Prime Minister Winston Churchill. The journey was more than 15,000 miles total, as the plane made refueling stops in Trinidad, Brazil, and the Gambia on the way. The president would have normally taken a boat, but doing so was far too risky given the German submarine activity in the Atlantic Ocean at the time.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Teddy Roosevelt ran for president as a member of the Bull Moose Party.
While serving as president from 1901 to 1909, Theodore Roosevelt was a member of the Republican Party. But in 1912, he ran for president once again — this time as a member of the Bull Moose Party. Back in 1909, Roosevelt handed the presidential reins over to successor William Howard Taft, despite being eligible to seek a second full term. But Roosevelt quickly became disillusioned by Taft’s performance, and challenged Taft for the 1912 Republican nomination. Though Roosevelt was unsuccessful in securing the nomination, he persisted and formed a new Progressive Party, which was nicknamed the Bull Moose Party after Roosevelt quipped to a reporter that he was “[fit as a bull moose](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snriyo&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).” On Election Day, Roosevelt and Taft both lost to Democrat Woodrow Wilson, but Roosevelt made history by finishing second as an independent. His 88 electoral votes are still the most votes ever won by a third-party presidential candidate in the U.S.

clean_body: On October 11, 1910, former President Theodore Roosevelt took to the skies above St. Louis, Missouri, aboard a Wright Company aircraft. | O n October 11, 1910, former President Theodore Roosevelt took to the skies above St. Louis, Missouri, aboard a Wright Company aircraft. This unprecedented event, which took place roughly 19 months after Roosevelt left office, made Roosevelt the to fly in an airplane. The decision to fly was off the cuff: Roosevelt was visiting Missouri to support state Republicans in their election campaign when he was invited to hop aboard the airplane by aviator Arch Hoxsey. He initially declined, but then changed his mind and climbed aboard. The plane took Roosevelt to “a height of less than one hundred feet,” according to a New-York Tribune, and covered 3 miles over the span of 3 minutes and 20 seconds. Roosevelt was described by a reporter from the United Press as having “” in front of 10,000 breathless onlookers, and emerged , “That was the bulliest experience I ever had.” Teddy wasn’t the only Roosevelt to make aviation history. In 1932, his fifth cousin Franklin Delano Roosevelt flew from New York to the Democratic National Convention in Chicago to accept the party’s presidential nomination. FDR later became the to fly on a plane on January 13, 1943, when he flew to Morocco to meet with British Prime Minister Winston Churchill. The journey was more than 15,000 miles total, as the plane made refueling stops in Trinidad, Brazil, and the Gambia on the way. The president would have normally taken a boat, but doing so was far too risky given the German submarine activity in the Atlantic Ocean at the time. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Letters written by Teddy Roosevelt during his life ~150,000 | | Year Teddy Roosevelt won the Nobel Prize, the first U.S. president to do so 1906 | Year Teddy Roosevelt won the Nobel Prize, the first U.S. president to do so 1906 | | Age Teddy Roosevelt became the youngest U.S. president 42 | | Distance (in feet) of the Wright brothers’ first successful flight 120 | Distance (in feet) of the Wright brothers’ first successful flight 120 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Teddy Roosevelt ran for president as a member of the Bull Moose Party. While serving as president from 1901 to 1909, Theodore Roosevelt was a member of the Republican Party. But in 1912, he ran for president once again — this time as a member of the Bull Moose Party. Back in 1909, Roosevelt handed the presidential reins over to successor William Howard Taft, despite being eligible to seek a second full term. But Roosevelt quickly became disillusioned by Taft’s performance, and challenged Taft for the 1912 Republican nomination. Though Roosevelt was unsuccessful in securing the nomination, he persisted and formed a new Progressive Party, which was nicknamed the Bull Moose Party after Roosevelt quipped to a reporter that he was “.” On Election Day, Roosevelt and Taft both lost to Democrat Woodrow Wilson, but Roosevelt made history by finishing second as an independent. His 88 electoral votes are still the most votes ever won by a third-party presidential candidate in the U.S. Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2024 History Facts. name: Hillsdale College via Inside Scoop Politics
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Inside Scoop Politics is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkU2L5CAQhn-NuRn8apM-eJglHRjY6V3ohT2KrZVEMCpqdv_-kmFm73Ott3ifh6rfb_rN-ODjejc7KF-rLlVHozcfAl5LwwUqNGxj04wwgSnFnGjaOXVhdFzGDhQdOLsOFyFJt6mnGS7LE55UAB-MvBBYxoE44kZgo5Cy8-rsoZQTysQoRD_YKx3llTtgnIjFIEGO7EyD3sfqHVSbUs4p-OZt7VNZu6C21nJF_AWxGbE55P7Urc4E6MEdiM1tA7wWMP_9rTl3-Vwt4hMhlPE7YYJ9J3L6Md1uD8Tk0XZd01EsID7lkmoG23xcP6IdnD92xCfYjQ8fQ2v2bPwaEZ_aBu_Ed-BnnGKD2BCfvt3ut_n110P_fMGvjwf-PEJXlMt_fQi-ygEJsp7lvU17177wjT-K_QsAAP__1bmSIg)
---
| | [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkU2L5CAQhn-NuRn8apM-eJglHRjY6V3ohT2KrZVEMCpqdv_-kmFm73Ott3ifh6rfb_rN-ODjejc7KF-rLlVHozcfAl5LwwUqNGxj04wwgSnFnGjaOXVhdFzGDhQdOLsOFyFJt6mnGS7LE55UAB-MvBBYxoE44kZgo5Cy8-rsoZQTysQoRD_YKx3llTtgnIjFIEGO7EyD3sfqHVSbUs4p-OZt7VNZu6C21nJF_AWxGbE55P7Urc4E6MEdiM1tA7wWMP_9rTl3-Vwt4hMhlPE7YYJ9J3L6Md1uD8Tk0XZd01EsID7lkmoG23xcP6IdnD92xCfYjQ8fQ2v2bPwaEZ_aBu_Ed-BnnGKD2BCfvt3ut_n110P_fMGvjwf-PEJXlMt_fQi-ygEJsp7lvU17177wjT-K_QsAAP__1bmSIg) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyUkU2L5CAQhn-NuRn8apM-eJglHRjY6V3ohT2KrZVEMCpqdv_-kmFm73Ott3ifh6rfb_rN-ODjejc7KF-rLlVHozcfAl5LwwUqNGxj04wwgSnFnGjaOXVhdFzGDhQdOLsOFyFJt6mnGS7LE55UAB-MvBBYxoE44kZgo5Cy8-rsoZQTysQoRD_YKx3llTtgnIjFIEGO7EyD3sfqHVSbUs4p-OZt7VNZu6C21nJF_AWxGbE55P7Urc4E6MEdiM1tA7wWMP_9rTl3-Vwt4hMhlPE7YYJ9J3L6Md1uD8Tk0XZd01EsID7lkmoG23xcP6IdnD92xCfYjQ8fQ2v2bPwaEZ_aBu_Ed-BnnGKD2BCfvt3ut_n110P_fMGvjwf-PEJXlMt_fQi-ygEJsp7lvU17177wjT-K_QsAAP__1bmSIg)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: House Republican Alerts
subject: Nancy Pelosi and her Democrats are circling

body:
We’re in BIG TROUBLE if we come up short

|
---
| | |
Dear Friend,

We are at a critical juncture in our nation's history. With many NEW Conservative leaders preparing to take office, it is critical that we fight for a strong Republican majority in the House of Representatives.

_That's why our November deadline is so crucial._**We must demonstrate our commitment to the conservative agenda** and show the American people that we are dedicated to fighting for the values that have made our country great.

because Republicans “rigged the system” during a heated interview on
CNN Thursday. Businessman Bernie Moreno defeated Brown, a three-term
senator, Nov. 5 by a 50.2% to 46.6% margin.

This rugged tumbler is 100% awesome and 0% liberal. So if you're unapologetically American and you like your beverages to stay icy cold, or scalding hot... This Freedom Tumbler is for you. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Bah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f76eb40486044e34876e41051b249ac5&_e=1ssZAQ-5QQ6Jp2s8ym6FYPMzyyKxE2A59YZjpSxmX1bzF45yjxADoD3WpeBCmoyUhDgHhNrkg2h__XGNL0uF54UwqNllOt7tC-3C8T8E6-T0fUDIlDFNfyqGZ9i3b1Inqk7QVSgGSwxmSr8xV1fNYcr60taNmkS2JjvBpTt9gfnRwPyN2M4p5QRrN046PxhupVsCq9Yrzf-sKNXD3jnrGbkzhME4IibG8Jw1940BCUJsqw3zh4e5FYjQHSyX8AomA_ejQbVaJocWkMOUWXZ3uvi1QCBP-JIt3dQFeAyx67Wn1F6x3EJxe_1D9CwB1SiFE8XHd5MwZLVy5FTQbwOiUQAMtFdEgseVJTxyST5pQsr2-t3Gg7mUFTUJPpOEurVDFod8RaQJEFgnEV-reqUAiE0suGBHx8GkILCXRNDuSeg%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f76eb40486044e34876e41051b249ac5&_e=1ssZAQ-5QQ6Jp2s8ym6FYPMzyyKxE2A59YZjpSxmX1bzF45yjxADoD3WpeBCmoyUhDgHhNrkg2h__XGNL0uF54UwqNllOt7tC-3C8T8E6-T0fUDIlDFNfyqGZ9i3b1Inqk7QVSgGSwxmSr8xV1fNYcr60taNmkS2JjvBpTt9gfnRwPyN2M4p5QRrN046PxhupVsCq9Yrzf-sKNXD3jnrGbkzhME4IibG8Jw1940BCUJsqw3zh4e5FYjQHSyX8AomA_ejQbVaJocWkMOUWXZ3uh89I34dCodg1gpdf7BtwLbO_UoEJkzsaTsMjemtYwwSr7wzScengIL-5yZzMHPi2c0n0LFUbOgzGVSa0u-XXapp9-4oFAHZ7zSjXRIOSCFrcTO6ZRugX56IMfBe5iWyCnsrM1UJwRpq8xZeAsc_v1U%3D)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=f76eb40486044e34876e41051b249ac5&_e=1ssZAQ-5QQ6Jp2s8ym6FYPMzyyKxE2A59YZjpSxmX1bzF45yjxADoD3WpeBCmoyUhDgHhNrkg2h__XGNL0uF54UwqNllOt7tC-3C8T8E6-T0fUDIlDFNfyqGZ9i3b1Inqk7QVSgGSwxmSr8xV1fNYcr60taNmkS2JjvBpTt9gfnRwPyN2M4p5QRrN046PxhupVsCq9Yrzf-sKNXD3jnrGbkzhME4IibG8Jw1940BCUJsqw3zh4e5FYjQHSyX8AomA_ejQbVaJocWkMOUWXZ3uiSh-dql_RR1y5uez7F4dmX5UFuFJLzJEUqDe_Lbdv8N01uLAcsIj6mA1F2At2MzeXa2jo_Vz__qm8_gCtLAGhGiUOEctcx0O1EHeidsRtCge9otDIqcjEYLN3TF1CbaQufJMEc10MV9o_-L38KdmX4%3D)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

---
On the final day of Military Family Appreciation Month, I'd love to share how your generosity directly helps military families like mine -- and to ask for your help. **[(But if you already know you want to support our service members this holiday season, I hope you'll make a donation to the USO now.)](https://links.e.uso.)**
The holidays are tough for military families as we often face long separations from our loved ones. While my husband is now a veteran, my brother continues to serve, which means our family still feels those difficult holiday separations. One of my most treasured USO memories is from a layover on my husband's TDY, when he reenlisted my brother at a USO Center. Our family couldn't be there to witness this milestone, but thanks to the USO, he and my husband could share that moment together. Experiences like this bridge the distance between us -- and they're only possible because of generous supporters like you.
Many of us worry during this time of year: Are our service members safe? Do they have enough warm clothing to face the brutal winter? Do they get lonely when they're on shift and the rest of the family is gathered around the Thanksgiving table? Thanks to the USO, we can keep connected even from a distance. And our service members receive the essentials they need, from care packages filled with supplies to a warm holiday meal that reminds them of home.
[Donate Now To Help Our Heroes and Their Families](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/yvb0Cw_gYYQr/cE9WbzRpVE1rK29LM0ErNmpJd1o2My9MYWRocnV5U1p0b3V4WnV6L05vWld3akttSzd2NlJsNys2Z3F1NzE3Si9sMDhOMERRZXJMN3RQcXhYbTdjYVRac25Wd0tuVWFVbEJpdEVzS2k2anc9S0/eEMvbkVkMXFNMm5QdThhR2tZOGluU2phMmo0Y1JkNzhOSFRpVzY2VXEyVUdZY05odjJ5REM1R0x0aFo0dDJVb2dxU2VORENjZHVQL3htOVNYQW5wSXJtNTRNalRWWEtlS0)
---
But these programs depend on support from generous individuals like you. **Right now, on the last day of Military Family Appreciation Month, we 're still short of our $50,000 goal.**
**[So, I'm asking personally: Could you help military families separated during the holidays? Your donation of $29 or more before midnight tonight could mean a warm holiday meal, a video call or a connection to home for a service member far away.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/-)**
Thank you for always standing with military families like mine. Your support makes all the difference.
Jamie Finfrock, USO

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: The conservative media revolution is has arrived!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us18.campaign-archive.com/?e=5703353baa&u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=9b5d0a1017)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **For as long as anyone can remember, the media didn’t just report politics. They shaped it.**

News anchors decided what was newsworthy, often ignoring stories that did not fit their narrative. Newspaper columnists fed us opinions. Politicians, to be successful, found they needed to cultivate the media in order to get a fair hearing. **Conservatives were demonized. **

**When digital media first emerged twenty years ago, I wrote a book about how this might change.** Rather than being spoon-fed our opinions by an Ivy League elite, we might see a democratization of opinion forming.
---
|
---
_Same seat, same studio: Douglas Carswell interviewed by Patrick Bet David three weeks before Donald Trump. _
| **Tragically, big tech spent most of the past decade colluding with government and the old media to clamp down on the digital revolution.** Algorithms were programmed to suppress ‘wrong’ opinions. Twitter banned people for saying there are only two genders. They even took down the account of a sitting US President. Facebook closed the accounts of people who questioned the effectiveness of Covid lockdowns.

Rather than dispersing knowledge, for a while it looked as if bad actors would be able to use digital tech to centralize control, China-style.

**Then Elon Musk bought Twitter/X – and fired the leftist activists that had been censoring it.** This is perhaps the most significant political event in decades, even if few yet realize it.

Twitter/X is now the number one news source in most Western countries, and growing rapidly. **Able to host video and live broadcasts, Twitter/X is forcing other dishonest digital platforms to change their ways, or lose audience share. **YouTube no longer feels so hostile to conservative views.

**We saw the immediate impact of this during the recent Presidential election.** The legacy media and corrupt digital platforms could not suppress and misrepresent the way they used to. Attempts to distort what Trump or JD Vance had or had not said no longer worked.

Instead of relying on brazenly partisan news anchors to cross question candidates, candidates could go on long form shows, like Joe Rogan, and set out in detail their stance. **Fifty million people watched Trump on Rogan alone. **

For decades, politicians have been able to get away with speaking in meaningless soundbites. Talking in soundbites no longer pays when you are doing deep dive interviews on a podcast.

Team Trump understood this. Long form podcasts were a key part of their election strategy. Kamala never engaged to the same extent, and came second.
---
|
---
_Carswell left (200,000 views), Trump right (over 3 million views!)_
| **Here at MCPP, we like to think we have been ahead of the curve on this.** While we don’t have the resources of a Rogan or Patrick Bet David, we do produce a weekly video and podcast in our humble studio, which gets tens of thousands of views a month.

So far this year, what MCPP has posted online has been seen by MILLIONS (YouTube 200,000 plus, Twitter 22 million) – and that doesn’t include content we produce hosted by other platforms, like PragerU and others.

If you want to see some of our output, click [here:](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=4756c47df9&e=5703353baa)
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=a08dcf474b&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click above to watch some of our output!_
| **The counter reformation by the tech elite has failed.** As Elon Musk says, we are the media now. Opinion forming is being democratized.

**Conservative think tanks have an unprecedented opportunity to win the battle of ideas. 2025 is going to be awesome!**

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=6f6515c85a&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013

Facebook closed the accounts of people who questioned the effectiveness of Covid lockdowns. Rather than dispersing knowledge, for a while it looked as if bad actors would be able to use digital tech to centralize control, China-style. Then Elon Musk bought Twitter/X – and fired the leftist activists that had been censoring it. This is perhaps the most significant political event in decades, even if few yet realize it. Twitter/X is now the number one news source in most Western countries, and growing rapidly. Able to host video and live broadcasts, Twitter/X is forcing other dishonest digital platforms to change their ways, or lose audience share. YouTube no longer feels so hostile to conservative views. We saw the immediate impact of this during the recent Presidential election. The legacy media and corrupt digital platforms could not suppress and misrepresent the way they used to. Attempts to distort what Trump or JD Vance had or had not said no longer worked. Instead of relying on brazenly partisan news anchors to cross question candidates, candidates could go on long form shows, like Joe Rogan, and set out in detail their stance. Fifty million people watched Trump on Rogan alone. For decades, politicians have been able to get away with speaking in meaningless soundbites. Talking in soundbites no longer pays when you are doing deep dive interviews on a podcast. Team Trump understood this. Long form podcasts were a key part of their election strategy. Kamala never engaged to the same extent, and came second. | Carswell left (200,000 views), Trump right (over 3 million views!) | Here at MCPP, we like to think we have been ahead of the curve on this. While we don’t have the resources of a Rogan or Patrick Bet David, we do produce a weekly video and podcast in our humble studio, which gets tens of thousands of views a month. So far this year, what MCPP has posted online has been seen by MILLIONS (YouTube 200,000 plus, Twitter 22 million) – and that doesn’t include content we produce hosted by other platforms, like PragerU and others. If you want to see some of our output, click | Click above to watch some of our output! | The counter reformation by the tech elite has failed. As Elon Musk says, we are the media now. Opinion forming is being democratized. Conservative think tanks have an unprecedented opportunity to win the battle of ideas. 2025 is going to be awesome! Have a wonderful weekend! | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Defend Democracy: Stand Against DNC Ballot Suppression
body:
Today, we ask for your urgent help to cover remaining campaign expenses and ensure this movement continues.

| | |
# Cornel West for President
---
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=1)
---
# **When we stand together,****we can overcome.**
---
Dear Peter, This campaign has always been about truth, justice, and breaking free from the stranglehold of corporate power over our democracy. Yet, as we’ve seen time and again, those who challenge the status quo face systemic suppression. Across the country, Dr. Cornel West’s campaign has been unjustly removed from ballots in several states by the Democrat Party. This isn’t democracy—it’s bureaucracy weaponized to protect a two-party monopoly. Here’s what we’ve faced: In many states, we exceeded signature requirements, only to see them scrutinized disproportionately and rejected on flimsy technicalities. State officials have used their positions to dismiss our paperwork, invalidate signatures, and stifle grassroots momentum. This isn’t just about us. It’s about keeping any alternative voices off the ballot, leaving voters with a false choice between two corporate-backed parties.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=2 "Donate Now") [Donate Now](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=2)
---
As Dr. West has said: _"The greatest threat to democracy is not third-party candidates. It’s the suppression of democracy itself. The people deserve more than a broken two-party system propped up by billionaires and bureaucrats."_ Despite exceeding signature requirements in multiple states, the system worked against us. This is a deliberate effort to tear down our movement and silence the voices of those who dare to demand justice. But let this be clear: We are not giving up. This campaign was never just about one election. It’s about building a movement that lives on—through the creation of the Justice for All Party.
---
| [](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=3 "Contribute $5 to the Movement Today") [Contribute $5 to the Movement Today](http://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=3)
---
We cannot let them win. Today, we ask for your urgent help to cover remaining campaign expenses and ensure this movement continues. Your contribution will allow us to fight back and build the foundation for a new political future that truly represents the people. This system was designed to exclude us, but we’ve proven time and again that people power cannot be suppressed. Together, we will rise above these challenges, stand against corruption, and forge a path to a just and equitable democracy. ****[Thank you for standing with Dr. Cornel West in this fight for ending genocide. Every dollar brings us closer to making history. Please consider supporting our historic fight to build the Justice for All Party.](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/2025?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=4) In solidarity, West/Abdullah 2024 Campaign Team
---
| [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=kxw7M0T0J6AbTwFMLmaS8vcjtVt7l8pHvGgBclrpv3I&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=5) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=oKOXGzQ9tpSn1teoA00j-kK0zfnPjrrTcKrZUDEYKxE&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=6) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=I2DyCCc6BwF1azIyBYFgkV2wGEww_7tibWXZVTkLw4k&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=7) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=_X1YtK1E-fhMWLMPEV96fdNfXcoN5jXIfWh9hN_VXbs&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=8) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=9)
---|---|---|---|---
Cornel West for President · 8253A Backlick Rd., PO Box #1577, Newington, VA 22122, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=10) Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=cri42ALP2Ev8b37T9dLxBD1GGAUjEYMPmaGYNH4bmIw&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_email2&n=11). Build the Future.
---

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWiLegXWNb

My name is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the president of Hillsdale
College, a Christian liberal arts college in southern Michigan.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWiLegXWNb

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

My name
is Larry P. Arnn, and I'm the president of Hillsdale College, a
Christian liberal arts college in southern Michigan. Hillsdale
was founded in 1844 with the mission of providing "sound
learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the blessings of civil
and religious liberty."

A few
years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World
Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great
Reset initiative.

What is
their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short,
they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab-the
founder and executive director of the Forum-wrote, "We need a
'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would
also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This
initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt
to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some
social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a
seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic
of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with
you.

In this
seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its
implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into
pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

Sign up
now using the secure link below, and we'll send the Great Reset
seminar lectures-absolutely free-directly to your inbox.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63905644:WiLegXWNb:m:3:2627245898:E8A61B56773B8B07080BD1C323833A0D:r

Don't
miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the
defense of American liberty.

Use the
link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

With Donald Trump back on the national stage and MAGA extremists tightening their grip on Pennsylvania, the fight for our values — protecting reproductive rights and healthcare, fighting climate change, preserving democracy — is far from over. They’re already laying the groundwork for their agenda, and we must be ready to stand firm. To keep up the fight, I need your help. Can you chip in to help us close out the month strong and prepare for what’s ahead? Here’s my personal link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Austin2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97892177/514931001/2112201283?&refcode=E11667-20241130-EOM-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODA0OGU4Ny0yY2FmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lyffz_tjZnVmTHqA9FOHRBC-JFbe345TefYR_bRzR7c=)** This is about more than politics. clean_body: I need your help | Peter, We’re at the end of another month, but as we look ahead, the stakes for Pennsylvania are only getting higher. With Donald Trump back on the national stage and MAGA extremists tightening their grip on Pennsylvania, the fight for our values — protecting reproductive rights and healthcare, fighting climate change, preserving democracy — is far from over. They’re already laying the groundwork for their agenda, and we must be ready to stand firm. To keep up the fight, I need your help. Can you chip in to help us close out the month strong and prepare for what’s ahead? Here’s my personal link: = This is about more than politics. It’s about ensuring we have the resources to protect Pennsylvania and defend the values we all believe in. Let’s finish this month strong and stay ready for the battles ahead. Thank you, Austin Davis Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF AUSTIN DAVIS = Emails like this are the most effective way to grow our campaign and reach supporters like you. If you no longer wish to receive these messages, click here to . Friends of Austin Davis PO Box 304 McKeesport, PA 15134 United States

Dear Reader, Voters have made their voices heard.Turns out the American people care deeply about two things: the cost of bacon and a censorship regime that silences its critics. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Our last push
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241130-1135-foote&t=1001&akid=1135%2E342411%2EakmZWt ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Today is our last day to close the gap on our $27,000 end of November
fundraising goal!

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241130-movement.V5RWJt&refcode=em20241130-1135&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1135%2E342411%2EakmZWt ]Will you rush a donation right now to help us close the gap on our
November goal?

This month, we saw our fundraising slow, and for a moment, we were unsure
if we’d be able to recover. But thanks to supporters like you digging deep
to bring the grassroots power we need, we’re now just $5,766 away from
reaching our goal!

Peter, hitting
this target is crucial to ensuring that Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and
Rashida can stay focused on delivering real solutions for us in Congress.
Without our support, they could be spending their time campaigning against
far-right opposition who want to derail our progress.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241130-movement.V5RWJt&refcode=em20241130-1135&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1135%2E342411%2EakmZWt ]Can we count on you to chip in $4 right now — $1 for each Squad member
— to help us reach our goal before midnight tonight?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241130-movement.V5RWJt&refcode=em20241130-1135&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1135%2E342411%2EakmZWt ]Contribute ››

We’ve seen this Squad move mountains to ensure our Squad has the resources
to keep up the fight against the far-right and the swell of MAGA-influence
on our politics. Now, we need that same ground-swell of energy one more
time before the month’s end.

This is our Squad’s first end-of-month fundraising deadline since their
re-elections, and we need to show everyone the true unity, strength, and
solidarity of this moment.

In solidarity,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1135%2E342411%2EakmZWt

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Imagine our shock
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.
Dear Fellow Patriot,

If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.

She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.

But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target.

She's also trying to lock my husband away for the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.

**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d8faebc170374b3e9a531ffa3c0816c3&_e=XTmW32jSNFUN7WsKeHA7AS1NgzjoXC72NpBUxNrfR4CxqksvGnBSYdoj1tTtUnrwBemMJ9HEgZtcYjVwLI2PRKRJKjgFPgUexyVoRk1-kp8D9iyyWweuLOyw-Bej05H_SUFtbK0qT5etvvvAv2FC5S19sqvKa_LWH7CRbT3iwXpwq6bufLmYbYb5FmyKFsH98IY9JbiAciIKrCVBRmpMQb82VB7rkjiiMqvCgTe2vLHqmJQHl7iDUI5te8449zon_ahcHB2QR_ru-QAJcrNITUkjywHs7DBR6NKb64AGASj0BIPO1HkhLMpAHYzfTtbgluHwT8qzzXsWpvCiBt_HA2QteWlHjuTFgC_jxrDziE2d40RhSd6SV9CR2ttUqTZ4)**

My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d8faebc170374b3e9a531ffa3c0816c3&_e=XTmW32jSNFUN7WsKeHA7AS1NgzjoXC72NpBUxNrfR4CxqksvGnBSYdoj1tTtUnrwBemMJ9HEgZtcYjVwLI2PRKRJKjgFPgUexyVoRk1-kp8D9iyyWweuLOyw-Bej05H_SUFtbK0qT5etvvvAv2FC5S19sqvKa_LWH7CRbT3iwXpwq6bufLmYbYb5FmyKFsH98IY9JbiAciIKrCVBRmpMQb82VB7rkjiiMqvCgTe2vLE8gQe8hArtsccIUzzHp9FHlxdRRZw1EX9O-zVF7G_AhP4lm1LBeM3BZctVxs-Ug076d7ngh-MAwcz40bTm2soMdurXjfyoX9_s8I0UjKe5zgyIv_h6mRlKNd-SN6k0wYgKj0PZJue_9XxGRnkXnvNG)
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... **_life in prison_** could be his reward.

Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex.

Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.

My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.

That's when it happened.

The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.

James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.

With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly.

James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!**

James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket!

We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.

We couldn't have been more wrong.

You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband.

For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.

The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars!

Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint.

Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[I'm turning to you for help.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d8faebc170374b3e9a531ffa3c0816c3&_e=XTmW32jSNFUN7WsKeHA7AS1NgzjoXC72NpBUxNrfR4CxqksvGnBSYdoj1tTtUnrwBemMJ9HEgZtcYjVwLI2PRKRJKjgFPgUexyVoRk1-kp8D9iyyWweuLOyw-Bej05H_SUFtbK0qT5etvvvAv2FC5S19sqvKa_LWH7CRbT3iwXpwq6bufLmYbYb5FmyKFsH98IY9JbiAciIKrCVBRmpMQb82VB7rkjiiMqvCgTe2vLERgDyr2BSsQsPynuKhkKSiH7HeA1mM3dqi4mMk6VzYYYds4tQk6mjoIHDMkB5IS-boAXKkbtZv9kzPOlVNXU8sNBcf4q5-YUyYkxNwVCp8cYJ-Nev6Vuy1ghc3cI3mK52REdkqMidh1ugzqqxdmKGT)**

James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people.

He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.

When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.

My husband is _exactly_ the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.

But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She _knows_ what happened that night. She _knows_ James was in a life-or-death situation. She _knows_ that the charge should have been dropped years ago.

But Fani Willis doesn't care.

She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.

James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished.

We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.

It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.

By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.

My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.

And it still hasn't been enough.

I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.

Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.**

If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James.

LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.

And we _were_ at our lowest moment!

Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name.

That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone...

**[Could you send a contribution today to help defend James?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d8faebc170374b3e9a531ffa3c0816c3&_e=XTmW32jSNFUN7WsKeHA7AS1NgzjoXC72NpBUxNrfR4CxqksvGnBSYdoj1tTtUnrwBemMJ9HEgZtcYjVwLI2PRKRJKjgFPgUexyVoRk1-kp8D9iyyWweuLOyw-Bej05H_SUFtbK0qT5etvvvAv2FC5S19sqvKa_LWH7CRbT3iwXpwq6bufLmYbYb5FmyKFsH98IY9JbiAciIKrCVBRmpMQb82VB7rkjiiMqvCgTe2vLHi4ovp4H-hSC88k-Rhaix3oTKb3nXkB2ZRPcNkfscAY5a2_vEhhUDcZk3TIeYoNxH_38ZkhoprCYuJOM9RmcjxPxoPzrBxJbQBle3iZj4EkSU6oFPrUC1xBEEsZGgVPpZkBeenWjFvh1QP5KHHxEKE)**

James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.

I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger.

But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.

You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence.

**[So, if you're at all able, would you consider making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or $1,000 to LELDF to help wrongfully-accused officers like James?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d8faebc170374b3e9a531ffa3c0816c3&_e=XTmW32jSNFUN7WsKeHA7AS1NgzjoXC72NpBUxNrfR4CxqksvGnBSYdoj1tTtUnrwBemMJ9HEgZtcYjVwLI2PRKRJKjgFPgUexyVoRk1-kp8D9iyyWweuLOyw-Bej05H_SUFtbK0qT5etvvvAv2FC5S19sqvKa_LWH7CRbT3iwXpwq6bufLmYbYb5FmyKFsH98IY9JbiAciIKrCVBRmpMQb82VB7rkjiiMqvCgTe2vLFfwwv6Lv6qQbJydW_L_QHBXD5zC90jJqeT4Jgq1xSu322023X-1t0bW4uxPNim3oIPE15Oodfr9tgPqgQTjajuUfveaiCYU5YnePogoiQC36Sky2j9wczcRvj842OlrdJF47-Ps53egYS-96qTxYgW)**

LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.

And it's your **[$35 gift](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=d8faebc170374b3e9a531ffa3c0816c3&_e=XTmW32jSNFUN7WsKeHA7AS1NgzjoXC72NpBUxNrfR4CxqksvGnBSYdoj1tTtUnrwBemMJ9HEgZtcYjVwLI2PRKRJKjgFPgUexyVoRk1-kp8D9iyyWweuLOyw-Bej05H_SUFtbK0qT5etvvvAv2FC5S19sqvKa_LWH7CRbT3iwXpwq6bufLmYbYb5FmyKFsH98IY9JbiAciIKrCVBRmpMQb82VB7rkjiiMqvCgTe2vLFZGYsIVCWV3jAjZ6SuyuPOBsNvPN06quv4cajRt3uxLWII98A2EB3DMiYFYe-JhQ8ZWsk5kY22reeeEpJMV24dGVtjAOLjfsKGCBGCogjwtBArSrXb_xz6_P5pBXGRPWvw5rwb1pBHegZc5tHNsAcy)** that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the _rest_ _of_ _his_ _life_ in prison.

I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James.

Sincerely,
Jenna Burns

P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way.
