clean_body: Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Dear Fellow Patriot, If the name Fani Willis sounds familiar to you, there's a reason. She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars. But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward. Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over. My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate. That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him. James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over. With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer. We couldn't have been more wrong. You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud. The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with “MURDERER” scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class. My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe. But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago. But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo. James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband. It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him. By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense. My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case. And it still hasn't been enough. I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson, the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment. And we were at our lowest moment! Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... James' trial is scheduled for November. His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis's team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all. I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband. You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible. And it's your that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. Please help James before it's too late! Thank you for helping me save my husband and my family. More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visitwww.PoliceDefense.org. And remember -Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Click to unsubscribe

Since Election Day, we’ve seen a pretty steep decline in our fundraising. We get it. During the last few weeks of the election cycle, you were probably inundated with fundraising messages from us and many other campaigns and organizations—we were, too.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Wall Street is buying up family homes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Nearly half of renters [https://www.cnn.com/2024/09/12/economy/us-housing-costs-survey/index.html] are now spending more than 30 percent of their income on housing. That’s unsustainable, and corporate greed is making it worse.

Right now, private equity firms are buying up single-family residential homes nationwide. Wall Street landlords are charging excessive rents and making it harder for working- and middle-class families to buy homes.

Sign if you agree: We need to protect the American Dream and stop Wall St Landlords. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=ynLbRZkCl96sU0bHJwwbuyLTleqKq4Lu6Mv75eYDUvUR86q+WcS04UGh+uDQkLY9mw9gQquE1TDGYnF9ikVVGkFCBu8aTMLGLu4MNRPFmHFfu/sy5Sr+n1/bH43bgUdTVsQtTAT5x7hYX6Q9Zsi6KA==]

https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=ynLbRZkCl96sU0bHJwwbuyLTleqKq4Lu6Mv75eYDUvUR86q+WcS04UGh+uDQkLY9mw9gQquE1TDGYnF9ikVVGkFCBu8aTMLGLu4MNRPFmHFfu/sy5Sr+n1/bH43bgUdTVsQtTAT5x7hYX6Q9Zsi6KA== [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition?contactdata=ynLbRZkCl96sU0bHJwwbuyLTleqKq4Lu6Mv75eYDUvUR86q+WcS04UGh+uDQkLY9mw9gQquE1TDGYnF9ikVVGkFCBu8aTMLGLu4MNRPFmHFfu/sy5Sr+n1/bH43bgUdTVsQtTAT5x7hYX6Q9Zsi6KA==]

It’s time for Congress to put an end to Wall Street’s real estate grab. That’s why I’ve introduced the Stop Wall Street Landlords Act, which would ban private equity firms from obtaining loans backed by the Federal Housing Finance Agency and related government entities for the purchase of single-family residential homes.

Putting a roof over one’s head is a basic human right. Whether they seek to rent or to own, every American deserves access to affordable housing. Let’s tell Congress to pass the Stop Wall Street Landlords Act and stamp out housing inequality . [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/privatization-of-housing-petition]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

Wait! One more thing–

Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.

If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: Hilary Barrett, NV Dems
subject: tonight

Hey friends,
I hope you had a joyful Thanksgiving!
I’m reaching out because tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline will determine the scale of what we can do for 2025 and 2026 — and **[_we need your support._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTJlt19Y7PjKZrieRTJx1PBaZ4VzY_KRrJ4JX-x_nBitMUozbjcZW2cCBvGbEEbbVipTfIGVtv7OdtHCrswPDc_HFIxBusWbyq_yiCGbn4Lzfq1eJPuGmEUXpvWbEATLLE8ceYw54IawBu5sWVqj1ZdUekOh1NqR6r72YI_SbRuOmHInhRYQDNZZDRAhyOlYi7HD5vcZZm4-P1zbHdZc3Qx9Ei0nmkfv-vzpPey_Dy0L54fIghNi8v1Djo_4rW4Shi9gYZXDRIKbKKkHaOP7YggBq_DCqiinRS2ONLZiN2jnP64Li-75LznT4CHOxR-RST/4bw/vlm34Q-ETwKwsvRXg5Yu4Q/h1/h001.Y_9YwOaw1VVBVuvy-EPitACbYHACwK-ihYElwMzo5yA)**

Nevada Democrats held their own in a tough environment this past election.
* We re-elected Jacky Rosen to the U.S. Senate and were one of the only four battleground states to hold every single one of our competitive U.S. House seats.
* We were also able to defend our majorities in both the State Assembly and Senate and are _one seat shy of a supermajority in both chambers_.

Now, we are laser-focused on the 2025 legislative session and the 2026 election cycle.
* Our top priority will be holding Republicans accountable if they enable Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda. Project 2025 has no place in Nevada.
* In 2026, reproductive freedom will be on the ballot again to formally enshrine abortion rights into the Nevada Constitution.

Here’s the real talk: our ground game continued to deliver victories against all odds and it’s only possible through your grassroots donations — **[_we depend on supporters like you giving $7, $10, $20 or anything you can spare to power our operation._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTJlt19Y7PjKZrieRTJx1PBaZ4VzY_KRrJ4JX-x_nBitMUozbjcZW2cCBvGbEEbbVibCkRbqUfDBZAzV7IzLN3TwsFz2ExxBH-94QFcYfjif3iMuKA5ljmhwJ-vOmDF56QyzcHHecyinSvkfU7z1LE64Fs_YkCbXGcHlIwTUViurEsgpA94sUZdDvz0UH5_GkaYwc4jdKUeHz1c-5tUCBlTPF2TauboPAC5fw0GFO2StCxE0vPpSki-AvaNmGfvGI58VsvLrpxqfPuRYh2akvb8EJPxJdNH858YgXKWcRFZJgQE8-_QpbAvTvT7sxK6KzJ/4bw/vlm34Q-ETwKwsvRXg5Yu4Q/h3/h001.xDUpoaSh2lO_1AuhX4lyggFIX999vcp1AiKRGYAnTzo)**
Our online fundraising has taken a dip since Election Day, and understandably so with families resting from a tough cycle and preparing for the holidays ahead. We can’t let up now, Joe Lombardo is depending on our apathy to help enact Donald Trump’s agenda here.
[**_Please, if you can, chip in before tonight’s end-of-month fundraising deadline so we can plan for the fights ahead to protect our freedoms and keep Project 2025 at bay._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTJlt19Y7PjKZrieRTJx1PBaZ4VzY_KRrJ4JX-x_nBitMUozbjcZW2cCBvGbEEbbVi3t9-V02Sb_RI_XBR-7ar0ZlZKWr4AiVuaM7_iuFP9F3BLINi8v_uAwUKR8xmBUiqX-l4_TaPYYkRANrYIYc_ukRQHuVTEA_6SdjIGqhBuvcS22_mSh5Ds4gXT27ZkF1v968mySrnv05f_qXeLKQ3KhWhWyrj_lW7kSvy1L_yufyIUeDft0dtFjbnJwFGp_CJ-3gGeHlkQ4YG1MdKwCroU5bZ_npbZvMVQXijOAtcp69T_ILFX76xl3iLTMciSpQS/4bw/vlm34Q-ETwKwsvRXg5Yu4Q/h4/h001.UjG0OkTPPGPdkyj7IRIfQWuKj2eO-bBqSmGhoFtiKRw)

name: Dylan, Team Vasquez
subject: What’s next?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
Tonight

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. name: campaign@keithellison.org
subject: We can't get caught flat-footed
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

We only have a few weeks to prepare before Trump takes office, so our entire team is working around the clock to get ready.

We can’t get caught flat-footed if the Trump administration attempts to enact extreme, dangerous policies that threaten our rights and freedoms. We need to have plans for every foreseeable scenario — and the resources to implement them.

That’s why raising the last $6,371 to reach our budget target before tonight’s 11:59 pm deadline has never been more critical.

According to our records, you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you have until December 31 to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the state.

Peter, will you make a refundable $75 donation right now to help us meet our first post-election fundraising goal and stand up to the Trump administration next year?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_1ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_1ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_1ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_1ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_1ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_1ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Team Keith

You can now use your 2024 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241130_1ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
Keith Ellison for Attorney General
PO Box 17224
Minneapolis, MN 55417
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/rnmAh_BZp0CUaBw6XYl7Xw2?unsubscribedata=AdKs8xmD%2F285UIVDLMPCvtXHfcU0p782FERLhwhiCAC%2Fs%2BaahkrgzxNlt91SkerOExB3maeTnekemgB9HaqeJhfQW%2BB0F5VxrsaJjTgEEq8wgq0aWswamh1BKFF7jW%2BIX6fZVYZu4pUu7YFL4AYMz8dfOI9R%2Bpnpbc0cQ32eGu4N4CNoczGlFG0KdSYgMVuTzIj3u9djhFO2Pw2UrAg2I6gon09WTayeZpWkfeJEs6CMmsx8B2cU1srMO56Xh2kU3DoS5z1I0TSMzPAJojv8%2Bgz5zummKIsqKymVRWy6sO8ok3arlyis4SaZOe5roCVuvYeXaEqIjKx9zmVz98RWZ%2FW7GPLsCUYV7mkfNN1JTd0BWcd45VQdkwant9i8SRPL0v%2B7uPXKpgdamuoC8U6j46KCtPEfqEFg0lpGYsEWLBOmoQIobgxqo2DScJZoInmm .

Coffee lovers unite, rebuking the Washington Post for whitewashing genocide, The National Day of Mourning & Thanksgiving, and building a movement to uphold human rights. Let's dive into this week's recap for _Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid_.
* * *
## Calls to Action
* **WHAT?** Help me be a supportive husband! Include my amazing wife Ayesha's small business focused on women's empowerment in your holiday shopping.
* **HOW?** Check out [Equal Entrance](https://substack.com/redirect/6296f0f4-dd9f-4673-bcc7-3224d9813577?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and happy gifting!❤️

**Quick Note!** I am doing everything in my power over the next 4 years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. **Subscribe below and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..wnV90BucZWeglMIOcjTp4ZjRgVZwAX3IlOgthKc8Ogg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=152348822)
## Posts This Week
* **Sunday:**[Grounds for Peace -- Coffee & Human Rights](https://substack.com/redirect/4b229ee9-fcd0-4669-b7d8-50998eacb7d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): This holiday season, consider a gift that supports human rights and gets you delicious coffee
* **Monday:**[The Qasim Rashid Show Episode 147](https://substack.com/redirect/63a84399-0b89-48a6-8f5a-21266d73e325?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): A deep dive with Dr. Zachery Foster--a scholar of Israel and Palestine--into the history of the conflict
* **Wednesday:**[Rebuking the Washington Post for Whitewashing Genocide](https://substack.com/redirect/66b3477a-9fca-47ee-8fcc-0340660bd385?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): The Post's has done a disservice to journalism, to human rights, & to international law
* **Thursday:** [Thanksgiving AND The National Day of Mourning](https://substack.com/redirect/87e8691f-02ef-48e9-a87a-bd99d8d8d662?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Learn about the suffering of Indigenous Americans, and how you can counter their oppression
* **Friday:**[Help Me Uphold Human Rights](https://substack.com/redirect/ba3d766c-bce7-470d-a4ff-98a18ffc18ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): An ask and a vision for the future of Let's Address This and beyond--and how you can help lead that charge

## **Dad Joke of the Week**
I get sometimes my dad jokes don't fly--doesn't mean y'all have to ostrichcize me. :D
* * *

Let's dive into this week's recap for Let 's Address This with Qasim Rashid. Calls to Action WHAT? Help me be a supportive husband! Include my amazing wife Ayesha's small business focused on women's empowerment in your holiday shopping. HOW? Check out and happy gifting!❤️ Quick Note! I am doing everything in my power over the next 4 years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I welcome your support. Subscribe below and join the movement. Posts This Week Sunday:: This holiday season, consider a gift that supports human rights and gets you delicious coffee Monday:: A deep dive with Dr. Zachery Foster--a scholar of Israel and Palestine--into the history of the conflict Wednesday:: The Post's has done a disservice to journalism, to human rights, & to international law Thursday: : Learn about the suffering of Indigenous Americans, and how you can counter their oppression Friday:: An ask and a vision for the future of Let's Address This and beyond--and how you can help lead that charge Dad Joke of the Week I get sometimes my dad jokes don't fly--doesn't mean y'all have to ostrichcize me. :D Why Your Support Matters: If you're reading this, you are a member of a growing community of more than 80,000 thoughtful people. name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Before they’re gone

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aed31c398a6b4d9ea6c7acf1b0cfcfa6&_e=ot2U62n8rHYjKMkEJYtLUT06fma9K5puYFnsHuGdlBA3r89sn_CFaISOXq48181LKSVZwlsG7giZZh_ebO1oOhxdIZVAtg26GEEMzshRSlFjO0spma7H1S8DqVYN_8FapByl0_d2O5PfyFS6gF90MSpsqbzIIPMIz6Ygn7RO7ogXN74aS8g8w1WGhQOY38tksFEUljZ9ArL-XKgmeJXfWbEOilSyPBREUr0wisoXd2ztadZU5Uq-gVvCQ4bX3rLnQ1d05CWhanGStBjmK6E69uY-iBLvyNwUBab97xUhOYZP-ikXGZVbYp4lgzriO8h4MFamr5xUNNHxsZQkkisivi8yJDWwir6Dv5NBVQW9kG0zsfgIIcPOBLFJBnbRWCXi-pPuK3zdOyeTrLv87MQ568EkQSbb9FkmPt-99X_fOHpnxfqW7r8qNCKzyq6lQwWe)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aed31c398a6b4d9ea6c7acf1b0cfcfa6&_e=ot2U62n8rHYjKMkEJYtLUT06fma9K5puYFnsHuGdlBA3r89sn_CFaISOXq48181LKSVZwlsG7giZZh_ebO1oOhxdIZVAtg26GEEMzshRSlFjO0spma7H1S8DqVYN_8FapByl0_d2O5PfyFS6gF90MSpsqbzIIPMIz6Ygn7RO7ogXN74aS8g8w1WGhQOY38tksFEUljZ9ArL-XKgmeJXfWbEOilSyPBREUr0wisoXd2ztadZU5Uq-gVvCQ4bX3rLnQ1d05CWhanGStBjmK6E69tZUrAcJEVtx3QaY-J6UOI0UVpxzeIiXoAYVUrKpkdRWo2iDf4A8I0t-1D8-6oJlk7Y5DZpcgyTvQjBiKm7XEh9h6RRUp6a5q7mYZu5LlMjW_NSTqofWAXoxsbPpwwkfe9u5-tgIpL-7bce3n-REdLnfKt9z3z-aoMWb2CXgZvOo)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=aed31c398a6b4d9ea6c7acf1b0cfcfa6&_e=ot2U62n8rHYjKMkEJYtLUT06fma9K5puYFnsHuGdlBA3r89sn_CFaISOXq48181LKSVZwlsG7giZZh_ebO1oOhxdIZVAtg26GEEMzshRSlFjO0spma7H1S8DqVYN_8FapByl0_d2O5PfyFS6gF90MSpsqbzIIPMIz6Ygn7RO7ogXN74aS8g8w1WGhQOY38tksFEUljZ9ArL-XKgmeJXfWbEOilSyPBREUr0wisoXd2ztadZU5Uq-gVvCQ4bX3rLnQ1d05CWhanGStBjmK6E69vigqVAhEQuRgNY-5CpSC9rTZdV2qWYqsgRTyrGpzy0qkZXcdU7zrDmCsqrFhft9bV7mA34HpKYKiJNtjGNxMjlrxHTeTzlWitgLqpEnMbnEfKpZ5CzMducKO10fwXZKlJD9bvcKeNoEp1mMGntbnrpoJt9O-CjOhzqLXnBcoicE) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

clean_body: Before they’re gone A message from our sponsor... | | | | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

| | I’ll be completely honest here, Peter.
---
| | Asking for campaign contributions has _**never**_ been my strong suit. Because grassroots patriots like **YOU** put _so_ _much_ into the fight for our nation’s future already. You’re the _backbone of America_ – so I really don’t like asking you to do more than you already do. But I have to be honest with you again, [_**my team and I are going to encounter a**_ _**MAJOR roadblock**_ _**if we don’t hit our November fundraising goal.**_](https://links.fryforsc.com/els/v2/XaE6MxE~0Zcm/QjhBdUMyeUJMQUsvNTRlVnF4VkFxd1ZIVFA1WmxsRmZpTWhHeERWKzM0SW9TaXJvdzBhbU9aWVhRd0hua2Z3dWtEUEdyek9VdERJYUxseEhBNk03TVJSU3I2L2hiMXZNWURUZXoxQnJDbXM9S0/)

| | And whether we hit our mark for this month or not is going to come down to the wire. As things currently stand, we’re [**$1,409**](https://links.fryforsc.com/els/v2/PWzwQEP7mAM_/QjhBdUMyeUJMQUsvNTRlVnF4VkFxd1ZIVFA1WmxsRmZpTWhHeERWKzM0SW9TaXJvdzBhbU9aWVhRd0hua2Z3dWtEUEdyek9VdERJYUxseEhBNk03TVJSU3I2L2hiMXZNWURUZXoxQnJDbXM9S0/) away from the goal for November that we set at the beginning of this year. That means if just [**100 supporters**](https://links.fryforsc.com/els/v2/zAb9fRkz7Ktr/QjhBdUMyeUJMQUsvNTRlVnF4VkFxd1ZIVFA1WmxsRmZpTWhHeERWKzM0SW9TaXJvdzBhbU9aWVhRd0hua2Z3dWtEUEdyek9VdERJYUxseEhBNk03TVJSU3I2L2hiMXZNWURUZXoxQnJDbXM9S0/) make small contributions of $15 or more, we’ll crush our goal with ease and be well prepared to advance [**Agenda 47**](https://links.fryforsc.com/els/v2/V3YXT3NXPLs~/QjhBdUMyeUJMQUsvNTRlVnF4VkFxd1ZIVFA1WmxsRmZpTWhHeERWKzM0SW9TaXJvdzBhbU9aWVhRd0hua2Z3dWtEUEdyek9VdERJYUxseEhBNk03TVJSU3I2L2hiMXZNWURUZXoxQnJDbXM9S0/) through Congress in 2025. [_**_So if you’re in a position to do so, please be one of the 100 patriots we need to chip in_**_ _**_$15_**_ _**_or more before the November deadline at_**_ _**_MIDNIGHT TONIGHT_**_ _**_!_**_](https://links.fryforsc.com/els/v2/6-KLHZDP47M2/QjhBdUMyeUJMQUsvNTRlVnF4VkFxd1ZIVFA1WmxsRmZpTWhHeERWKzM0SW9TaXJvdzBhbU9aWVhRd0hua2Z3dWtEUEdyek9VdERJYUxseEhBNk03TVJSU3I2L2hiMXZNWURUZXoxQnJDbXM9S0/)

| | Congressman Russell Fry, South Carolina’s Seventh Congressional District Congressman, is honored and humbled to represent the Pee Dee and Grand Strand areas in Washington, D.C. Russell Fry is the successful product of the American Dream. He learned from his parents that there is no such thing as a free lunch and that success comes from hard work and determination. Russell self-funded his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina and then earned his law degree at the Charleston School of Law. In law school, he served as Student Bar Association president, helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation, and received the prestigious Civility Award. For over a decade, he practiced law all along the Grand Strand. Russell has always been a public servant and an advocate for the conservative movement. Prior to his election to U.S. Congress, Russell Fry represented Horry County in the South Carolina General Assembly. As Chief Majority Whip in the State House, he fought to lower taxes, defend the unborn, and safeguard the 2nd Amendment. Additionally, Russell fought to put 18 policy initiatives into law in his time as Chairman of the SC House Opioid Abuse Prevention Study Committee. This legislation provided funding for education on opioids, opioid prevention, and opioid treatment. Russell and his wife, Bronwen, have one son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper.

The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their beloved chocolate lab, Jasper. | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ Russell Fry for Congress PO Box 14641 Surfside Beach, SC 29587 | | | | * | | | | | | |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: The antidote to drag queen story hour
body:
When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=452a69eac9384b8583aae98b94efb943&_e=MrT57jMDlqx4ZW-FOGtf88pLsJIBFkKCGW1JT7dCxOllCjUzNavGRaRkLfxofrDRUKlWPmm0WgEGq8YwFMM1RpYaWNvpa09uuYkY-1YHJFW0eM-Wjj-LjsVltgKgcr6qtz1x76Seik1NGL0B8AfnboYAHj_aqoLVP4mNM4bQrRZOVxuwY1EOTj1Cg0we5Fcze3ut9qV48nvMDYo4eyPRp1sqmi-AKDX8lvuLx-ur1j7fScWTVY9XtwDoUBVMZroDGu-K7u3UpId1MMhP549l7M-LTwlmB2iLT2pWBd6M8h_BRMyJbXbwUC6ojdkTnf8PxYAO_yrnQq-3b9_r4h_Kn-4w-FunS0S_zhMbjlsWc66WeoN1VCUSbZWp1T2YSdWYF20-okdEYE5wjihpd7rPUg%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=452a69eac9384b8583aae98b94efb943&_e=MrT57jMDlqx4ZW-FOGtf88pLsJIBFkKCGW1JT7dCxOllCjUzNavGRaRkLfxofrDRUKlWPmm0WgEGq8YwFMM1RpYaWNvpa09uuYkY-1YHJFW0eM-Wjj-LjsVltgKgcr6qtz1x76Seik1NGL0B8AfnboYAHj_aqoLVP4mNM4bQrRZOVxuwY1EOTj1Cg0we5Fcze3ut9qV48nvMDYo4eyPRp1sqmi-AKDX8lvuLx-ur1j6qeAXaOGbMobLN5Vd0IAnV_fkqVyCcFnUv5W-Itb6fKDSJCb8jgX0PGhDamlx3OFbwyneQANrghJecdNSdrZHDnrYn3S8_vFHmNcNbq-yNHIgANiO3KogfU2QJTpY1TYBlbwgapGB0HbvjYF2jyvmARHYmGPdr91CRDyu2EqPq7Q%3D%3D)
---
| Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”
---
| | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.”

| | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.

| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”

| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.”
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=452a69eac9384b8583aae98b94efb943&_e=MrT57jMDlqx4ZW-FOGtf88pLsJIBFkKCGW1JT7dCxOllCjUzNavGRaRkLfxofrDRUKlWPmm0WgEGq8YwFMM1RpYaWNvpa09uuYkY-1YHJFW0eM-Wjj-LjsVltgKgcr6qtz1x76Seik1NGL0B8AfnboYAHj_aqoLVP4mNM4bQrRZOVxuwY1EOTj1Cg0we5Fcze3ut9qV48nvMDYo4eyPRp1sqmi-AKDX8lvuLx-ur1j7_TZTzIfUcPOQT_asAku_IXSWo-vEtQHFb09lUy2QMJtBeEiFW8vLxrMCzlGGCEHfpA0lLzTcloRhygxFqyD5_TYYwFBwPP92sVUIgenRGI6W3NE9ZqWjFWzop4yLTe9P75z7wOaEi-xCaifcS6umzcJfAYOmxEl12mBOnBL9Oqg%3D%3D)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=452a69eac9384b8583aae98b94efb943&_e=MrT57jMDlqx4ZW-FOGtf88pLsJIBFkKCGW1JT7dCxOllCjUzNavGRaRkLfxofrDRUKlWPmm0WgEGq8YwFMM1RpYaWNvpa09uuYkY-1YHJFW0eM-Wjj-LjsVltgKgcr6qtz1x76Seik1NGL0B8AfnboYAHj_aqoLVP4mNM4bQrRZOVxuwY1EOTj1Cg0we5Fcze3ut9qV48nvMDYo4eyPRp1sqmi-AKDX8lvuLx-ur1j58jQq2ZKU1-U__19Nml5nuJUJLPFNqiqDOvdqC1HaaXIKaqsCrGYYfXWUA-5WSYHe7psIvynkcJeLoYtsv9YK3uqDiblbwL35TX2kYsbZ2Pw8dhkY-g3d09WfiOmzoKYEIUUl0LhLxhqkzY2KoOd4l94A8iw9c_QWWj5O4Swzkbg%3D%3D)
---
| But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;">
---
| | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.”
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=452a69eac9384b8583aae98b94efb943&_e=MrT57jMDlqx4ZW-FOGtf88pLsJIBFkKCGW1JT7dCxOllCjUzNavGRaRkLfxofrDRUKlWPmm0WgEGq8YwFMM1RpYaWNvpa09uuYkY-1YHJFW0eM-Wjj-LjsVltgKgcr6qtz1x76Seik1NGL0B8AfnboYAHj_aqoLVP4mNM4bQrRZOVxuwY1EOTj1Cg0we5Fcze3ut9qV48nvMDYo4eyPRp1sqmi-AKDX8lvuLx-ur1j4472MLv7PQ74DsYpHAETbExw5HGBPPdvVAgwUUw4JRc6mczSowzpx8wv3HPazAUu46TRT5LMfX84cIadm9L1UbSK1C1VEyfnOZjn32NruXaPd76S_r4Y6GnFcQby-Mpi9b2fNtT_QpIMYeDRvZ9ZNKaI_lBOQes8fwB5XObkrxtQ%3D%3D)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=452a69eac9384b8583aae98b94efb943&_e=MrT57jMDlqx4ZW-FOGtf88pLsJIBFkKCGW1JT7dCxOllCjUzNavGRaRkLfxofrDRUKlWPmm0WgEGq8YwFMM1RpYaWNvpa09uuYkY-1YHJFW0eM-Wjj-LjsVltgKgcr6qtz1x76Seik1NGL0B8AfnboYAHj_aqoLVP4mNM4bQrRZOVxuwY1EOTj1Cg0we5Fcze3ut9qV48nvMDYo4eyPRp1sqmi-AKDX8lvuLx-ur1j46cF2tFxKRJ-sGaC4DYcr6ScVoC2362jLDLAaGVRVNjMxNNKOLrsD-FG1Pup7Lv_EfIeSqsDOP3CFfjjRdnT3Bn4-zvLqNNPgiM7rOnqpo5JtTzfQdB5grXM-BRwK25WoDvsAiLbqY6D-3JM2kOrax-sTsC2A87e8r9Z4zZ3U4IA%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=452a69eac9384b8583aae98b94efb943&_e=MrT57jMDlqx4ZW-FOGtf88pLsJIBFkKCGW1JT7dCxOllCjUzNavGRaRkLfxofrDRUKlWPmm0WgEGq8YwFMM1RpYaWNvpa09uuYkY-1YHJFW0eM-Wjj-LjsVltgKgcr6qtz1x76Seik1NGL0B8AfnboYAHj_aqoLVP4mNM4bQrRZOVxuwY1EOTj1Cg0we5Fcze3ut9qV48nvMDYo4eyPRp1sqmi-AKDX8lvuLx-ur1j76LnKlMGPs_9vanA5bvrkrCJ0_uFOH3hE02YJmcz3z5Jqec25sVtIEpjfy5_ghYRj7su97TsyIXDHEuhQ0vPan0rhZmNU2Wj2vIcydOYDw289zfH7JCn-v6gEvMGfy6-eZwE7uV3GMYLCgPB-M7-4XfWq7dPJ-tyFNRsB76AJvKw%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=452a69eac9384b8583aae98b94efb943&_e=MrT57jMDlqx4ZW-FOGtf88pLsJIBFkKCGW1JT7dCxOllCjUzNavGRaRkLfxofrDRUKlWPmm0WgEGq8YwFMM1RpYaWNvpa09uuYkY-1YHJFW0eM-Wjj-LjsVltgKgcr6qtz1x76Seik1NGL0B8AfnboYAHj_aqoLVP4mNM4bQrRZOVxuwY1EOTj1Cg0we5Fcze3ut9qV48nvMDYo4eyPRp1sqmi-AKDX8lvuLx-ur1j6X0kzOdix3Hq6MtC5FVsdZybu82h-m_Fve6bkQ6bAePK-SW2aXodTt29xKHJZG8ppLxmGttEJogDHENAbCn88SEft0bc3ixFITFv4c1rSAXXfr2XOKTygIyWdkQ8UVHIlox9Cy7EVSrv479Pnn9DpRvaOddpmlYlSuWVjN6__HVQ%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. clean_body: When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. | | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical. | | | | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...” | | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Woke Baby. “For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world.” | | Prince and Knight. The “premier queer-friendly fairy tale” about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess. | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A “family-friendly celebration of drag” that encourages children to “work it.” | | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco. | | | But that’s just not true.<\- this is a man leading “drag queen story hour.”< p style="box-sizing: border-box;"> | | But that’s just not true.THIS IS A MAN leading “Drag Queen Story Hour.” | | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: Rick about a cross-dressing Grandpa, Melissa filled with graphic nudity, and Darkstalker featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

name: Lisa (personal)
subject: pulling back the curtain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Senate
body:

| | Team, I’m so proud and grateful for the support I’ve received in the weeks since I officially launched my campaign to be Virginia’s Attorney General. It’s inspiring to see so many people from my community rally around me and believe in my vision for the Commonwealth. **But I know that this is going to be a tough fight.** The first few weeks of any campaign are a crucial time when candidates raise the funding they need to come out strong, and that’s why **[I’m humbly asking you to chip in $5 to my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97901935/514951772/1597325137?amount=5&source=LOC_EM_FR_2024.11.30_EOM_B1_F1_S1_C1_15DOxDC_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg2MTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2YzYjUwOTYtMzZhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nAhGtdzLblwZetVCgnOVrbA6sDi8Ag-hIFnsL6PkoYI=) **

# Join or Renew your BIZPAC Membership
_Good Morning,_ _I hope you are planning to attend the BIZPAC Christmas reception._ _Kim, Sonu and I have been diligently working to produce one of the most fun, exciting and classiest Christmas receptions BIZPAC ever held for our members. (see attached Christmas party invite) and RSVP with Kim@BIZPAC.us_ _So, we are reaching out to ask TWO things from our members:_ _1) please bring a qualified member candidate with you to the Christmas Party...you never know, it might be just the thing their business needs to go to the next level_ _2) If you have not just joined or renewed, please Upgrade or Renew your membership today. BIZPAC needs your support to do our work in the Texas Legislature that has already started with bill filings._ _We ask for your support today. https://bizpac.us/join-now_ _See the special opportunities for membership below with our new VIP Founders Club._ _Sincerely,_
_JL Trahan_
_BIZPAC.us Founder and Executive Chairman_
---
| Guest of Honor, Texas State Senator Brandon Creighton and BIZPAC Founder and Executive Chairman JL Trahan

name: Marcy Kaptur
subject: I wouldn't normally email you on a Saturday, but…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaptur for Congress
body:
Hi there! I hope you and your loved ones had a lovely Thanksgiving holiday.
I wouldn't normally reach out on a Saturday, but our end-of-the-month deadline is tonight at midnight, and your support would make a big difference for our team.
Republicans made our district one of their top targets in the nation in 2024, and they tried to buy this seat with millions of dollars in special interest cash.
**We won, but it was close — the margin of victory in our race was just a few thousand votes.**
We're already bracing for another dark-money onslaught in 2026, friend. I need your support to continue my work for Northwest Ohio. Winning right here in OH-09 is key to retaking the house, and continuing to deliver for working people and communities like ours.
Can I count on you, friend? Here's the link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/kaptur24_em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97902950/514952428/-1968428926?refcode=241130_mk_EOM_link_l1&ms=241130_mk_EOM_link&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZTBiZGQ2ZS0zN2FmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HS2InKiNxTNEV42OQ3896fPl5CprJfmXhK9vOOiHa9Q=)**
Thank you so much.
— Marcy

PO Box 899
Toledo, OH 43697
United States

Team, we need you. Our first end-of-month deadline since MAGA Republicans won a trifecta is TONIGHT -- and right now, we're still _short_ of our $250,000 goal to fight back!

If we don't catch up, we won't be able to hit the ground running on our strategy to flip the Senate blue and rein in Trump's power -- and this is your LAST CHANCE to help us hit this _mission-critical_ goal!

**Please, we need your support before MIDNIGHT to make it happen:**

**[Will you give $5 -- or whatever you can -- to help us respond _immediately_ to Republicans' takeover and help Democrats flip the Senate blue? >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241130-LastCall-EOMLastCallFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241130-LastCall-EOMLastCallFR-Pros-sl1&akid=19024%2E9716520%2EBf8Oyw)**

body:
We’re going to fight hard at the local level
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97903562/514953865/1019451062?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_EOM_241130_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmIyZDI2Ny0zOGFmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f7Imblm4T7_qEkOoCvQ8ZBl4FC3oF0TiF7HYD_Gnrus=) In case you missed it, team, this month, **we flipped two seats in the Ohio House and two in the Ohio Senate.**

We sent a message that Ohioans are ready for leaders who prioritize their communities, NOT special interests.

But let’s be clear: our fight isn’t over. The Republican-controlled legislature is _still_ set on pushing out-of-touch policies that don’t work for Ohioans. And with a Republican trifecta in Washington, it’s more important than ever that we stay vigilant and make sure our newly elected leaders have the support they need to defend Ohio’s working families and stand up to GOP extremism.

_[**Will you pitch anything you can before we close the books for November so Ohio Democrats can build on these critical victories and fight for progress on the local clean_body: We’re going to fight hard at the local level | = In case you missed it, team, this month, we flipped two seats in the Ohio House and two in the Ohio Senate. We sent a message that Ohioans are ready for leaders who prioritize their communities, NOT special interests. But let’s be clear: our fight isn’t over. The Republican-controlled legislature is still set on pushing out-of-touch policies that don’t work for Ohioans. And with a Republican trifecta in Washington, it’s more important than ever that we stay vigilant and make sure our newly elected leaders have the support they need to defend Ohio’s working families and stand up to GOP extremism. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = With your support, we can move forward together knowing that Ohio Democrats in the state legislature will do everything they can to protect abortion rights, and the right to vote, confront racial injustice, ensure livable wages, and go to bat for Ohio workers. body:

[**_Peter, I’m about to share what we’ve accomplished together and explain how pivotal your support is to finishing what we started. I hope you’ll read my entire message until the end, learn what’s at stake in this moment and then chip in $15 to help Democrats defeat extreme MAGA Republicans in the House. If you have to run, can you please rush $15 before you go to help us put our plans into action? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97903618/514953893/1662333049?amount=15&refcode=20241130_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWIyZDI2Ny0zOGFmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BicRXrP3Ljr2nQ-40IhK8JeQoaK-6AL1IqFxvxeqrGY=)
Thanks to your incredible support, the nationwide Trump surge never materialized in the House.
We flipped nine Republican-held seats and held them to the narrowest of majorities in American history.

body:

Please read the message below from our sponsor.

Steve Thompson, Editor

* * *

The holidays should be filled with joy, but for many in Israel, hunger looms... | | | | | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo0563jyd4rhnm745by04qmq7t8zijzdqxavkmpx5dv7q2c7jzzbk5riqandvymozg190h71w6t2o9ft1bucv49rwgq7qm98zce2t27hze6b6q24ld92yxnwjnvefwk6qeu5hig7so8ewdy6buta0ed323yk0z9ikjee4yvm165b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snrvtj&__onlt=h)

| | [](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo0563jyd4rhnm745by04qmq7t9pj4ntrn1y85medy13xmed5wpl6aguc8hpr2vck1ma8fiszmwanukoqv24g0ng387239vxwf8e0uk5wx11ix9xi1egrbjrhv590n9geu7t2ly0gifht8wgdokbhj1bqwmvh8ac8q7bfb1jnhj5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snrvtj&__onlt=h)
---
| | | Every day, we hear from hurting families in Israel. They are struggling—exhausted by the constant threat of rocket fire, the fear of terrorism in their streets, and the hatred they see on the news. As if that was not heavy enough, so many **struggling families are unable to put food on their tables.** But right now, you have the opportunity to extend a loving Christian hand by providing a Holiday Care Package to a family that desperately needs it. Your support will make a real difference this holiday season. With your help, **we can provide food, gifts, and financial assistance to those who are suffering and in need with a Christmas or Hanukkah Care Package**. Imagine the relief and joy a family will feel as they sit down to a warm meal, knowing that they are not forgotten.
---
[GIVE A HOLIDAY CARE PACKAGE »](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo0563jyd4rhnm745by04qmq7tm3jml7s0qau080psuleuhmpt48r8951fqlmuf588w3sexhcqamme37doxv4iq8xxlie8fkthbtvlartphqyet2eooy8gvmfccb71xv67iem2pg9tqkpbvuf7rdd1ond0k5bg3vtgyzudwwyxbv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snrvtj&__onlt=h)
For over **40 years** , the **International Christian Embassy Jerusalem (ICEJ)** has stood as a beacon of Christian support for Israel, providing aid when it is most needed. Today, we are once again answering the call, but we cannot do it without your help. By partnering with ICEJ today, you are not just giving a gift—you are sharing Christian hope and love with those who need it most. [Please give right now](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo0563jyd4rhnm745by04qmq7tmfjtyjsbdcdh57ln0hlcjfxpgtzdzdppkx5l2vurfuadnmfudim183464jresz3ledt84nqk673sqbq6bdolavayiq1l55dko5pdj7vjy3t55za201m6u6h1ify5yk3txdwruodn1x7g37jnt1&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snrvtj&__onlt=h) to ensure we can bless as many families as possible this holiday season!
[BLESS ISRAEL THIS HOLIDAY SEASON »](https://track.americanpatriotdaily.com/?xtl=5gjbzaywo0563jyd4rhnm745by04qmq7tnvjamztr4f1c2rx5ue6l0ofmwcin2paku71rnjez2jic0biyhu9mokslancav1ypxy67qao0yiyj4lmlw436i0wjs5h3d0c5jxwu8hjznqa7jt2yx46zsgiipht9jwrk9pr0j60dsuiixh819y&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=snrvtj&__onlt=h)

clean_body: The holidays should be filled with joy, but for many in Israel, hunger looms... Please read the message below from our sponsor. Steve Thompson, Editor The holidays should be filled with joy, but for many in Israel, hunger looms... | | | | | | | | | | Every day, we hear from hurting families in Israel. They are struggling—exhausted by the constant threat of rocket fire, the fear of terrorism in their streets, and the hatred they see on the news. As if that was not heavy enough, so many struggling families are unable to put food on their tables. But right now, you have the opportunity to extend a loving Christian hand by providing a Holiday Care Package to a family that desperately needs it. Your support will make a real difference this holiday season. With your help, we can provide food, gifts, and financial assistance to those who are suffering and in need with a Christmas or Hanukkah Care Package. Imagine the relief and joy a family will feel as they sit down to a warm meal, knowing that they are not forgotten. For over 40 years , the International Christian Embassy Jerusalem (ICEJ) has stood as a beacon of Christian support for Israel, providing aid when it is most needed. Today, we are once again answering the call, but we cannot do it without your help. By partnering with ICEJ today, you are not just giving a gift—you are sharing Christian hope and love with those who need it most. to ensure we can bless as many families as possible this holiday season! | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- The International Christian Embassy Jerusalem** was established in 1980 in recognition of the biblical significance of all of Jerusalem and its unique connection with the Jewish people. Today, it represents millions of Christians, churches, and denominations to the nation and people of Israel. name: JanePAC
subject: 2023 was the hottest year on record. 2024 is on track to beat it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Time is running out.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97905371/514957473/1328794144?refcode=ea.45802ba0-3baf-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.45802ba0-3baf-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ODAyYmEwLTNiYWYtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0REc12O5Wu_R3u8Akk2Jg8zOIF0rAXuM93AMt81eez4=&emci=cbac3ad1-c9ac-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=45802ba0-3baf-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=4823105)
---
The latest climate data is stark. 2023 broke records as the hottest year in history — but the World Meteorological Organization recently confirmed that 2024 is on track to surpass it, with global temperatures reaching 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels. **That’s the critical threshold scientists have warned us about — the point where climate damage could become _irreversible._** **[If we want to stop this dangerous trend and fight for a livable future, we need folks to take action now. Your support today will help elect climate champions who will push forward the policies we need to heal our planet. Can you chip in to make it happen?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97905372/514957474/2105508926?refcode=ea.45802ba0-3baf-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ms=ea.45802ba0-3baf-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ1ODAyYmEwLTNiYWYtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0REc12O5Wu_R3u8Akk2Jg8zOIF0rAXuM93AMt81eez4=)** In October alone:
* Flash floods in Spain claimed hundreds of lives.
* Wildfires tore through communities in Peru.
* In Bangladesh, floods wiped out over a million tons of rice, sending food prices skyrocketing.
* Here in the U.S., Hurricane Milton ripped through the South, its deadly intensity supercharged by human-driven climate change.

And in January, Donald Trump will take office with an agenda custom-built for (and by) Big Oil. His administration is ready to dismantle clean energy progress, roll back environmental protections, and give polluters a free pass to destroy our air and water. **But we’re not here to scare you. We’re here to remind you that hope is still alive.** As you read this, state leaders across the country are stepping up. California’s Governor Gavin Newsom is preparing legal shields against Trump’s attacks on climate policy. In states like Washington, Colorado, and Illinois, leaders are forming bold strategies to counter Trump’s extreme agenda. And JanePAC helped elect over 95 climate champions to state and local offices this year alone. These leaders are ready to fight for clean energy, hold polluters accountable, and build the resilience our communities desperately need. **_Every_ election** shapes the future.
**_Every_ degree** of warming matters.
**_Every_ action** we take today can change the outcome tomorrow. But if we’re going to protect our planet and break free from the grip of Big Oil, we need to channel our momentum into an all-out effort in 2025. **[Grassroots power is the only way forward. clean_body: Time is running out. | The latest climate data is stark. 2023 broke records as the hottest year in history — but the World Meteorological Organization recently confirmed that 2024 is on track to surpass it, with global temperatures reaching 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels. That’s the critical threshold scientists have warned us about — the point where climate damage could become irreversible. = In October alone: Flash floods in Spain claimed hundreds of lives. Wildfires tore through communities in Peru. In Bangladesh, floods wiped out over a million tons of rice, sending food prices skyrocketing. Here in the U.S., Hurricane Milton ripped through the South, its deadly intensity supercharged by human-driven climate change. And in January, Donald Trump will take office with an agenda custom-built for (and by) Big Oil. His administration is ready to dismantle clean energy progress, roll back environmental protections, and give polluters a free pass to destroy our air and water. But we’re not here to scare you. We’re here to remind you that hope is still alive. As you read this, state leaders across the country are stepping up. California’s Governor Gavin Newsom is preparing legal shields against Trump’s attacks on climate policy. In states like Washington, Colorado, and Illinois, leaders are forming bold strategies to counter Trump’s extreme agenda. And JanePAC helped elect over 95 climate champions to state and local offices this year alone. These leaders are ready to fight for clean energy, hold polluters accountable, and build the resilience our communities desperately need. Every election shapes the future. Every degree of warming matters. Every action we take today can change the outcome tomorrow. But if we’re going to protect our planet and break free from the grip of Big Oil, we need to channel our momentum into an all-out effort in 2025. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Don’t lose hope. Act. \- Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39328%2E3422442%2ENFTI6v)
Derek,
Republicans and special interests want us to feel defeated, like the cards are stacked against us. But as long as we keep pushing forward _together_ , we can make real progress.
**Every contribution you make to Team Truth to Power is a powerful statement about the future of the country we want to build.**
**[Derek, can we count on you to chip in $5 before midnight tonight so we can boost our November fundraising before the month’s end?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241130?refcode=em20241130-39328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39328_3422442_NFTI6v&akid=39328%2E3422442%2ENFTI6v)**
**We can’t --and won’t--stop fighting for a fair economy and our fundamental freedoms.** Truth to Power is dedicated to supporting candidates who put people first.
As a grassroots organization, we’re not beholden to special interests that work against our values. We rely on individual supporters like _you_ stepping up to help drive real change.
**[Whether you can contribute $3 or $30, your donation sends a powerful message. Whatever you can afford to donate today _will make a difference_. Please chip in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20241130?refcode=em20241130-39328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39328_3422442_NFTI6v&akid=39328%2E3422442%2ENFTI6v)**

Thank you so much for everything you do,
Katie

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: Who is the enemy within?
body:
| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e94defff27f1435094b742a8f10f6b68&_e=iZuNfS4v5Y6U4ZewEd3JV6QkExpen4TaIRN2-Yr0E8S2zyyFTEa7NBWlOVYXG8z3mPalOutn-HlPG_ibzIqEAKjsHHo2s2CnmIV4zcFdrOZY0o4T9QnwR_C_BXnxNWwh9grrr_nblpYPEBw5q4SJBxjQtNJFa7dlvXFD0lQd1NdOsBhklM2Zwo2hCjjhRpOcFlRzX1t-WEjFHKYU11P5m3lGAKlI6f3l2F37sidNVMd1wiUObZ1OS9fLI7AgvYSdHtqjqHXqE4W4GO0VmyNnpq9Qb53YFrKujnUxyfqOBhwpEg15hURSuAMyWUMjq7hsw9m0TrQZVJFpAPcWkkNzNTFAKJUIUww0mrKQ32DPP6R0uYC6LSuURTUV-B32E1ZjtOqIbsnmLqfeO9BPHyPQaw%3D%3D)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e94defff27f1435094b742a8f10f6b68&_e=iZuNfS4v5Y6U4ZewEd3JV6QkExpen4TaIRN2-Yr0E8S2zyyFTEa7NBWlOVYXG8z3mPalOutn-HlPG_ibzIqEAKjsHHo2s2CnmIV4zcFdrOZY0o4T9QnwR_C_BXnxNWwh9grrr_nblpYPEBw5q4SJBxjQtNJFa7dlvXFD0lQd1NdOsBhklM2Zwo2hCjjhRpOcFlRzX1t-WEjFHKYU11P5m3lGAKlI6f3l2F37sidNVMd1wiUObZ1OS9fLI7AgvYSdf_XADG8Ha5HZiPA4qKr6FM5vjErZObLf3Cm8D1IMF9-s8-bzf7lk8ZnuS6IFDD4tzhqecuo8tAiajssK6xJSE1P3bZ4DuGO95_TQFlwM9klyu1LfjMFiylt7mVv86p8K7e0KcLSKqsGxbHUoH3VZgg%3D%3D)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e94defff27f1435094b742a8f10f6b68&_e=iZuNfS4v5Y6U4ZewEd3JV6QkExpen4TaIRN2-Yr0E8S2zyyFTEa7NBWlOVYXG8z3mPalOutn-HlPG_ibzIqEAKjsHHo2s2CnmIV4zcFdrOZY0o4T9QnwR_C_BXnxNWwh9grrr_nblpYPEBw5q4SJBxjQtNJFa7dlvXFD0lQd1NdOsBhklM2Zwo2hCjjhRpOcFlRzX1t-WEjFHKYU11P5m3lGAKlI6f3l2F37sidNVMd1wiUObZ1OS9fLI7AgvYSdTDhZFAUijs4hW2SKNoEXHP7tpbuI3PXJvoh1fPGNUXXh6h9mccQRvfv1z4crA_UBz3WbhqC_Xim1B58bJNoOC-MsCZ5Ld5a-UzjOGSdggs2H9DhzBoEiienRMp1lSa4KPT2KEt2eFo7e_nxQkneVpw%3D%3D)**
---
| | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=e94defff27f1435094b742a8f10f6b68&_e=iZuNfS4v5Y6U4ZewEd3JV6QkExpen4TaIRN2-Yr0E8S2zyyFTEa7NBWlOVYXG8z3mPalOutn-HlPG_ibzIqEAKjsHHo2s2CnmIV4zcFdrOZY0o4T9QnwR_C_BXnxNWwh9grrr_nblpYPEBw5q4SJBxjQtNJFa7dlvXFD0lQd1NdOsBhklM2Zwo2hCjjhRpOcFlRzX1t-WEjFHKYU11P5m3lGAKlI6f3l2F37sidNVMd1wiUObZ1OS9fLI7AgvYSd_FHHrzbGv_FHe5PSlUIMr9fkzn0IYnBp901umCNM4mBEx0gqnKKkohSWCb4Z6E0YLWQZ-gL214_f2oMxDukBgveRf2pEGZpGAVpEp8V9-nSQBUqMiqSqwXq8CbDDslvZDyFlHyweNbXWA48Geb-gFA%3D%3D)

name: 2024 Voter Verification via Senate GOP
subject: The survey closes for good in a few days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: 150 billionaire families spent $1.9 BILLION on the 2024 cycle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Did you see this, Peter?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241130?refcode=em20241130-36196&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36196_1203867_D3R6hp&akid=36196%2E1203867%2ED3R6hp ]Open Secrets headline: Outside spending on 2024 elections shatters
records, fueled by billion-dollar ‘dark money’ infusion

According to Open Secrets, outside spending in U.S. elections hit a
record-breaking $4.5 billion in 2024, with more than half of that being
dark money from super PACs. As Justice Democrats Rep. Ro Khanna pointed
out, more than $250 million of that went to congressional candidates:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241130?refcode=em20241130-36196&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36196_1203867_D3R6hp&akid=36196%2E1203867%2ED3R6hp ]Tweet by Rep. Ro Khanna: Congress received $250 million in dark money
during the 2024 election season. People should decide elections, not
wallets.

Not only that, but Americans for Tax Fairness found that 150 billionaire
families poured a record-breaking $1.9 billion into the 2024 election —
which is $700 million more than billionaires spent on the 2020 election.

It’s undeniable: Citizens United enabled billionaires and super PACs to
buy elections and influence in Congress, and it’s getting worse every
cycle.

The Democratic Party has become much too comfortable accepting help from
the wealthiest few and corporate special-interest groups while losing
touch with working class people. But we’re working to change that with
your help.

Justice Democrats is actively recruiting everyday working Americans —
nurses, principals, union workers, and community organizers — to run for
Congress in order to transform our economy and democracy, but we can’t do
it without grassroots support from people like you.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241130?refcode=em20241130-36196&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36196_1203867_D3R6hp&akid=36196%2E1203867%2ED3R6hp ]With our November end-of-month fundraising deadline rapidly approaching
at midnight, will you pitch in $5 or more to fuel our
Candidate Recruitment Fund and build people power in Washington?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241130?refcode=em20241130-36196&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36196_1203867_D3R6hp&akid=36196%2E1203867%2ED3R6hp ]Contribute $5

The more working class people we send to Congress, the sooner we can end
billionaires’ and super PACs’ grip on the Democratic Party and start
passing the bold, progressive change our communities deserve.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241130-36196-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36196_1203867_D3R6hp&akid=36196%2E1203867%2ED3R6hp

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36196%2E1203867%2ED3R6hp

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
