name: Team McBride
subject: Sarah needs you by her side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
This is important!
#
Thank you for opening this email over the holiday weekend! We wouldn’t send this email if it weren’t important.
Our end-of-month deadline is at midnight, and it’s the _first_ one since Sarah won her election to represent Delaware in the U.S. House.
[**We’re $4,300 short of our $20,000 goal. Will you pitch in any amount you can right now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241130?refcode=em20241130-1588&amount=5&refcode2=1588_21716_XB6Ney&akid=1588%2E21716%2EXB6Ney)
Sarah is focused on bringing down the cost of housing, health care, and childcare **— _not_ Republican-manufactured culture wars.**
Delawareans sent her to Congress to make the American dream more affordable and accessible, and that’s what you can count on her to fight for. But she needs you by her side.
[**If Sarah can count on you, pitch in $5 to help her reach our $20,000 goal. Every donation will help Sarah cut through the noise and deliver for working people.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241130?refcode=em20241130-1588&amount=5&refcode2=1588_21716_XB6Ney&akid=1588%2E21716%2EXB6Ney)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241130?amount=5&refcode=em20241130-1588&refcode2=1588_21716_XB6Ney&akid=1588%2E21716%2EXB6Ney)**
Thank you!
Team McBride
* * *

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Thank you & what I’m thinking about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/_9jnruqjMA9JWHnkCEE7BA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpLdGhP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZ0amTEtnEzRl21IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Hi, Peter, I hope you’re doing well. It’s been a couple weeks since I last reached out. Like many of us, I’ve taken some time to rest and reflect on the Election and the path forward for our neighbors, our party, and our democracy. Election Night was definitely not the night we were hoping for and what lies ahead is scary, but I am so proud that _together_ we were able to make IL-17 a bright spot on the map that I think can lead us forward. Not only were we able to hold this seat, we were able to more than double our margin of victory. We did it because of YOU and your support. As I told you all year, in order to win, we needed to drive-up turnout in our cities, like Rockford and Peoria, AND persuade voters in our rural communities, like Freepot and Sterling. We did exactly that. In fact, our biggest increase in voters was in those rural communities and we were even able to flip rural McDonough County blue! Look, Peter, the forecast for the next four years can seem daunting. I’d be lying if I said I didn’t feel a little discouraged, but just as I used to tell my neighbors when I was their TV meteorologist, the best thing you can do when a bad storm is coming is make a plan. Here’s mine:
1. I’m going to focus on the job my neighbors elected me to do. I am going to continue looking out for them and fight for good-paying, sustainable jobs, protect reproductive freedoms, and bring common-sense leadership to the climate crisis.
2. I’m going to push back on Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans’ extremism. We know that Project 2025 is on the horizon and I am going to fight like hell to make sure it is not passed into law.
3. I’m going to make sure that Democrats retake the House in 2026. I know it can feel like a long way off, but the clock is now ticking on holding this seat again and electing Democrats across the country, so we can elect a House that will be a check on Trump.

To be clear: I’m not asking you to start the work today. You’re tired. You’re frustrated. And maybe you’re scared. I get it. I’m feeling it all too. But I have to believe that our brightest days are still ahead of us. Let’s keep the hope and thank you again. \- Eric | **[Donate](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Eq_TGNC508S40WbbSR5K_A~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpLdGhP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_~~)**
---
| Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois.
---

name: COURIER
subject: The right-wing media is winning—we need your help to fight back
body:
We must prove to the right-wing media that COURIER won’t back down

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97910255/514968962/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM0NzQxYzYtNDFhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gidn7avgWPzCMTN94axRVBoaI3Dkefl3osNB48miMcA=&emci=e74741c6-41af-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=ec4741c6-41af-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
As this pivotal month comes to a close, one fact is undeniable: the right-wing media handed Donald Trump the presidency.
From Fox News to Sinclair, X, and Joe Rogan, the right’s powerful machine didn’t just amplify Trump’s lies—they controlled the narrative and set the agenda.
They manufactured outrage, spun false economic panic, and misled millions of voters who don’t follow politics closely.
The result? Our nation is teetering on the edge of becoming an autocracy.
The good news is that COURIER is building a progressive, pro-democracy media network to take on the right’s propaganda machine and fill the legacy media void with fact-based reporting. We’re committed to this fight—but we need your help to make it happen.
**[Tonight is our biggest deadline yet. At midnight, we close the books on our November fundraising goal—$50,000 to expand our reach and show the right-wing media we’re not giving up. We’re just $10,000 away from hitting that goal. Can you chip in $25 right now to help us fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97910256/514968963/-593472309?refcode=20241130-EM-EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM0NzQxYzYtNDFhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gidn7avgWPzCMTN94axRVBoaI3Dkefl3osNB48miMcA=)**
Here’s why your support matters so much right now:
* **Publishing local, values-driven news:** Our 11 state-based newsrooms focus on pro-democracy, fact-driven reporting in battleground states like Pennsylvania, Arizona, and Michigan. We’re the trusted source that counters right-wing lies in communities that matter most.
* **Reaching millions of Americans:** With 4.5 million followers and nearly 2 billion social media impressions in the final 90 days before Election Day, we’ve proven that we can take progressive news directly to voters in spaces dominated by disinformation.
* **Leading the charge online:** From TikTok to X, our creators and experts deliver the facts where people are already looking for news. This election cycle, we surpassed 1 million followers on TikTok and racked up over a billion views.

**The stakes couldn’t be higher.** The traditional media is already capitulating to the right, failing to hold Trump accountable as his administration takes shape. Meanwhile, the right-wing disinformation machine is gearing up to dominate the next four years.
**We have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to hit our $50,000 goal. This is our first major fundraising deadline since the election, and every donation is a message to Trump and his media allies that we’re not going anywhere.**
[**Can you chip in $25 or any amount now to help us hit this critical goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97910257/514968964/-593472309?refcode=20241130-EM-EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM0NzQxYzYtNDFhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gidn7avgWPzCMTN94axRVBoaI3Dkefl3osNB48miMcA=)
**[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97910258/514968965/-593472309?refcode=20241130-EM-EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM0NzQxYzYtNDFhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gidn7avgWPzCMTN94axRVBoaI3Dkefl3osNB48miMcA=)**
Thank you for standing with us in the fight for truth.
In solidarity,
The COURIER Team

Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
[**Become a member! **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97910259/514968966/1028889122?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM0NzQxYzYtNDFhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Gidn7avgWPzCMTN94axRVBoaI3Dkefl3osNB48miMcA=&emci=e74741c6-41af-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=ec4741c6-41af-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=14016711)

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Please, Mark is asking you personally.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

**Making sure you saw this important request from Mark. He’s going to be at the forefront of so many important issues, but he cannot take on Trump and the powerful interests who want to roll back our progress alone.**
**[So please. Mark Kelly is asking you personally. Can you pitch in $3 before our November deadline hits at midnight?](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov24.pA2hgt&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=1&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov24.pA2hgt&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=2&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)**
---

Friend - Mark Kelly here.
Writing to ask you to chip in $3 before we hit our deadline and close out November. Here’s why:
We ran hard this year. We helped elect Ruben Gallego to the United States Senate and defended competitive seats in the House. We supported candidates in battleground states from coast-to-coast, helping them fund their races and reach the voters they needed to win.
And, frankly, we spent a ton of our own resources doing that work. We left it all on the line and we need to rebuild our reserves to make sure we go into the next year strong — especially as we prepare for a second Trump administration.
I plan to be at the center of whatever happens next, and to do that we need to be ready for anything.
[**Can you make a donation of $3 or any amount that’s right for you before tonight’s deadline? It’d mean a lot to me, personally, to have your support.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov24.pA2hgt&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=3&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-nov24.Uw00oV&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=22&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-nov24.TOkJ6B&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=23&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-nov24.OPKQF-&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=24&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-nov24.iQTco7&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=25&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-nov24.arPT2u&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=26&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-nov24.7IU8db&refcode=em241130-1-120&t=27&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8)**
---
****
Thanks so much for your help.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=5931%2E6688874%2Eq_2vE8).

We supported candidates in battleground states from coast-to-coast, helping them fund their races and reach the voters they needed to win. And, frankly, we spent a ton of our own resources doing that work. We left it all on the line and we need to rebuild our reserves to make sure we go into the next year strong — especially as we prepare for a second Trump administration. I plan to be at the center of whatever happens next, and to do that we need to be ready for anything. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thanks so much for your help. Mark Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate

name: Team Jayapal
subject: Nearly 3,000 of you responded to our survey 📊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
[ https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241130-4554-footer&t=1001&akid=4554%2E420207%2E6xJLYm ]Pramila Jayapal

Peter, a couple
weeks ago we sent around a post-election survey to members of this
grassroots team.

We wanted to know what voters think Democrats need to do differently to
win back the working class — and nearly 3,000 of you responded. Here’s a
snapshot of what you had to say:

Team Jayapal
Post-Election Survey Results

What policies do you think Democrats need to champion to win the support
of working people?

1. Making corporations and the wealthy pay more in taxes
2. Medicare for All
3. Paid family and medical leave
4. Protecting abortion rights
5. Climate change

What are some of the reasons you think Democrats lost?

* “The Democrats failed to connect with the working class.”
* “Inflation was hurting a lot of people.”
* “We shouldn’t be courting big donors.”

How do you think we can better get our message out?

* “Actions will speak louder than words.”
* “Social media.”
* “You have to be everywhere the Republicans are.”

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241130-1?refcode=em20241130-4554&amount=3&refcode2=4554_420207_6xJLYm&akid=4554%2E420207%2E6xJLYm ]Will you make a $3 donation before midnight to help us
reach our end-of-month goal and rebuild the Democratic Party around a
bold, populist, working-class agenda?

As Chair of the Congressional Progressive Caucus, Pramila will be working
to put your feedback into action over the next four years. We have our
work cut out for us, but the direction we need to go is clear.

Democrats have taken working-class voters for granted for too long, and
this year it came back to bite us. We need to fight for bold policies like
Medicare for All that will actually make a difference in people’s lives —
and when we actually have the power to act on those policies, it’s
imperative that we follow through.

But she can’t do it alone. As one of the first Members of Congress to
refuse corporate PAC money, Pramila relies on grassroots supporters like
you to power this movement. And even though this election just ended, we
still need your help to reach this month’s goal.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241130-1?refcode=em20241130-4554&amount=3&refcode2=4554_420207_6xJLYm&akid=4554%2E420207%2E6xJLYm ]Peter, will
you pitch in $3 before tonight’s midnight deadline to help
us reach our goal and keep fighting for working families across the
country?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241130-1?amount=3&refcode=em20241130-4554&refcode2=4554_420207_6xJLYm&akid=4554%2E420207%2E6xJLYm ]Contribute

Thank you,

Team Jayapal

Contribute to Pramila Jayapal: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241130-4554-footer&t=1002&refcode2=4554_420207_6xJLYm&akid=4554%2E420207%2E6xJLYm

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.pramilaforcongress.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4554%2E420207%2E6xJLYm

---
Send in your questions to _questions@laroucheorganization.com_**
**
**How To Get Satan Out of The White House**
Friend —
Since the decision by the Collective Biden Administration to allow U.S. long-range missiles to hit inside Russian territory, the world has been accelerating towards all-out thermonuclear war between the two largest nuclear superpowers. Russian President Vladimir Putin, in his remarks to the CSTO Summit in Astana, Kazakhstan, made clear the overwhelming military superiority Russia has in terms of advanced missile systems, which is over 10 times what the combined NATO countries have.
Putin said, “As far as the production of relevant missile systems and relevant equipment is concerned, Russia has 10 times more of them than the combined output of all NATO countries. Next year, we will increase the production by another 25 to 30%.”
“Let no one forget about the Kalibr, Kinzhal and Zirkon hypersonic missile systems, which are unmatched around the world in terms of their technical specifications. Their production is also being ramped up and is going at full speed.”
Putin also noted the ongoing transition taking place in the U.S. Presidency, and the attempts made on President-elect Donald Trump’s life. “What struck me most,” Putin said, “and I think you share my view, was the fact that entirely uncivilized means were employed against Trump, absolutely uncivilized, including attempts on his life, more than once (incidentally, I believe he is still not entirely safe).” He went on: “There have been various instances in the history of the United States. I believe he [Trump] is a wise and hopefully judicious individual who comprehends all this.”
This transition, and the next six weeks, is as unlike any other in American history. The mere fact that thermonuclear war is seen as a real possibility by the majority of American citizens, and that there is no clearly responsible authority in the White House that is accountable to the population, makes this situation completely unique. In this changed circumstance, a US-based Italian journalist, Roberto Mazzoni, who has been following recent events of the Schiller Institute, gave the following reply to a listener who raised the common slanders LaRouche has been attacked with for the past 50 years:
“Today the classic accusation levelled against anyone who opposes the official propaganda line is to be anti-Semitic and far-right, so this only confirms to me the reliability of the Schiller Institute. The Independent and The Times are typical propaganda channels of British intelligence, I wouldn't even read them to get weather reports or obituaries.”
The Dec. 7-8 deliberations of the Schiller Institute on its upcoming conference, “In the Spirit of Schiller and Beethoven: All Men Become Brethren!”, are the way the United States can get out of its present trajectory towards nuclear war, and remove the devolutionary cultural wasteland that is now present in the White House.
**Speaker: Harley Schlanger
**

clean_body: Join us live at 2pm ET for the Manhattan Project | | | | "Watch Here" Send in your questions to questions@laroucheorganization.com How To Get Satan Out of The White House Friend — Since the decision by the Collective Biden Administration to allow U.S. long-range missiles to hit inside Russian territory, the world has been accelerating towards all-out thermonuclear war between the two largest nuclear superpowers. Russian President Vladimir Putin, in his remarks to the CSTO Summit in Astana, Kazakhstan, made clear the overwhelming military superiority Russia has in terms of advanced missile systems, which is over 10 times what the combined NATO countries have. Putin said, “As far as the production of relevant missile systems and relevant equipment is concerned, Russia has 10 times more of them than the combined output of all NATO countries. Next year, we will increase the production by another 25 to 30%.” “Let no one forget about the Kalibr, Kinzhal and Zirkon hypersonic missile systems, which are unmatched around the world in terms of their technical specifications. Their production is also being ramped up and is going at full speed.” Putin also noted the ongoing transition taking place in the U.S. Presidency, and the attempts made on President-elect Donald Trump’s life. “What struck me most,” Putin said, “and I think you share my view, was the fact that entirely uncivilized means were employed against Trump, absolutely uncivilized, including attempts on his life, more than once (incidentally, I believe he is still not entirely safe).” He went on: “There have been various instances in the history of the United States. I believe he [Trump] is a wise and hopefully judicious individual who comprehends all this.” This transition, and the next six weeks, is as unlike any other in American history. The mere fact that thermonuclear war is seen as a real possibility by the majority of American citizens, and that there is no clearly responsible authority in the White House that is accountable to the population, makes this situation completely unique. name: Josh Harder
subject: Post turkey reflections
body:
We can do this

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97912343/514971962/-171021866?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ3MTVlZmUtNDRhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPbRkXQbfC3-4SDtnUYtVLAbRvHD8sq2YYwpnP0DTeU=) | Hi Peter, I was able to take some time over Thanksgiving to finally slow down and do some reflecting. First off, I should have eaten less pie. But that’s not the point of this email. I know the past month has seemed like a bit of a whirlwind post-election. It’s finally sinking in what the world will look like for the next few years. And I’m not here to say it’s going to be easy. It’s going to be hard; some weeks, it’s going to be _really_ hard. But I also know that there are good people ready to fight back - people who believe that we can and must do the work so that our kids see the examples we want them to see. Pam and I are taking a few more days to be with our little ones, but I’m already feeling more energized. My team and I are meeting for a strategy session once we’re back from break and I have a clear message for them: it’s time to shake off our emotions and get our plans ready. **[If you’re like me and feeling re-energized, please consider making an early donation to help us do the tough work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97912345/514971966/-1280984495?refcode=E11660-20241130-Reflections-SL-Other&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ3MTVlZmUtNDRhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JPbRkXQbfC3-4SDtnUYtVLAbRvHD8sq2YYwpnP0DTeU=)** I’m ready! \- Josh
---

But I also know that there are good people ready to fight back - people who believe that we can and must do the work so that our kids see the examples we want them to see. Pam and I are taking a few more days to be with our little ones, but I’m already feeling more energized. My team and I are meeting for a strategy session once we’re back from break and I have a clear message for them: it’s time to shake off our emotions and get our plans ready. = I’m ready! \- Josh *

subject: One small push could get us there
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’re closing the books on November and working out our final cash flow for the year now, and we’re just a few thousand dollars from our goal for the month.
#

Peter — I’ll keep this short, don’t worry!
Hoping you’ve had a restful Thanksgiving and are looking forward to the holidays in December. This will be my daughter Isla’s second Christmas, and I can’t wait.
We’re closing the books on November and working out our final cash flow for the year now, and we’re really close to our overall goal for the month.
Honestly, we’re so close that you could get us over the top.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: A humble request for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97914427/514976623/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWFlM2QxMy00N2FmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic4VlZf3FFbL_k8YX14Z2LJLEbzMumAfg_9PTHU1Hmg=)
Team —
Democrats have a lot to get done before the end of the year before Republicans take control of the government in January.
[**So today, I am humbly requesting that you support my campaign for Congress before our November end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97914432/514976626/2008734706?refcode2=49ae3d13-47af-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&refcode=em241130&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWFlM2QxMy00N2FmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic4VlZf3FFbL_k8YX14Z2LJLEbzMumAfg_9PTHU1Hmg=)
But first, let me explain why your support today is so important.
The next few years are going to be difficult — no doubt. But I am going to do my very best to deliver for working families across the country. That means working across the aisle, having a critical role in Democratic leadership, and proposing legislation that will benefit all.
But in order to keep my focus on the work you elected me to do, I need your unwavering support.
Our campaign is run differently than most in Congress. It’s a people-powered movement, supported by folks like you, not corporate PACs or special interests.
So when I ask you to contribute today, it's truly because every dollar you give powers our movement. And your donation will help me focus on my work in Congress instead of fundraising.
So please, I am requesting:
[**Will you contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to my campaign for Congress before midnight tonight? We need to raise enough money to keep our movement running.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97914436/514976630/2008734706?refcode2=49ae3d13-47af-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&refcode=em241130&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWFlM2QxMy00N2FmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic4VlZf3FFbL_k8YX14Z2LJLEbzMumAfg_9PTHU1Hmg=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97914439/514976633/2008734706?refcode2=49ae3d13-47af-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&refcode=em241130&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWFlM2QxMy00N2FmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic4VlZf3FFbL_k8YX14Z2LJLEbzMumAfg_9PTHU1Hmg=)**
Thank you for your continued support.
Robert
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97914442/514976636/871887451?refcode2=49ae3d13-47af-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&refcode=em241130&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWFlM2QxMy00N2FmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ic4VlZf3FFbL_k8YX14Z2LJLEbzMumAfg_9PTHU1Hmg=)**

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: One last November request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hope you saved room for one more important thing this month...
#
Hey Derek,
We know you're probably still working through those Thanksgiving leftovers (_we know we are_). But we wanted to quickly pop into your inbox because we're facing an important deadline at midnight tonight. ⏰
**Tonight’s our deadline to hit our November fundraising goal, and unfortunately, we're still not quite there.**
We know the timing isn't ideal. You're probably still recovering from holiday travel, Black Friday shopping, or arguing with your Republican uncle at the dinner table.
But keeping PA 🔵 in the years ahead is going to take year-round work, even during the holiday season.
[**Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can before our November deadline at midnight tonight?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241130-1?refcode=em20241130-9643&amount=5&refcode2=9643_434096_YWaXky&akid=9643%2E434096%2EYWaXky)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241130-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241130-9643&refcode2=9643_434096_YWaXky&akid=9643%2E434096%2EYWaXky)**
Your grassroots support is what powers everything we do. Every donation, no matter the size, helps us build the foundation we need to keep PA moving forward.
Thanks for your support — hope you had a great Thanksgiving!
Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241130-9643-footer&t=1&refcode2=9643_434096_YWaXky&akid=9643%2E434096%2EYWaXky)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9643%2E434096%2EYWaXky)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9643%2E434096%2EYWaXky)

body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3a6e6ab50d0c4a41b219a381d1f090e9&_e=geuuSdCZZkSpWtXnKX3_cFmu4woJ6cml8zcbUxQ5rSv5xm8kHOsHOpbvYJsqbmOurTIMALTz9jz05EkmBAfx18VW-RlcljnsXFo5Wdo1HMdSxx9IjYwx40zskjSQz1FXEC9WvrZiaObZLU9h49EJxkvVXdR1vKNGYh9gOTUNx3Hdk3mky7m-lLzj5s4xbkSwE4QchSM0hHp3AbnRwpjbA30uIZTOdVW0REHW0qxKMOSysWNzBOG64kE-_epJOBSwjFK8-T2Hk1WfuWYPYi_i1yRP7v7eua_zQzbopNVLcI96RQRH5I0YxpM6W28jbACMwn4BllQObXTlHM_WGoQcujBtPvyGrcvwsaK7h8h5hcbwVdWtq4zO4_R2N5Gwy2DUrl1fUQNzGVH4mkitvOaOAbek57BdWNfAT45tOZYVqe8%3D)

| | Peter, **A father is STRIPPED of custody of his own child for daring to PROTECT him.** This is NOT justice — _**this is pure, unthinkable evil.**___
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3a6e6ab50d0c4a41b219a381d1f090e9&_e=geuuSdCZZkSpWtXnKX3_cFmu4woJ6cml8zcbUxQ5rSv5xm8kHOsHOpbvYJsqbmOurTIMALTz9jz05EkmBAfx18VW-RlcljnsXFo5Wdo1HMdSxx9IjYwx40zskjSQz1FXEC9WvrZiaObZLU9h49EJxkvVXdR1vKNGYh9gOTUNx3Hdk3mky7m-lLzj5s4xbkSwE4QchSM0hHp3AbnRwpjbA30uIZTOdVW0REHW0qxKMOSysWNzBOG64kE-_epJOBSwSLa2PMvWvVxRIeOLpwCK0D0oyiJBXHikK-mZZTKAuAcMVXTbbflCdDYPuv1baws-weGacFOF2femV8d8qd1TeGbfEkxrJN4oc6O6ORngkwSupfAz-6t9H7VSjE83jiydO7lpvXjciOR4bqGGi4xY412QfitGjFPoH2nL7-_7y20%3D)
---
What we're witnessing is a betrayal of everything we hold sacred. It's nothing short of _**CHILD ABUSE**_. **_A father’s desperate attempt to shield his child from this nightmare results in him being punished. _** The very system meant to protect children is now an instrument of their **destruction**. The chemical castration of a child is an _**irreversible**_ mutilation. This is NOT just wrong. **It is a CRIME against humanity.** We MUST put an end to this horrific practice. _**[It’s time for ACTION, and the judge responsible for this travesty must be held accountable.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3a6e6ab50d0c4a41b219a381d1f090e9&_e=geuuSdCZZkSpWtXnKX3_cFmu4woJ6cml8zcbUxQ5rSv5xm8kHOsHOpbvYJsqbmOurTIMALTz9jz05EkmBAfx18VW-RlcljnsXFo5Wdo1HMdSxx9IjYwx40zskjSQz1FXEC9WvrZiaObZLU9h49EJxkvVXdR1vKNGYh9gOTUNx3Hdk3mky7m-lLzj5s4xbkSwE4QchSM0hHp3AbnRwpjbA30uIZTOdVW0REHW0qxKMOSysWNzBOG64kE-_epJOBSwZwDdvbaDOHU2hOCx7VEYlgQKgMOoxdreRpQoiukDVZLybR6XhcM31x7CfUrbn7nMyGqNxkqgUQzPxGj4ABGio2BtEuLcHYH7Mh6o8M-OTN3n7xh4qNVvdLBw_A4OP_1k6rjNcCIHxnltTbHAmj2A3faS3cKuFpFxKq0JffxYEyU%3D)**_

We must work with _President Trump_ and _JD Vance_ to stop this child abuse. _**[_**Do you stand with us in this fight for justice?**_](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3a6e6ab50d0c4a41b219a381d1f090e9&_e=geuuSdCZZkSpWtXnKX3_cFmu4woJ6cml8zcbUxQ5rSv5xm8kHOsHOpbvYJsqbmOurTIMALTz9jz05EkmBAfx18VW-RlcljnsXFo5Wdo1HMdSxx9IjYwx40zskjSQz1FXEC9WvrZiaObZLU9h49EJxkvVXdR1vKNGYh9gOTUNx3Hdk3mky7m-lLzj5s4xbkSwE4QchSM0hHp3AbnRwpjbA30uIZTOdVW0REHW0qxKMOSysWNzBOG64kE-_epJOBSwx8hzLMYZeHCzaW4buDLAtbK9agD4BoXQoqQKz59fAeNKsrl-ssjDHufR0siDz2rdwPiAllg2ej1-HvzmMtwisdOCk7-Ux8zp5Fy_75yE4Fw15sCW2oXOhY_jeO1c2e4bIEbGk3EW2qUKvk23AbLC0Fssu23Qt7D8QwMvb3XWz1M%3D)**_
---
[**SIGN HERE >>**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3a6e6ab50d0c4a41b219a381d1f090e9&_e=geuuSdCZZkSpWtXnKX3_cFmu4woJ6cml8zcbUxQ5rSv5xm8kHOsHOpbvYJsqbmOurTIMALTz9jz05EkmBAfx18VW-RlcljnsXFo5Wdo1HMdSxx9IjYwx40zskjSQz1FXEC9WvrZiaObZLU9h49EJxkvVXdR1vKNGYh9gOTUNx3Hdk3mky7m-lLzj5s4xbkSwE4QchSM0hHp3AbnRwpjbA30uIZTOdVW0REHW0qxKMOSysWNzBOG64kE-_epJOBSwMSb-yvnDKfaA071jaV_6n2VFZagy_L_q1Fh9E37gtji7NmcsyV_w8NKncitYQNrsiVJpOYFCRILHp0cAQ_i_iEMp9dpPnaDJTpC5395Zv97b7Smg1GWX4xKONLwyYqcHMC53as_vde7sj_VBOqbYW1-sCAmxSQjn8YomkJbR3Aw%3D)

We CANNOT let this stand. This is a call to _**DEFEND**_ our children and protect their future.

**_[So few people will read this email and even fewer will sign... will you be one of the few??](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=3a6e6ab50d0c4a41b219a381d1f090e9&_e=geuuSdCZZkSpWtXnKX3_cFmu4woJ6cml8zcbUxQ5rSv5xm8kHOsHOpbvYJsqbmOurTIMALTz9jz05EkmBAfx18VW-RlcljnsXFo5Wdo1HMdSxx9IjYwx40zskjSQz1FXEC9WvrZiaObZLU9h49EJxkvVXdR1vKNGYh9gOTUNx3Hdk3mky7m-lLzj5s4xbkSwE4QchSM0hHp3AbnRwpjbA30uIZTOdVW0REHW0qxKMOSysWNzBOG64kE-_epJOBSwncvYQsPX5iAREwtqiLwMZ75nJMxUxX26jksuXSpV2e0m5zDDG-9xFrs-qEIq9COWxaC58CaOjRZsSBkMw1UuiWg8A1PU4IqZbmZT29KWEh7D0FYh7EbjJRLfLeYYpHPvb5LmlZ762eMYHtQdQ6XuYPyXPTfMWSGgQCDGHnCtcFE%3D)_**

subject: They’ve seized all my money

body:
But even so, I will never surrender the fight for freedom and justice.

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/497966903baa536c/?utm_campaign=20241119&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=WAMA&utm_term=vbout]

Friend,

Imagine being asked to give up your home, your car, your credit card,
and your checking account.

Imagine all of your money being seized.

_That’s what the Communist Democrats have done to me._

I am being politically persecuted all because I dared to ask
questions... I dared to speak the TRUTH...

As I continue to fight for my freedom and justice, I need the greatest
legal team in history to win against the Marxist Deep State —
especially since my own law licenses have been _taken away_ from me!

But there’s one thing I want to make clear...

...The media claims that I am “begging” for donations to my Legal
Defense Trust.

_THAT’S A LIE. _

The truth is: when I ask for contributions to my Legal Defense Trust,
I tell Americans NOT to donate if they can’t afford it. But of
course the media and the Democrats will never report that.

And I’ll say it again loud and clear. If you can’t afford to
contribute, please don’t. End of story.

But, if you can, please know that your support could be the key to my
freedom – and not just _my own_ freedom, but the freedom, justice,
and rights of every U.S. citizen.

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND, BECAUSE

subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:
Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.
And we need you to join us.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=941c3ad6b52d45a9b54a5d17e05b9eee&_e=w7cBR9UcoOTsxjLXf-FBh3qfn6yAiSzbFfpPn2XyEM2BfkFsccxUDMfrIROesDwQN02xu_SNTdy6nnhSBN9DLX1QrE91d7zWm95NhaGtOL9XSaaoomc-J4lAftT26liOm2u_CYLM4O5cu5-F2CH6nQVH9d5-kD8-b0FDrgkK3iYuHy985dalJsNTTY2E6CQuC4ZHifMifv4Et5Sabe5Cat8SzcNMBW2RhER1Ka8omMMkDr_vGy3V0DxhSu4i8h5WcQ-7gs1kTwI8O1iyklNpZGBNdvly7JEwg2aUHxB2gf9HKgU1A6DRECnvoXsP-M121JjpoavETJ_gNi5uIDjYoMiZXT901hYhBkgoWnJ_VEtFIkHMDoaBUSuKZ87hnDhZ)

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: Patti Reilly
subject: My police officer son is going to prison
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Fellow American,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=68e02f7c08f64478965d0614d742cced&_e=SaBKnVuIKHqUAj4MhpB1CNaWSsO4AFgXXkwp7rmli4fq-8xBc9F4oQ8hrec32U6TdFsUh9UkIPIXvO9SZMb3wAzXI7mpkBOVdLt2t7G9wPZNXrinvmnPdI3l7Kvz-9Z4dTChnuzpT9DH4xh9AE-s96otwvsVd-RSw_vg2vAYk4qB-FV8cc9qdnrkO_9fbX1BIlFYu-IK1YeaqNoacgWjhkjXOcZBJhs8_OXL_6MDjgaV3KCrttL6JfJ3cd2UbwfHy1UytGptcwB16E5-0g2-6t8fkDtVzE8HJzwN7fm_v1wwwSC_tLZwhtK9y2p4wh1UNTDDNi02GO5nFjU-DK8n8Q-USz5WopWb6u6v82Cds4nUpHA3CBLe1Px_cAUAYa_x2hWxm0dPvgt8TuX5jYcSBw%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=68e02f7c08f64478965d0614d742cced&_e=SaBKnVuIKHqUAj4MhpB1CNaWSsO4AFgXXkwp7rmli4fq-8xBc9F4oQ8hrec32U6TdFsUh9UkIPIXvO9SZMb3wAzXI7mpkBOVdLt2t7G9wPZNXrinvmnPdI3l7Kvz-9Z4dTChnuzpT9DH4xh9AE-s96otwvsVd-RSw_vg2vAYk4qB-FV8cc9qdnrkO_9fbX1BIlFYu-IK1YeaqNoacgWjhkjXOcZBJhs8_OXL_6MDjgZp0aAXV-U3t01QOP_kfEXKLBGPDb2-0z0_OcoSxZIKwEcx2oJG4y_NMajVkYdYAmxtajxvqHWRYpQ4tYhAHRO0xGpR0-jGzSAxRYwutzivGdicstIkt-KK4IjcfX-IjQg4b84tyYe9qhHLpOgSSi5l4c6uGkQkq30-s1XIWdKKcQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=68e02f7c08f64478965d0614d742cced&_e=SaBKnVuIKHqUAj4MhpB1CNaWSsO4AFgXXkwp7rmli4fq-8xBc9F4oQ8hrec32U6TdFsUh9UkIPIXvO9SZMb3wAzXI7mpkBOVdLt2t7G9wPZNXrinvmnPdI3l7Kvz-9Z4dTChnuzpT9DH4xh9AE-s96otwvsVd-RSw_vg2vAYk4qB-FV8cc9qdnrkO_9fbX1BIlFYu-IK1YeaqNoacgWjhkjXOcZBJhs8_OXL_6MDjgYWuLVTox9zXsaTV-6OU167B3etyJe1ve4d8ybuq7Ghiwix_BDr0Z9iOJTcOx23GGSw7w82Tm-JUMfQGlA1k8k74RINJiBxEw8e9TK53FKfszz3zh1qsXdx3ssGVQmKPhgIgeRBWRsCUlMpFD0O9taFVGqffMPMY5P2Uu6rlxQojw%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=68e02f7c08f64478965d0614d742cced&_e=SaBKnVuIKHqUAj4MhpB1CNaWSsO4AFgXXkwp7rmli4fq-8xBc9F4oQ8hrec32U6TdFsUh9UkIPIXvO9SZMb3wAzXI7mpkBOVdLt2t7G9wPZNXrinvmnPdI3l7Kvz-9Z4dTChnuzpT9DH4xh9AE-s96otwvsVd-RSw_vg2vAYk4qB-FV8cc9qdnrkO_9fbX1BIlFYu-IK1YeaqNoacgWjhkjXOcZBJhs8_OXL_6MDjgY4e0AFMjijyf9aZtghqfazR9ezFAjCWh51lxBIuP6ztQFP--9V2G9uwsRgjWNx47p2bD-A0tc1M_JiqN7B25fDyC17OXP4mY5AEYZ-_LcskvQ0c4of0Rb-ARUksLY5yfuRsUqHkapXU5RTHFirJzBeQco1gKpxauRSe74k_tMGpA%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=68e02f7c08f64478965d0614d742cced&_e=SaBKnVuIKHqUAj4MhpB1CNaWSsO4AFgXXkwp7rmli4fq-8xBc9F4oQ8hrec32U6TdFsUh9UkIPIXvO9SZMb3wAzXI7mpkBOVdLt2t7G9wPZNXrinvmnPdI3l7Kvz-9Z4dTChnuzpT9DH4xh9AE-s96otwvsVd-RSw_vg2vAYk4qB-FV8cc9qdnrkO_9fbX1BIlFYu-IK1YeaqNoacgWjhkjXOcZBJhs8_OXL_6MDjgaXV0QrUcJgYtK9JeXCqZlizsC8O5QEG-Rlx97Vx9scefD6vMshK7BCP5oACBw8GW3K1QkKbM4yXwweMx4gaAVB5Rt8mdvkmHORaA1IlnPPctfFr8AHp999S0-88D-T8ihMvzyyy-XXdRrQFP1CADUffZ8nY8xwgw6ytFzchmmvQg%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=68e02f7c08f64478965d0614d742cced&_e=SaBKnVuIKHqUAj4MhpB1CNaWSsO4AFgXXkwp7rmli4fq-8xBc9F4oQ8hrec32U6TdFsUh9UkIPIXvO9SZMb3wAzXI7mpkBOVdLt2t7G9wPZNXrinvmnPdI3l7Kvz-9Z4dTChnuzpT9DH4xh9AE-s96otwvsVd-RSw_vg2vAYk4qB-FV8cc9qdnrkO_9fbX1BIlFYu-IK1YeaqNoacgWjhkjXOcZBJhs8_OXL_6MDjgbEaeQ2xLTWMryTHo9C8oSL0N9tt0CpQJYof3O_6jEnNlL8DFXDykScA5emiGSb-it3dJQAO04Jnsi0VfxdLSyRrdCU1gfdpUGGI03C-hRVR6TqKmqQv0KVCMbgDj7Uxeoi_hz6yQGmh2wtbH7Xx2ig4-Wa0aVUHnXJhSG19hFoDw%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=68e02f7c08f64478965d0614d742cced&_e=SaBKnVuIKHqUAj4MhpB1CCZj3xU3k2Lgb4vNq5QB2_xTtaFlN6z9v2nXJGVF8kCwqmFeSpNPcZpr7uLIKlp8hwa1l7NfVkBL92gGmmdyjaMCKnopaGyrKoVO-uwCjYuFvQzILVS_3epMOiSj0Dd9TEWk600JQKQ39gx3x9bIOrrizIhptCWlcGTdtV7EgR_35ArP8x3-1Xi_LIkVlsV7Bg%3D%3D)
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Click here to [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=68e02f7c08f64478965d0614d742cced&_t=AsM5F3WT1Lwp2AiDgTyECWInkj4_40-KDqW2CB0rob9Mnr-0fCOB15apa5CVWjPyVQUBJdPlWVAQfYLVdG0bhZgZ0ge92XsGad60nDFYto-dC5RlQcF4kvuZEr9mf_yS)

name: David Hogg
subject: Major strides
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
The possibilities are limitless – but we can only get there with your help.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20241130-1&t=1&akid=1479%2E587540%2EYYkNEL)
Peter, I'll try to keep this brief. If you're like me, you're laying low this weekend, recovering from the impossible amounts of food you ate at Thanksgiving dinner.
We’re down to the final day of the month – and holiday weekend or not, we’ve got to reach our November fundraising goal before the deadline tonight at midnight.
Thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we made major strides this year. We just elected six young progressives in this election and we aren’t stopping there.
We’ve got plans to expand our reach and make an impact in 2025, 2026, and beyond. The possibilities are limitless – but we can only get there with your help.
**[If you're feeling generous, your gift of $5 or more right now will make a big difference in our ability to reach our $10,000 goal before the clock runs out.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20241130-1?refcode=em20241130-1479&amount=5&refcode2=1479_587540_YYkNEL&akid=1479%2E587540%2EYYkNEL)**

I am grateful that you’re in the fight with us, Peter.
Thank you!!
David Hogg

name: Stop Dr. Oz via Our Revolution
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Stop Oz and Trump from destroying Medicare, slashing Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Trump
claimed he didn’t want to cut Social Security and Medicare. We don’t
believe him for a second. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20593?source=email-20241130&t=1011&akid=7330%2E5885482%2EajUFyi ]Add your name to fight back and resist
Trump’s disastrous cuts >>

Here’s the reality: Trump only said that during the campaign because
Social Security and Medicare are extremely popular. But now he’s
appointing Elon Musk to slash the federal budget and create “hardship” for
people. He’s appointing Dr. Oz to lead the agency in charge of Medicare,
and the slimy TV show doctor wants to destroy Medicare as we know it. And
he’s appointing Project 2025 leaders to powerful White House roles.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20593?source=email-20241130&t=1012&akid=7330%2E5885482%2EajUFyi ][IMG]

It is critical that we organize and resist devastating cuts to our most
important social safety net programs. Bernie’s buckling up for the fight
and he needs us with him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20593?source=email-20241130&t=1013&akid=7330%2E5885482%2EajUFyi ]Add your name: Urge Congress to protect Social Security and Medicare
from Trump’s efforts to destroy the social safety net!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20593?source=email-20241130&t=1014&akid=7330%2E5885482%2EajUFyi ]ADD YOUR NAME

A government of Trump, Musk, Oz, and Project 2025 is a government ready to
destroy social services in America — to take away benefits for seniors, to
privatize Medicare so people suffer and insurance corporations profit, to
do everything they can to make America more corporate and less humane.

These are the dangerous figures of the next four years, paired with an
extreme, corrupt, right-wing Supreme Court. Elon Musk even said he wanted
to “defund” Planned Parenthood.

We must be ready to fight to protect critical government services and
taxpayer funded social programs under Trump.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20593?source=email-20241130&t=1015&akid=7330%2E5885482%2EajUFyi ]Speak up now. Tell Congress to protect Medicare, Social Security, and
other critical programs from Trump cuts.

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

»](https://click.everyaction.com/k/97915481/514978670/1380001219?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJhZjM3MWE0LTRiYWYtZWYxMS04OGNmLTYwNDViZGZlOGQyOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F7wjbagT1r7BbkQz2um1HZENdcV6-shEl6XZj552Suo=&emci=b0bb159b-4aaf-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&emdi=baf371a4-4baf-ef11-88cf-6045bdfe8d29&ceid=15125741) Among the many changes the committee will consider are expanding the size of the House, forming independent redistricting committees, and replacing the winner-take-all electoral system with proportional representation. **As Marie Gluesenkamp Perez said, “These structural problems won’t be solved with inside-the-box thinking or by defending the status quo.”** [_**This legislation has the name: Jeff Bradford
subject: Hope for moms in Chicago
body:
As someone who sees through the lies of the pro-abortion industry, I want to take a moment to share a little bit about a momentous opportunity. | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=21bc0e3ad93e49378fea9d27df92a461&_t=Oht89Ec6RuadaiWtgh5z6zRUgZku90nKRYRLvh8ElCxbJxVM0fafNDgGlWuw7ZFvt8JvexgDs9cvBn3nPcysnWFKh_OktiranDXkg555g3WTz6xc7YNvN5VM3zcmwd1A)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=21bc0e3ad93e49378fea9d27df92a461&_e=byhJw4NVU6tcBRUdjZwowIzJcEUq8B7B90ix6gli4323RWB39hY2sINUIfavip7PFVRDWPRS0fZic_OfaY3rHczSoMSc1rAOsWVDG-NuvrYpAJYxRRaocwsdKUMdGNIBGr2FHjv4ibmJW3z_mF59SdhuTX0XNBC6YR1BELUe8p4K1JpnK5c-9XN7_2jRFqeFtWklJQDKCHvwh1rvWWu_doD4D0aKJlaMBztdq2sTbFHRbyjBgRryeQ3P0rzfhyzZ_JUSrpvbrSPqIjaRkb0BeKET1-_O9LpBum5UdOwX8aGghLeMu2lQgECsg4a22nMA1Ro2iU7e5igE_j_g_K9iIX-tmhALzlcdzXLfX4ULxiuhoOxzqM34xw0YsQnCip_L)
Dear friend,

As someone who sees through the lies of the pro-abortion industry, I want to take a moment to share a little bit about a momentous opportunity. Today you can make a lifesaving difference in the lives of moms and preborn babies in one of the nation's biggest cities: Chicago.

Why Chicago? Well... it's one of the most dangerous cities in America for preborn children. Powerful organizations like Planned Parenthood saturate the media with messages that advocate for ending their lives. These messages create a cloud of spiritual darkness over the city for moms facing unexpected pregnancies. But together, you and I can pierce through that darkness with a message of hope, support, and life.

At Human Coalition, we have a comprehensive strategy for 2025 that will ensure that more Chicagoland babies are saved from abortion, but we can't implement it without you.

**Specifically, I am looking for 27 people to contribute $52 today to help fund our telecare clinic in Chicago.** This allows us to offer critical counseling and resources to moms actively seeking an abortion. It also supports our online advertising that reaches these moms, enabling us to compete directly with the Goliath-sized organizations that promote killing preborn children.

Can you help us with this goal today?

**My team knows from speaking to moms seeking abortions every day that _76% of them would prefer to choose life if their situations were different._** Pregnant moms considering an abortion often lack the support system they need like reliable transportation, adequate housing, consistent work, or a supportive community of friends and family. With your help, I know that we can offer the help and resources they need to navigate these challenges and empower them to choose life for their babies.

By contributing today, you will not only help us close this gap of support but your gift will also be matched dollar-for-dollar, saving TWICE as many babies in Chicago from abortion.

So, will you make your generous donation now and help us bring hope and life to those who need it most in Chicago? clean_body: As someone who sees through the lies of the pro-abortion industry, I want to take a moment to share a little bit about a momentous opportunity. | | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Dear friend, As someone who sees through the lies of the pro-abortion industry, I want to take a moment to share a little bit about a momentous opportunity. Today you can make a lifesaving difference in the lives of moms and preborn babies in one of the nation's biggest cities: Chicago. Why Chicago? Well... it's one of the most dangerous cities in America for preborn children. Powerful organizations like Planned Parenthood saturate the media with messages that advocate for ending their lives. These messages create a cloud of spiritual darkness over the city for moms facing unexpected pregnancies. But together, you and I can pierce through that darkness with a message of hope, support, and life. At Human Coalition, we have a comprehensive strategy for 2025 that will ensure that more Chicagoland babies are saved from abortion, but we can't implement it without you. Specifically, I am looking for 27 people to contribute $52 today to help fund our telecare clinic in Chicago. This allows us to offer critical counseling and resources to moms actively seeking an abortion. It also supports our online advertising that reaches these moms, enabling us to compete directly with the Goliath-sized organizations that promote killing preborn children. Can you help us with this goal today? My team knows from speaking to moms seeking abortions every day that 76% of them would prefer to choose life if their situations were different. Pregnant moms considering an abortion often lack the support system they need like reliable transportation, adequate housing, consistent work, or a supportive community of friends and family. With your help, I know that we can offer the help and resources they need to navigate these challenges and empower them to choose life for their babies. By contributing today, you will not only help us close this gap of support but your gift will also be matched dollar-for-dollar, saving TWICE as many babies in Chicago from abortion. So, will you make your generous donation now and help us bring hope and life to those who need it most in Chicago? Together, let's stand in the gap for the next mom facing an unexpected pregnancy and seeking an abortion in the Chicago area. Let's make sure she hears the truth that she can choose life and has a coalition of support behind her, to help her do it! Thank you for being a beacon of hope and love today, Jeff Bradford President Human Coalition * P.O. Box 5347, Frisco, Texas 75035-9920, USA .

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The 8th circuit's ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
AP: Federal appeals court deals a blow to Voting Rights Act, ruling that private plaintiffs can’t sue [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=113024_1&amount=25]
Folks,
We're still assessing the consequences of this election, but this ruling by the federal 8th Circuit stands out like a sore thumb. It's one of the most dangerous anti-voter rulings we’ve seen in years .
If you missed the details, the impact is pretty simple to understand: In the eight states impacted by the ruling, voters and voting rights organizations can no longer sue to overturn unjust laws under the Voting Rights Act. According to the 8th Circuit, only the Department of Justice (DoJ) has the legal standing to sue states over voting laws.
Whether the nomination for former Congressman Matt Gaetz goes through for Attorney General or we get stuck with another anti-voting MAGA acolyte, do any of us really think that the DOJ is going to protect voting rights over the next four years?
Team, we have to fight this ruling and make sure voters and advocacy groups have the right to defend voting rights in court. Please pitch in $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count, either at the ballot box or in court >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=113024_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=113024_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=113024_1&amount=35]
This is all about the legal term "private right of action". The 8th Circuit says it doesn't exist. That means the pro-voting lawsuits we've seen in states like Wisconsin, Georgia, Florida, and others nationwide wouldn't be possible anymore if the Supreme Court backs up this ruling.
We won’t sugarcoat this: This could be a crushing blow to many voting rights organizations across the country, ourselves included. If this ruling is not overturned by a higher court, it could unravel all of the great work pro-voting organizations are doing across the country — and allow dozens of unjust, unconstitutional voter restrictions to stand.
Attacks like this on what remains of the Voting Rights Act are going to get worse over the next few years. As voter suppression laws become increasingly targeted and oppressive , our work to combat them must become smarter, stronger, and more accessible to everyone.
We can't do this alone. Help defend our right to vote with $25 or however much you can today and make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=113024_1&amount=25]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=113024_1&amount=25]

Portland, OR 97280

name: Kristen Waggoner
subject: Could you be next?
body:
Imagine, for a moment, a society where expressing your faith is met with threats, fines, or even court cases? | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=ca1357c97d5d41c3963490b203665d2e&_t=HI8llQBXGITrnWiLZfV-9xzQ2J0i5qPJBFyEtizl-PQeIc0u7ToiEoC2ngiOEvOI4TVYrHAH9FTTpJV8OrkpuBwmjMsmm59fWyu1CeVO0tfUbz6mvmVM8HCyQH3y1Nzn)_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ca1357c97d5d41c3963490b203665d2e&_e=FyBC5qb8ZLxLjS6E0mA-Fp7N-Mj5KmZkybVKKKEuFXm7_82l1A_zI3oYFofumRUnLge7md1oQGhkBtae6MBG_wrFwKemjoLKznAcgNumobc6tSmUD0HfCtBzERnagfpCGss2NXFaxX-_wPswEBjZi3CVYqSncqKbZE9ITLR4EHYx8XJ0X4v78mNB_CKuvW_Opl_QRO6OqJOCVZnsi46ugBwQzvNMwhA_2ZK7yYcPzVjQ8arLGIXkMaCY5wTfa0TQu-PXRwrMGHiVrUyRkmccf_opYuiwYHhcAMIrNphpuKUm6_PxUyxmfMPhUB1ZE711ImKfDr5P_qRdovWjoI2IP_CuMi-dJhG2LunFUzKH9HqpONDDN4VbokH-5ez9hvMfFDCyI_1cC_nce5RwiIoaGg%3D%3D)
Dear Fellow American, Imagine, for a moment, a society where expressing your faith is met with threats, fines, or even court cases?

Sounds far-fetched, doesn't it?

Well, it's happened with...

Jack Phillips, owner of Masterpiece Cakeshop. He was first sued for declining to create a custom cake celebrating a same-sex wedding because it violated his religious beliefs.

Bethel Christian Academy. The state government revoked a church-run school's eligibility to participate in a voucher program to benefit low-income students and demanded the school pay back thousands of dollars for previous participation in the program because of the school's beliefs about marriage and sexuality.

Yakima Union Gospel Mission. Washington law prohibits the Mission from hiring only those employees who share and live out the Mission's Christian beliefs.

Government officials are jeopardizing your religious liberties. In more and more settings, Christians and other citizens are fired, publicly shamed, and even sued for their faith.

It's no wonder we receive thousands of legal requests each year, including from many individuals who say the government is threatening their freedoms, like the right to exercise their religious beliefs.

We would like to know if you're concerned about the future of religious freedom in the United States.

Will you take the **National Survey on Religious Freedom in America?**

[By participating in our survey, you're taking a step to ensure your voice and the voices of countless others get heard loud and clear.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=ca1357c97d5d41c3963490b203665d2e&_e=FyBC5qb8ZLxLjS6E0mA-Fp7N-Mj5KmZkybVKKKEuFXm7_82l1A_zI3oYFofumRUnLge7md1oQGhkBtae6MBG_wrFwKemjoLKznAcgNumobc6tSmUD0HfCtBzERnagfpCGss2NXFaxX-_wPswEBjZi3CVYqSncqKbZE9ITLR4EHYx8XJ0X4v78mNB_CKuvW_Opl_QRO6OqJOCVZnsi46ugBwQzvNMwhA_2ZK7yYcPzVhv_CnVaqeU33X6BnpJRS0d-73wmBnxOTp79-rK2ogLB7y9F1DMQTJJ1gmEUzuuCD42AeXXHxQwkIZyEHRlrsP5SueT1X1HY5l6kbGXu6GHv_UnWpiHwNycqnDqIi91H345yEQ1baMNp0uU5hBytCW1v6bOTC_FPFxrKeezkMmPqQ%3D%3D)

Share your views and make a difference in protecting the religious liberties that define us by clicking this link: clean_body: Imagine, for a moment, a society where expressing your faith is met with threats, fines, or even court cases? | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | Dear Fellow American, Imagine, for a moment, a society where expressing your faith is met with threats, fines, or even court cases? Sounds far-fetched, doesn't it? Well, it's happened with... Jack Phillips, owner of Masterpiece Cakeshop. He was first sued for declining to create a custom cake celebrating a same-sex wedding because it violated his religious beliefs. Bethel Christian Academy. The state government revoked a church-run school's eligibility to participate in a voucher program to benefit low-income students and demanded the school pay back thousands of dollars for previous participation in the program because of the school's beliefs about marriage and sexuality. Yakima Union Gospel Mission. Washington law prohibits the Mission from hiring only those employees who share and live out the Mission's Christian beliefs. Government officials are jeopardizing your religious liberties. In more and more settings, Christians and other citizens are fired, publicly shamed, and even sued for their faith. It's no wonder we receive thousands of legal requests each year, including from many individuals who say the government is threatening their freedoms, like the right to exercise their religious beliefs. We would like to know if you're concerned about the future of religious freedom in the United States. Will you take the National Survey on Religious Freedom in America? Share your views and make a difference in protecting the religious liberties that define us by clicking this link: Kristen Waggoner CEO, President & General Counsel P.S. Help us stand up to excessive government overreach and let us know where you stand when it comes to your freedom of religion. Start the National Survey on Religious Freedom in America now » Alliance Defending Freedom 15100 N. 90th Street, Scottsdale, Arizona 85260

name: Team Schiff
subject: What you told us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8202%2E5257348%2E4a5YAm)
Derek,
Last week, Adam and our team reached out to ask you to share your top priorities.
Nothing is more important than delivering for the people of California, which is why Adam wants to prioritize the issues that matter most to you and your family.
Many of you shared the importance of addressing economic concerns and the challenges facing working families. So many others shared their views that protecting our democracy and restoring trust in the Supreme Court are among the top concerns.
One person expressed “ _**I’m very worried that Trump will do a lot of damage to our country”_** and “ _**we have an unethical majority in the Supreme Court — that is very chilling.”**_
Adam couldn’t agree more, and he’s ready to stand up for the rule of law and ensure our institutions reflect our democratic values of fairness and justice.
People also shared concerns about the climate crisis, affordable housing, and reproductive freedoms.
One person responded: “** _As an older American, I’m concerned about protecting Social Security and Medicare...as a woman, I’m concerned about the future of my nieces and their right to reproductive choice._** ”
Adam shares these concerns and is committed to fighting for these important programs and freedoms — especially under the threat of a second Trump Administration.
He’s going to work across the aisle to get things done for California and the country.
He’s going to stand up to any presidential abuses of power.
**And he’s not going to be intimidated by Donald Trump.**
One thing’s for sure, Adam will need you by his side to take on the tough fights ahead. While many people expressed fear, anger, and sadness in the election results, so many of you also feel compelled to take action and make a difference for our country. That’s the energy we need right now.
Thanks for having his back and being in this fight with him and all of us.
Schiff HQ

name: Powered By People
subject: Our commitment
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
As we approach the end of the year, we want to reaffirm our commitment to you and to Texas.
Unlike some PACs that go dormant in off-years, Powered by People remains active in the off-year, fighting tirelessly for a better Texas for all.
With Trump returning to the White House next year, we know our work is cut out for us. But we're not backing down. We're doubling down.
We're preparing for the challenges ahead, but we need your help. Your support now will enable us to continue our organizing efforts and amplify progressive voices in every corner of our state.
[**Will you stand with us? Your contribution today will fuel our fight for a better Texas, no matter what comes our way. Whether it's $5, $10, or whatever you can spare, every bit helps us go the extra mile.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241130.1i_5f3&refcode=ema20241130-239906&t=1&akid=239906%2E444211%2EwJdq56)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241130.1i_5f3&refcode=ema20241130-239906&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=239906%2E444211%2EwJdq56)**
Together, we've proven that Texans don't quit when the going gets tough. We're in this for the long haul, and with your support, we'll continue to make progress, even in the face of adversity.
Thank you for standing with us in our fight for a better Texas,
Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20241130-239906-footer&t=21&refcode2=239906_444211_wJdq56&akid=239906%2E444211%2EwJdq56)**

http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpaem5iukg3vvt5rngi0mcdt5n34cda850ge7nmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj6c1i6co34c9h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9gmf934cuh69pt2elr7ct5k6mj73d1lmpqqatliegqb7d5k6eqqactl69rj9td769qb2dd4meqq4t9hegor9d1heirr7dd36up7b8dnmerjb8jk6erjadd5mir7ct5hmkqqatjl6uh2bs

Russia launched a massive drone attack targeting Ukrainian energy

name: Sarah McBride
subject: I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people.
Hi Peter, it’s Sarah McBride.
**I didn’t run for Congress to talk about which bathroom I use.** I ran to advocate for the people who are facing life’s biggest challenges and those who love them.
**People like my husband, Andy.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84418?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf)
When Andy was diagnosed with cancer just one year into our relationship, I became his primary caregiver — with him through the ups and the downs, making sure that he had everything he needed, and in the end, holding his hand as he passed away.
I know how difficult it is to balance a full-time job with taking care of someone I love because I lived it. Being a caregiver is the most important role I’ve ever had. In many ways, we were lucky.
Paid leave allowed him to focus on the full-time job of getting care. And my employer’s flexibility allowed me to be there by his side to care for him.
Through our struggle, and sharing with others, I came across so many other families who simply didn’t have that same benefit. Patients who were forced to choose between their job and their health care. Parents going back to work days after giving birth. Family members who had to choose between their paycheck and their loved one’s needs.
My experience with Andy anchored so much of my work as a state senator in Delaware — from getting paid leave passed to expanding healthcare in rural communities.
But there is so much more our government must do to support people when hard times hit and to do something about the very real pain so many feel across our country.
That’s why I ran for Congress, and that’s what you can count on me to fight for in Washington — and I won’t get distracted by the people who are trying to divide our country with their agenda of hate.
**[I know with your help, we can overcome the challenges in front of us and deliver for working people. If you’re with me, please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Lucas Kunce today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84418?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84419?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84419?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84419?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84419?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84419?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84419?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/84418?refcode=em20241130-8684&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8684%2E614464%2EhzjYbf)

Sarah McBride
Delaware’s Congresswoman-elect

Peter, while this year’s election didn’t go how we wanted at the top of the ticket, we made major strides at the local level here in the Peach State. All of our incumbent Democratic State Senators won re-election! And while Republicans now have a trifecta of control in the White House, Senate, and House, our Democratic leaders at the state level will be critical in our fight forward. They’ll be at the frontlines in defending our fundamental rights and staving off MAGA extremist attacks. That’s why we’re circulating this card to congratulate our Democratic State Senators on their victories this year. clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, while this year’s election didn’t go how we wanted at the top of the ticket, we made major strides at the local level here in the Peach State. All of our incumbent Democratic State Senators won re-election! And while Republicans now have a trifecta of control in the White House, Senate, and House, our Democratic leaders at the state level will be critical in our fight forward. They’ll be at the frontlines in defending our fundamental rights and staving off MAGA extremist attacks. That’s why we’re circulating this card to congratulate our Democratic State Senators on their victories this year. | | — Georgia HQ | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. The Democratic Party of Georgia works year-round to elect Democrats who share our values of a strong middle class, integrity in government, and equality and justice for all Georgians. If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts, please = | = | Georgia Democrats have a long history of fighting for change. It's never been more important for every one of us to use our voices to speak up and be heard. But we rely on grassroots support to fuel our fight. Without you, we’re nothing.
