name: Natalie Jones
subject: We can't let the Grinch steal Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://freedomva.org/ [https://freedomva.org/]
Issues of affordability are our bread and butter here at Freedom Virginia, and now that we’ve officially entered the holiday season, they’re especially important. This time of year can hit hard-working Virginians more than they’d expect because of surprise hidden fees.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/Chappel%20Roan.png]
Studies have shown [https://www.whitehouse.gov/wp-content/uploads/2023/03/WH-Junk-Fees-Guide-for-States.pdf] that consumers faced with hidden fees can pay upward of twenty percent more than they would have had the actual price been disclosed upfront. Hardworking people across the country are struggling to keep more of what they earn, and it’s no different here in Virginia. Consumers deserve to know the price of an item they’re buying upfront to make the most informed decision when they spend their hard-earned money.
https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/642309/ [https://www.mobilize.us/freedomva/event/642309/]
We can’t let the Grinch steal Christmas. Big corporations need to be held accountable for deceptive practices. That’s why we’re fighting for truth in pricing, to make sure Virginians know the total cost of an item before going to check out by the next holiday season!
Natalie Jones
Communications Manager
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva] https://www.linkedin.com/company/freedom-virginia [https://www.linkedin.com/company/freedom-virginia]

Norfolk, VA 23513

name: River Gassen
subject: Thank You for Believing in Our Future
body:
Grateful for You, Ready for What’s Next | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/riverforcolorado/15daysremaining-8331171?e=3818d77efc)
---
| | | | |
# Thank you all so dearly for your support! Now let’s move forward.
---
| To my supporters,

First, I want to say how much I appreciate everyone’s grace and patience, as I took some time for myself to unwind from my campaign - and it’s taken me some time to recharge and restart back into campaign mode. Everyone worked so furiously to get us here and I could not have done it without you.

As I reflect on this past campaign, my heart is filled with gratitude for every one of you who stood beside me. To my incredible team, my loving partner, our dedicated volunteers, and all of you who made calls, sent texts, and knocked on countless doors—thank you. Your passion and resilience carried this campaign forward, and I am so proud of what we accomplished together.While we didn’t achieve the outcome we hoped for, we made history. With your support, we earned the highest margins ever for a Democrat in our district. This is not the end of our fight; it’s just the beginning.

This campaign faced its share of challenges—limited resources, time, and funding—but we pushed forward. Together, we proved that determination and community can move mountains. From the experience I’ve gained to the connections we’ve built, I know a win is on the horizon.

The morning after the election, I called Representative-Elect Crank to congratulate him on his victory and secured his commitment to future debates. While we may not see eye to eye on policy, I will continue to hold him accountable to the people of Colorado’s 5th Congressional District.
Looking ahead to 2026, I hope I have earned your continued support. Our movement is growing stronger, fueled by the hope and passion of people like you who believe in a brighter future for our district.

So, let’s keep moving forward. Don’t ever stop working to strengthen our community. Don’t hesitate to take up space in the place you call home, to lead with pride and purpose. Together, we will continue to fight for freedom, equity, and opportunity for all.

The fight is not over—for as long as we the people demand freedom, our democracy will endure. Let’s build on this momentum and create the future our district deserves.

That is why today, I am proud to formally announce my candidacy for Colorado’s 5th Congressional District as we launch our 2026 campaign

In solidarity and gratitude,
River Gassen
Democratic Candidate for Colorado’s 5th Congressional District, 2026

---
[Donate Now](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=a408743b40&e=3818d77efc)

body:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-nov24?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-nov24?amount=]Peter, did you see our email from yesterday? Our FIRST end-of-month deadline since the election is tonight at midnight, and we’re not even close to reaching our goal.

Please, can you chip in $ right now to help us reach our $2.5k goal and fight back against the MAGA extremist agenda in 2025 and beyond? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-fr-nov24?amount=]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Check out our full email below. Thanks, Peter!

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Texas Organizing Project PAC
Date: Fri, November 29, 2024
Subject: Before November comes to an end...

Peter, we’re ready to get back to work to fight back against MAGA extremism in 2025 and beyond... but we need to lay the groundwork first.

ICYMI: Texas Republicans are already hard at work to attack our fundamental rights and push their extremist agenda. From admitting to their support of Project 2025 to restricting abortion pills, it’s clear they could care less about the people they serve.

While they work day and night to strip us of our fundamental rights, we’re building a plan to help push our state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of everyday Texans — regardless of age, race, gender, or ZIP Code.

But we’ll be honest: we wouldn’t be able to do this work without grassroots folks like you. That’s why we had to reach out before November came to an end.

Our FIRST end-of-month fundraising deadline since the election ends tomorrow at midnight, and we need to reach our $2,500 goal to keep our momentum going.

name: Kristen Waggoner
subject: Could you be next?
body:
Imagine, for a moment, a society where expressing your faith is met with threats, fines, or even court cases? | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=8399383511b8429cab6c40616f7742ab&_t=-0IrQKZn5K5PHTWCu4gexU4vSqDpfRVgRmxSkTmVU2S9ruK5ym9CLS1qLAwsNHj-Iz9N6MrNIhAtEfq_E5Uii501NO5fpYDaQrscsjJCpATP1nv4fmEZQiGLmExtyDhV)_

| | | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=8399383511b8429cab6c40616f7742ab&_e=bS9lTSmnMq2uqJb5Ej0Nj88UVvkZ3ytNDn_NNFpl_qMS5d87dRWaM56GOeTnU4jzA_fvcoV6-anosehouphCaw4OUkiJBdeFGFy13y1nbNPAcuQmHNsAxCd0QnAL9BieSD2yl9EABjo-K45mErBTxkXZvNKYOawWq-Ss-TE46FqX4ke7nrfOtLQL6i88rPYF9gCzZPs-oqTzTsouX7LJH6xPmeL-kwe35W4gyOx1rngjcWG0_eAPl-Bo76kmB6WJ1-cgnC83hAGu2BrRFZzz9kHT1v2fc5fCfbIkZIeZEzOKM_r4pBzBTNGcXTxbHz8l6Y2k_bovOe0hlnKJA2Kb3whW-zf0XHJyMYuoSffaHxDvqoXpQHBqJUQKg9olv6QmRipf5FV47Guc6UNNzqyj5Q%3D%3D)
Dear Fellow American, Imagine, for a moment, a society where expressing your faith is met with threats, fines, or even court cases?

Sounds far-fetched, doesn't it?

Well, it's happened with...

Jack Phillips, owner of Masterpiece Cakeshop. He was first sued for declining to create a custom cake celebrating a same-sex wedding because it violated his religious beliefs.

Bethel Christian Academy. The state government revoked a church-run school's eligibility to participate in a voucher program to benefit low-income students and demanded the school pay back thousands of dollars for previous participation in the program because of the school's beliefs about marriage and sexuality.

Yakima Union Gospel Mission. Washington law prohibits the Mission from hiring only those employees who share and live out the Mission's Christian beliefs.

Government officials are jeopardizing your religious liberties. In more and more settings, Christians and other citizens are fired, publicly shamed, and even sued for their faith.

It's no wonder we receive thousands of legal requests each year, including from many individuals who say the government is threatening their freedoms, like the right to exercise their religious beliefs.

We would like to know if you're concerned about the future of religious freedom in the United States.

Will you take the **National Survey on Religious Freedom in America?**

[By participating in our survey, you're taking a step to ensure your voice and the voices of countless others get heard loud and clear.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=8399383511b8429cab6c40616f7742ab&_e=bS9lTSmnMq2uqJb5Ej0Nj88UVvkZ3ytNDn_NNFpl_qMS5d87dRWaM56GOeTnU4jzA_fvcoV6-anosehouphCaw4OUkiJBdeFGFy13y1nbNPAcuQmHNsAxCd0QnAL9BieSD2yl9EABjo-K45mErBTxkXZvNKYOawWq-Ss-TE46FqX4ke7nrfOtLQL6i88rPYF9gCzZPs-oqTzTsouX7LJH6xPmeL-kwe35W4gyOx1rngMlEXPH1l9S5w5lzugVOQzVx81KB5bOcT0l7QpmaGF-q6bqMlBBbmfIrN8e2BR4vD_eCO0d_MDSSnwSB3WjFbVGGXtBhiWwVtWXXwXVbHvBasP35BJqDYEVKbOsXhCUep_Sw_22aCpP4xhQrTYTxklxufe_QRtcoW9VNIRBesTIQ%3D%3D)

name: Patti Reilly
subject: Help me save my son
body:
Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be wrongfully convicted of murder – murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.
Dear Peter,

My son, Washington Metro Police Officer Terence Sutton, was just sentenced to 5 1⁄2 years in prison for doing the job he was trained to do.

And though you and I have never met, I’m praying you’ll help me save him.

Here are some photos of Terence as a little boy.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1196123e27354a99bab9fc1f186da05a&_e=zMyDpXcWaev-a6TCBFm1GO6dwlV4rPjypWakgek6z8zjPpe-zwDAVhNLDv4aP4UDuQWqF1pnnyKrJF0gg7EJp-O2MIfI0IHoAsho8rbc1_vrNGLZacaHr93QwHWHvay1K3xqpmTuLCMYXR3xOWNWH2lbESi9wCNShGvoOnMZHbOfjTyCsOjzU48qGvz7GHcgAOFSJYpzeJDNrHRsoZ0rgK0AoPRhLHNDH6N5PdMMwjPpe90UxqLeZI350tUn-Ec0kstCtLtwQ90rqEDK74JN0-rDy8wESeLFZsfZ1Q05U3JOmEgDedmNFKBbbk8_mNQcF-693CQDMroBU_r0pPiH4m8NV7lGG5STD8yJdXscjBFS1OxfpycySVPanY_fQzmGzACHmHhiQ9nwiiFuLlnN0g%3D%3D)
He always dreamed of following in his dad’s footsteps to be a police officer. I also included one of my favorites of us from the night he graduated from the Police Academy.

I was so proud that night.

Never in my wildest imagination could I have predicted that my son would be _wrongfully_ _convicted_ _of_ _murder_ **– murder of a criminal my son didn’t even touch.**

[**_I’m praying you will help me save my son_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1196123e27354a99bab9fc1f186da05a&_e=zMyDpXcWaev-a6TCBFm1GO6dwlV4rPjypWakgek6z8zjPpe-zwDAVhNLDv4aP4UDuQWqF1pnnyKrJF0gg7EJp-O2MIfI0IHoAsho8rbc1_vrNGLZacaHr93QwHWHvay1K3xqpmTuLCMYXR3xOWNWH2lbESi9wCNShGvoOnMZHbOfjTyCsOjzU48qGvz7GHcgAOFSJYpzeJDNrHRsoZ0rgK0AoPRhLHNDH6N5PdMMwjPzLYuYhNRhqraTzSyQ2LIR0ER3pa4aXjRcuvFXUPw9iT_nAvmVkIccwOy9sDGNkzFG5-JixSEVdCKca9Z8uAQ2XLNqsh5AcFBzUm0LeArtGnLnnkh_O_zPT42Bt6ZIvqaNzJujBeV7BFksyu2q7IafpbVzuhCHjArO-AeCaAKZoQ%3D%3D) – **but first, let me explain what happened.** Our nightmare started in October of 2020.

Terence was sitting in his patrol car when he received a report that a known gang member, Karon Hylton-Brown, was seen entering a rival gang’s territory.

Karon was a violent criminal with a rap sheet a mile long – including drugs, illegal gun possession, and assaults. Earlier that day, he was seen arguing with a rival gang member who owed him money. So Terence and other officers were concerned Karon was planning to get revenge.

When Terence saw Karon illegally driving a motorized scooter on the sidewalk without a helmet, he tried to pull him over to talk. Instead, Karon took off on the scooter.

Terence watched as Karon sped through traffic, weaving in and out of cars and blowing past red lights and stop signs.

My son knew Karon was putting others at risk, so for 3 minutes he slowly and carefully followed behind in his patrol car.

Then it happened.

Karon veered into an alleyway, drove out the other side without looking and slammed into a passing car.

After several days in the hospital, Karon died from his injuries. And here’s where the story takes a shocking turn...

Because Karon was black, and the incident happened just four months after George Floyd’s death, the anti-police mob went into frenzy.

They blamed Terence for the accident and smeared him as a racist.

There were protests and even riots. The mob threw rocks at officers, smashed store windows, and set fires.

Anti-police politicians piled on too. Without any evidence, they demanded my son be charged even though he did nothing to cause Karon’s death.

**The pressure campaign worked and prosecutors charged my son with Second-Degree Murder.**

**Terence was convicted in December 2022 and he was finally just sentenced – to 5 1⁄2 years in prison.**

Now you understand why I’m so heartbroken. The injustice is almost too much to bear.

My son was well-respected by the community he served. He trained many Rookies and set a good example for all of them. He was even awarded Officer of the Year!

But unless Terence’s appeal is successful, he’s going to prison – which is why I’m urgently turning to you for help today. The **Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund** (LELDF) has stepped forward to pay for Terence’s defense and is actively raising funds to pay for the appeal.

If you’ve ever heard of LELDF, you know they’re a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Terence for over 30 years. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent cops – and their families – at their lowest moments.

We expect it will cost at least $150,000 to appeal Terence’s conviction.

So I have to ask you one of the toughest questions I’ve ever asked anyone:

[**_Will you help my son Terence fight the unjust charges against him by donating to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1196123e27354a99bab9fc1f186da05a&_e=zMyDpXcWaev-a6TCBFm1GO6dwlV4rPjypWakgek6z8zjPpe-zwDAVhNLDv4aP4UDuQWqF1pnnyKrJF0gg7EJp-O2MIfI0IHoAsho8rbc1_vrNGLZacaHr93QwHWHvay1K3xqpmTuLCMYXR3xOWNWH2lbESi9wCNShGvoOnMZHbOfjTyCsOjzU48qGvz7GHcgAOFSJYpzeJDNrHRsoZ0rgK0AoPRhLHNDH6N5PdMMwjNbnQ-0BWZ8N2nAnptia3pRsCtO0OVXjrSGI9fVCRUXv2OEK8_AvWKNSVPsqdrvEVnKe5dJghxRLoQ9jlNBANKPL57Sz84JYDaUXCv5_HjCBq4bvim4IcajigNNjxXRCPUtD2yNczinZd2xvGMeqi32T0mLddYCG1X3sWw5UcYuIg%3D%3D)

I’m not asking you to donate the entire $150,000 yourself – though it would be a huge weight off our shoulders if you are able to help that way.

[**_But your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, or more will help LELDF fully fund Terence’s appeal over the next 12 months._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1196123e27354a99bab9fc1f186da05a&_e=zMyDpXcWaev-a6TCBFm1GO6dwlV4rPjypWakgek6z8zjPpe-zwDAVhNLDv4aP4UDuQWqF1pnnyKrJF0gg7EJp-O2MIfI0IHoAsho8rbc1_vrNGLZacaHr93QwHWHvay1K3xqpmTuLCMYXR3xOWNWH2lbESi9wCNShGvoOnMZHbOfjTyCsOjzU48qGvz7GHcgAOFSJYpzeJDNrHRsoZ0rgK0AoPRhLHNDH6N5PdMMwjOACaJAyZ79wZlt6uRWU_xB4IlE6RBLbgesz4_c1LrToNAxT0SvdkIPQ3hNIpdinzlrUSm9KXIS_88L0qToW1IMNfYPVfQfVYaLhxoF8u-qL6hE82cJg7Ar05tk2LW8wlXKwHi1ncyE89VVPF7eulfj5IW56hPwOmasctiuGvKVtQ%3D%3D) If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn’t be so bold as to ask for your help.

But I already lost my husband. He was a police officer too, and he was so proud that Terence followed in his footsteps. I simply can’t bear the thought of having another family member ripped away from me.

[**_So if you are at all able, please follow this link to make a tax-deductible donation to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund to help my Terence._**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1196123e27354a99bab9fc1f186da05a&_e=zMyDpXcWaev-a6TCBFm1GO6dwlV4rPjypWakgek6z8zjPpe-zwDAVhNLDv4aP4UDuQWqF1pnnyKrJF0gg7EJp-O2MIfI0IHoAsho8rbc1_vrNGLZacaHr93QwHWHvay1K3xqpmTuLCMYXR3xOWNWH2lbESi9wCNShGvoOnMZHbOfjTyCsOjzU48qGvz7GHcgAOFSJYpzeJDNrHRsoZ0rgK0AoPRhLHNDH6N5PdMMwjP29Hyq-cL33OEeoaH0eN3QE_eC1osCB9B2wiQ9SXyOtmgTMtBvY1ogj06sYjYSAb6ky8j9I9-mmUuRd_tJdJiQ0ibKj3Zy3CDBEqbIf3KaSk6b1nKogd82_lUR8IndTxg7npbaE_gVLUNLdxorsIXMEbdO6vgpDmKKxUCTGIiobw%3D%3D)

**Any amount – $35, $50, $100, or even $500 or more – will help.**

And because LELDF is a non-profit organization, your gift is completely tax-deductible. But whatever you can afford to give, I ask that you rush it back quickly.

Right now, Terence can only rely on the good nature and generosity of kind folks like you.

Thank you for taking the time to read my letter today.

And thank you in advance for helping LELDF support Terence and other wrongly accused officers.

Gratefully,
**Patti Reilly**

P.S. Don’t get me wrong, I’m thankful the judge granted Terence bond so he doesn’t have to report to prison just yet. Hopefully it never comes to that... but to get Terence’s conviction overturned, it’s going to cost at least $150,000 to fund his appeal. [**_Will you please help me save my son by making an urgent tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more to LELDF today?_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1196123e27354a99bab9fc1f186da05a&_e=zMyDpXcWaev-a6TCBFm1GO6dwlV4rPjypWakgek6z8zjPpe-zwDAVhNLDv4aP4UDuQWqF1pnnyKrJF0gg7EJp-O2MIfI0IHoAsho8rbc1_vrNGLZacaHr93QwHWHvay1K3xqpmTuLCMYXR3xOWNWH2lbESi9wCNShGvoOnMZHbOfjTyCsOjzU48qGvz7GHcgAOFSJYpzeJDNrHRsoZ0rgK0AoPRhLHNDH6N5PdMMwjNod5h1Ealoa-f8jmxJfRJk30jQKJvKjMYtUGamZiCFtvec9Db0kYl2NMLs4TWGVWgFoTutv4K9nkkQ85l4oge6rJJh3twSCI7vQcCV5VTQG80-fPxRu0ZtuuxwljfdLYQw33o8hVTRVHWWSriYa5L97W49r21CH-k8s5Ianq_9Cg%3D%3D) Thank you for standing with Terence during this nightmare.
--------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit**www.PoliceDefense.org**. And remember -Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1196123e27354a99bab9fc1f186da05a&_e=zMyDpXcWaev-a6TCBFm1GOWIpHftB1jMZr8Z1sQMNtu8XFxjnAZwUvK2oRk4JkwPCfo2fohYYy9a9HPTaqoaQ3O1V5K8VwJX82OaAe9yNbFERW2UPbTHPRD6gox34-Oy4Doz6tmnwcQS7q4fsCyuzY74TpfsH8V5yY8EDmg_-An_3HgV5Ip0-h4BP9RH88vksqk3hc5m_ByvTIdP53sQVg%3D%3D)

_\---Forwarded Message from Dr. Ruiz---_
These past few weeks haven’t been easy.
We’ve had to reckon with what another four years under Donald Trump will be — and watch it unfold in real-time as he appoints unqualified MAGA loyalists to run his administration.
The moment he declared victory, we all knew that the only real option we had was to keep fighting: to stand resolute in our commitment to progress and prosperity for all in this country — not just a select wealthy few.
We're now approaching our first real opportunity to do just that.
Every month, my team sets an internal fundraising goal that ensures that our day-to-day operations can proceed as normal. It means we have the resources for community engagement, voter outreach, and everything else we need to fight back against MAGA extremism in Washington.
But here’s the deal: **We didn’t anticipate November looking like this.** We’re far from business as usual — and we had to do a last-minute increase of our month-end fundraising goal by $10,500. And I need your help to reach it.

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | In 12 hours, we’ll be facing our first month-end fundraising deadline since Donald Trump took office. Let us be clear: this is the time to show our strength to Donald Trump and the MAGA loyalists he’s sending to Washington. By showing our strength in numbers, we’re sending a clear signal that our fight for reproductive rights, working families, and our democracy isn’t going away. We’re here for the long-game, and we’re NOT backing down. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = \---Forwarded Message from Dr. Ruiz--- These past few weeks haven’t been easy. We’ve had to reckon with what another four years under Donald Trump will be — and watch it unfold in real-time as he appoints unqualified MAGA loyalists to run his administration. The moment he declared victory, we all knew that the only real option we had was to keep fighting: to stand resolute in our commitment to progress and prosperity for all in this country — not just a select wealthy few. We're now approaching our first real opportunity to do just that. Every month, my team sets an internal fundraising goal that ensures that our day-to-day operations can proceed as normal. It means we have the resources for community engagement, voter outreach, and everything else we need to fight back against MAGA extremism in Washington. But here’s the deal: We didn’t anticipate November looking like this. We’re far from business as usual — and we had to do a last-minute increase of our month-end fundraising goal by $10,500. And I need your help to reach it. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Sincerely, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. Elon Musk's social media platform, X, has morphed into a hotbed for some truly horrifying ideologies, including the spread of Nazi propaganda!
On X, Musk has not only threatened the safety of President Biden and Vice President Harris but has also unleashed a torrent of conspiracy theories and outright lies. He’s using his platform to rally his millions of hate-filled followers to target federal workers and other his dislikes for harassment.
**And guess what? Major players like the NFL, Walmart, and the Washington Post are supporting this madness by advertising on X.**

Hi Peter, I hate to interrupt your Saturday, so I promise this is the shortest and final email you’ll receive from me this weekend. We’re just hours away from our November end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we can’t afford to fall short of our $10,000 goal. This is our first test since the election, and we need to prove that our strength hasn’t faltered. But, I know I can count on you, Peter. So, if you can, will you please chip in $5 or any amount before midnight? Here’s a link you can use: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vf-em-fr-nov24](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97923747/514992551/397693209?amount=5&source=SBD_VF_EM_FR_113024_2_3_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGUwMTViYS02M2FmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RW_FjegGp-bOUjfxxKCeoJgcBPQSvuQSpzNd0nOPAIg=) Thank you for your time, Valerie

Greetings

The Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting Winter Meeting from **December 6-8** in **Boston, Massachusetts**. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on the 2024 election results, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more.**

With our Winter Meeting being a little under a week away, we're excited****to tell you that our hotel booking deadline has been extended till December 4th.
**
You can find all the information in this email on our website at****[**yda.org/ydabos**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8mqfLav433QGxwS8LKF02-tc5qhDhhJOtrktTf5HsODWGqpi6BqSfjRTkmNZLSbLOLPPQwEZlenmw5HYbtqMmmD2rIICNvveGfyAbnAg38HTPAbRN5Mw5dM00g_hQFvVD_t4q6nhV55N4wm-mNOFXdmGPFXlL_R6D84Njt2hqPQYPUn8h5HCWFetjTZ7BYEmrh5QRlrbpXJaFcrk1m-Yroz-T0qjHtCpVvBmRZINHaM7qHcVvc0DfptFRXuRXz5T1Ew/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h1/h001.aZdyhVDCwQuT-huA5ZMmQmfwnQNmekrGfxj7PhELWFQ)
****

**Registration
****
[Click here to register](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39ispmPgnyBeLzstfRs0GcNMmQ8i0Uu7JlJXUCxxrJCmVayzfdYy_WXbK15jiZ-HUDJl6k-hcG4ep2YipgWacCeEOjPqdkA7aH9CqFZFDV-oafLPhuJbh2Sg0JtH8evmyMH8JycRiZdvqukVakxf3HQCuB1B23OyUFa3urLNNtNFTqXWmdHFEy_MffEpncwXSqtf6u2yI-6UaeavKbrgAhl1geOiay_iMzFuPJLmLJd3iCQaRgILsh9CsjK7BDwdsrOXsmWfHKwnK-S_tEQAMp4DL3V5-FFKkjG83awLKnzj5UzlD03D4pJlqbQZCPUdDE/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h2/h001.W0ZtJX8zdPN-sptCnZaqDBGa1OmffJwbq0u34yXlbmI) **at the early bird rate of **$70.00**. The standard registration rate is valid until**December****5,****2024**.
****
* * *
**Reserving a Hotel Room
**
Lodging will be available at the Hyatt Place Boston Seaport (295 Northern Ave, Boston, MA). Hotel reservations must be made no later than**December****4, 2025**. **[Click here to book at our group rate of $175 per night](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMdVsybNM-bPiGIibkHqcrG3E3PAR2nJO68kcdxKz2BRzj6fhxGEXyQzj-2QI6RXTLy8m0m-_EckzbXMbZWLFFRmtEQ1_OpXU25lI52_iGPx03U4r7lpcFgrm1VnZIzwa4443sRcBe21MPFcmSWPkktTj5rDEbDjLEcNP4U0Gmllhp8Roope-ndf_QTPG5QREIHokSB57ZZ-RshhEHg9N3BoWU6tJAVIXgMZxK73BJQSPdwC1ZEd7mjTFEoOrqV2ewupVroVw5k_LNpCpBTaCtJ9ryhVYt7lCEy8lY6kClUdy/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h3/h001.HLGABPj3YUcD1VUq7gJOSe2_PNWQ8OafaJcEJWSWkmM), **which includes access to a full breakfast bar and free Wi-Fi. _Please note that if you do not book through our special group rate, the current cost for the entire weekend is approximately $300 more.**
**_
* * *
**Sponsorship Opportunity**

Are you interested in sponsoring the Young Democrats of America meeting in Boston? Sponsorship offers a chance to support the next generation of leaders and gain recognition for your commitment to empowering young progressives. **[Click this link for more details on sponsorship levels and benefits](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ZinYHHf__6TfCzSdifLKcMzedmcfOzuy9LX84oSxZF1HEOcTJpXXgmtNzMjbJ4zu0UFDPYn9qdQzi6RBFlVOHv_cxoSyjkejjN2XbKAbJMJsxuYi6Bkg7XiQT2_-Yn1sKAUtzHM5dBfreLVa2umQaK1mtE9IoRekrQIUv46REJGo_Tchd_HX57fSq3bUBClOKEl5SA82p4lJqdHv9xMDlCCbA1jtwtlraUFKW-JP5AULWCHkKSbrkzrrKWAkrAhKxnVavG_BK2nClfTvkZHLv2Lj04MCVPaoOaZpfhYaag/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h4/h001.blQSTbgoYx6LO34MED5rPMrYUYqCoxAmatobvtvcFys)**.****

* * *
**National Committee Proxy Submissions**

Proxies are due two hours before the start of the National Committee Meeting on Sunday, December 8th. You should submit your proxy by**noon****EST on Saturday, December 7th** , to ensure your proxy is received and any corrections can be made. **[The Proxy Form is available here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWwGamPY7W-vS4bGbFoLcGE8r2SxUlCWieL9jRw3-wjKhQwpki_fH5-HK24s_fu0E8ek7fAKuV0IrEUbVWMhO3ZUBItQkxlFnHSGhiE58iEKxxJbneqNDXfmvZP3XF-vxDAncjzlEz-VZMZvx7DziqG-Kf05dWtLgFb2vrgeSdt1olOLvYu1xVl-FbrPiV0CjQVNAijoX8rWau11IqN7BenuTsVkoH6bjOEguN0krl9hAJjZiBD9WObojWWtCiXkPWeDMw6GJGM1rKb0MlH5hhM1ini3j_HVRxf7n06QJgZkHnPAurlz5CEzWHZ39ztGCp45CnyT7anpiRYE1njFxHVk/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h5/h001.fdmy9DoG2ogukEH2A5xUoLXwqyDGqVNXhvTB0wC7AvU)**. Only voting members of the National Committee are eligible to submit Proxy Vote Forms.
****
* * *
**Resolutions**

Resolutions must have been submitted to YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at [secretary@yda.org](mailto:secretary@yda.org) by 11:59 PM EST on Friday, November 8. **[You can view all the submitted resolutions here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW1GJm7fH52LAiTq9C8yR9M9YjhEm_Ww8e5AaV9N-LZ9d9DdmJ-c0_u9RieF010ZaUEH06aOTtD_urGjy5LX3Qd0oB0wZ-wBRXMeT99u5IjKV76DGv4UTBF8AMjZJkVUkiv5O68zFJUN-1L7ioyWLzPnkCSEQRpr6Hwb2PYrNj4K61RNotHnOnbh6j90O5myjl-QgRc2y7BANQCNdE0hEJqtoHAuUwYisWUkYktGiWx46zT4ibrmFI3XUyULZW2GRH-bFatW5wAbeChI9dZi8M4PfjzYm75sV8BjeSA-4NAJg0b4n8IoBZVNPjQqAYhEfDw/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h6/h001.L1BFP7izqpOzIquxv6hPA4awNHnX2R_b3QCPbNRHEyI)**. The Resolutions Committee will meet in person during the Winter Meeting.

For more information, please contact YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org.

[**You can click here to view our current platform**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8moMTuxa-1QKzACq7yiUlkTkt80F3zqKKbvkU1Ui6Qqjtj0YnR9Moi71bzis8bH6g_dUu-nwf0y7tSTzI8kgvWXfZJjwYvRtTRCfpQgtxGVtOHwlY0zymDgtW8pRltScHdLabydPsOkyp0NkutKYDPT2BkfnmKxgu_gjX9j5n0-HtNzKBegxGpwGr6UNtykRS5_vMNODs-HxwioAoKkAzfJZv8hC1qpJPZ8gJueAodYRg_ACBBYBCOuPCGzjLj0mwHnhUtF7f_FYDEbdjadPSnRo/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h7/h001.jO3nELTmkiaWS7VGmrcupC4e3qtVlFSraMvBWJV-l9M) or [**c****lick here to view previously approved resolutions**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8moMTuxa-1QKzACq7yiUlkTkb2jVhsHOf8HqVcnL_qlW4I-Azyi1AbEgxuNHBFY0Ur_wdIINtEwhebrFpcNZMu5dU4w5nOmsMR18X2updXoCJ-0dDy0EmeMLRLZN0QIg6grcxbXbHnhcdKQpSqjihgld57_BZbc7YAXHsq2NN6BFe4HrvZ6PrxwVGgOLLiZBK-1v__8N_RaSg27-XgQVuiggU7DeVNZjNlAmZRJ1J06fB0FPH1T9VVEE45MP8-Nq8Wh6druo22TmjH0cBN8YMKtM/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h8/h001.EPr8SRXFIS5UbqLFsYCRqQE0zDdljhiB8PNb1DhSlxU).
****

**Charter and Standing Rules Amendments
**
The Charter and Standing Rules must have been submitted to YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org by 11:59 PM EST on Friday, November 8. **[You can view the only rule proposal that was submitted here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW451kB1UHFkGz1cupG1HPlKMR42f0dgsIMmWdGXtJMeffWtB5UeOGRhwZmV8mTrE460QCRyfrJkG6RFfJ6mVm0a3pzwk7yPcSBuiQVpIvDkyVjOuJEptpIi6gAei6S_PM-OteqKS184yru_yoVBS_CQIrK6nbwJUxXQCWdoydvG7UhOng4Icj6FxdVMGY3Wd4KTojHXzteKdeiyMpTdsF7F8NDeECWUgCB8n6wb00NtAEaEzphrZeGCIfLPrIHHXeF2EU-5lQJyzNx4d-EI100X1W-Fwa6yIQNQYtJuRK9LekPTBUCKOM14qt1fRQZ0fSw/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h9/h001.99RiIpCt571KdN_Ko8w-TWRVtLi6ZpRgtxfoq3K_jCE)**. The Rules Committee will meet in-person during the Winter Meeting.

For more information, please contact YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org.

[**A current version of the Charter and Standing Rules can be found by clicking this link**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8moMTuxa-1QKzACq7yiUlkTlgCH3WU2qyumuw-uqLS6bE7vVNOuAEkyHD0DsR3A2maCsqqsYw8Hn5COCBpUOJWXWPYN8NnIr-b047h5zTQ9ZsHfS8SSeDuL8rANGkAtn7D5q1ihpnJOJHgOds1_zqktY1b11lu_qBHa2pt5kvk-x4d_NiiRlXdqZiDO_AxSd86MABIDwbpVe3Zl8eVgGnefuY6rkj41jF5UubdpCf2m9zUqS7lhcc2-Um_2Tni46Shx-4Ob2DIbV0bpSxkeyYwNs/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h10/h001.WrJ25VFB1mn3SyJGT0OBJSE0_KSSx7YxlGDtqjtNUSA).

Per the YDA Charter, an amendment to the Charter shall contain a title, the names of all members who sponsor the amendment, a brief description of the amendment and why it is being submitted, and each section of the Charter showing how it is being amended.
* * *
**Detailed Schedule**

**[Click here to view the draft schedule](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW4n9Nv7_ma5wq4DylhVsr5u4-0Ty9aFkvDpdnoyFuApygN8tpjs2xHKGL9umf9oLkx0IHsvAsclACGEPGt_ASjQkwiH_lmsJtb_8t1YpthkMwb61F5NzV7suHaaqL4CCpqyFjm8V8-DKrLdGIUdJLqd6TX_0Y5giNKO1U5DeQTANLAhiILLOO-EPww6XdCJvddwH-mMWI_aI0dntlVWdgooKTRHx8U8oG1BUWzU9JRogmrVb2YA7XaLoJlyZpXOlWqupj92yth-7GRBRWiIFe29Icd8P9j7ytnF8jYOPppNzFTzcFGAAarBKbJssZSUzRwothRCmM4ArY8f4zzK62tyGY10kI1fb6OOeGxaUZtVgLiR0xQ3DQFzmPIH_452aag/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h11/h001.dwQ10CuySA1_n_7mxNvZ-cg_EnJazCi1GvIj_diblIE)**. More information on particular panels and speakers will be provided soon. _We advise YDA Winter Meeting participants to plan for activities to begin on Friday, December 6th, at 6:00 PM and conclude on Sunday, December 8th, no earlier than noon_. If you have any questions or concerns you need immediately addressed, please send an email to [**office@yda.org**](mailto:office@yda.org).
****
* * *
**Accessibility and Accommodations**

The Young Democrats of America is an organization that is committed to ensuring that our organization is accessible to all. Accommodation requests related to a disability should be emailed to [**office@yda.org**](mailto:office@yda.org).
****
* * *
**L****iability Form for Conference Participants Under 18
**
Individuals under 18 who wish to attend the conference unaccompanied by a Parent or Legal Guardian will need to have their Parent or Legal Guardian complete [this form](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW1GJm7fH52LAiTq9C8yR9M966M5ls9GT87nkEMX9MUhXElFBf4JFaZY9ieDITlOvNN9oYbOhHj4Do7BqwNJ6ljbx-vFf2F0vUVUZfwY8rTfL5_SXRJEf-5aFMkiRzxkoj1T9LsNV1GCxRSfprnxdzV1bzm26KBnfQS23ru2mDABsz-AA5VrN7cJ7LCmCKv3Hjq4isiPo3S2OvcE3Uo4n7gL_UPdFyOmybzP6E6pcG6BV7mk4T3DJY5ejHD3e2QTvKDf1NQt9MdUiZ2M_7rEeDVrGlDjtdWE12bt1oCop_1V8j9quKLhA4IWe3eAMrw3L_Q/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h12/h001.fBkVWYoublxeGCEeL9bsVc3NvaFNcn8Z4q1uui3fqqk). Completed forms can be sent to [**info@yda.org**](mailto:info@yda.org)
****
* * *
**Proposed National Committee Meeting Agenda
**
The proposed agenda for the National Committee meeting on Sunday, December 8th, is [available here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW451kB1UHFkGz1cupG1HPlI1WWwEgrK22Y5DvCgkw2OF6Tw9nUdglJdrqJQJegqOEmYrykc2IqNBrxyOe13mWJOt0YUZ1Vkz0EkzkMA5vLnrzgmDXcrCdBKKap9emAk1Kplhe7c27niD7fls9H_v0h0NpeHvsM9Jn57dpl2n5YtKC8t8ItP6JMb7aftbe0mQjrpwKARhNpFuVf1S8RyXKAcu1uHBXvmllJReAfg4Gv8VqP43nrO1INkDfa6lVoRqlPufq3biKE95hL0ze4MLV3HJzUZlnA1k6-p_wDBHbP7zF42h_OhlrTWNNXEnVgS-LXPxfRKpTHV_ai0N_tS0zIo/4bw/EfDiHTbBSiaDOiQGSQ0V7Q/h13/h001.z3T0tsu56YcJfcsczv61Zt6BAG_11Nj3IQ6wvEbHXX0). Please note that the agenda is subject to change.

Questions? Don't hesitate to send an email to [office@yda.org](mailto:office@yda.org).

clean_body: | | | | | | Greetings The Young Democrats of America will gather for an exciting Winter Meeting from December 6-8 in Boston, Massachusetts. This in-person event will bring together young leaders from across the nation for discussions and reflections on the 2024 election results, hands-on training sessions, important organizational business, and much more. With our Winter Meeting being a little under a week away, we're excitedto tell you that our hotel booking deadline has been extended till December 4th. You can find all the information in this email on our website at** Registration at the early bird rate of $70.00. The standard registration rate is valid untilDecember5,2024. ** Reserving a Hotel Room Lodging will be available at the Hyatt Place Boston Seaport (295 Northern Ave, Boston, MA). Hotel reservations must be made no later thanDecember4, 2025. , which includes access to a full breakfast bar and free Wi-Fi. Please note that if you do not book through our special group rate, the current cost for the entire weekend is approximately $300 more. Sponsorship Opportunity Are you interested in sponsoring the Young Democrats of America meeting in Boston? Sponsorship offers a chance to support the next generation of leaders and gain recognition for your commitment to empowering young progressives. . National Committee Proxy Submissions Proxies are due two hours before the start of the National Committee Meeting on Sunday, December 8th. You should submit your proxy bynoonEST on Saturday, December 7th , to ensure your proxy is received and any corrections can be made. . Only voting members of the National Committee are eligible to submit Proxy Vote Forms. ** Resolutions Resolutions must have been submitted to YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at mailto:secretary@yda.org by 11:59 PM EST on Friday, November 8. . The Resolutions Committee will meet in person during the Winter Meeting. For more information, please contact YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org. or . ** Charter and Standing Rules Amendments The Charter and Standing Rules must have been submitted to YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org by 11:59 PM EST on Friday, November 8. . The Rules Committee will meet in-person during the Winter Meeting. For more information, please contact YDA Secretary Lezlie Braxton Campbell at secretary@yda.org. . Per the YDA Charter, an amendment to the Charter shall contain a title, the names of all members who sponsor the amendment, a brief description of the amendment and why it is being submitted, and each section of the Charter showing how it is being amended. Detailed Schedule . More information on particular panels and speakers will be provided soon. We advise YDA Winter Meeting participants to plan for activities to begin on Friday, December 6th, at 6:00 PM and conclude on Sunday, December 8th, no earlier than noon. If you have any questions or concerns you need immediately addressed, please send an email to mailto:office@yda.org. Accessibility and Accommodations The Young Democrats of America is an organization that is committed to ensuring that our organization is accessible to all. Accommodation requests related to a disability should be emailed to mailto:office@yda.org. ** Liability Form for Conference Participants Under 18 Individuals under 18 who wish to attend the conference unaccompanied by a Parent or Legal Guardian will need to have their Parent or Legal Guardian complete . Completed forms can be sent to mailto:info@yda.org ** Proposed National Committee Meeting Agenda The proposed agenda for the National Committee meeting on Sunday, December 8th, is . Please note that the agenda is subject to change. Questions? Don't hesitate to send an email to mailto:office@yda.org. | The Young Democrats of America (YDA) is the official youth wing of the Democratic Party of the United States and the oldest partisan youth organization in the country. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q4-2024?refcode=em-header]
Peter,

I’m sure you're enjoying the holiday weekend, so I'll be brief.

Tonight marks my first fundraising deadline as Congressman-elect, and our very first deadline since Election Day.

As you know, Republicans only have a razor-thin majority in Congress. I haven't even been sworn-in yet, and you can bet GOP leadership is already plotting how to make life difficult for incoming, first-year Democrats like me.

Meeting our fundraising goals – especially our first – will set the tone in our broader effort to keep this seat blue. Early strength also helps us navigate this Republican-led Congress so we can make meaningful progress for CA-27.

We set a modest goal of raising $8,500 before midnight hits. If you can chip in $3, please know that it would go a long way.

Thank you,

George

| Hi Peter —

I wanted to make sure I reached out ahead of the end of the month. Though elections may be over, the work doesn’t stop.

We only won this seat thanks to sustained support from people like you, and as I use these next few weeks to prepare to be sworn in on January 3rd, I’m also keeping an eye on the future. With Republicans controlling all majorities, we’re facing a tougher battle to make progress on critical issues and hold this seat in 2026.

[_**That’s why it’s crucial that that work starts now. I look forward to having you by my side as we tackle some of the biggest challenges facing our country.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97924221/514993934/-743377158?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2024-11-30_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTM5NTYwYTctNjZhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C09jLh4WObqj6F7ikD0tVBqzBbNh7tjwuJxibHFuvhI=)

| Hey team —

I hope your Thanksgiving was as restful as mine was. I wanted to make sure I reached out today to ask for your support one more time before the end of the month.

Our success here in MI-03 was only possible thanks to your support. Though the national results were not what we hoped for, it’s now more important than ever to build a stronger foundation.

We may have won this seat, but it took TWO years to build the campaign infrastructure strong enough to counter months of intense attacks. With Trump back in the White House and Republicans in control of the House and Senate, I cannot emphasize enough how important it is for us to start building that infrastructure now.

[_**So, if you’re able, I’m hoping you’ll chip in whatever you can to my campaign today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97924249/514994045/664569763?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-11-30_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Njk1NjBhNy02NmFmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hX6YGXDy59futlUYWqE2NrJV8QuONmMJEVzD0ZhdisM=)

clean_body: We may have won this seat, but it took TWO years to build the campaign infrastructure strong enough to counter months of intense attacks. | = | Hey team — I hope your Thanksgiving was as restful as mine was. I wanted to make sure I reached out today to ask for your support one more time before the end of the month. Our success here in MI-03 was only possible thanks to your support. Though the national results were not what we hoped for, it’s now more important than ever to build a stronger foundation. We may have won this seat, but it took TWO years to build the campaign infrastructure strong enough to counter months of intense attacks. With Trump back in the White House and Republicans in control of the House and Senate, I cannot emphasize enough how important it is for us to start building that infrastructure now. = | = Grateful, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: bumping!
subject: Don't abandon Special Counsel Jack Smith!!!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22580%2E4449941%2EW_BrY2)
---
Top Democrat,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition asking you to stand with Jack Smith after Trump said Smith should be thrown out of the country.

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t signed.** We’re still [17] your state signatures short of our goal!

[**Team, we can’t abandon Special Counsel Jack Smith. Click HERE or use the button below to sign »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=22580%2E4449941%2EW_BrY2) | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=22580%2E4449941%2EW_BrY2)
---
We’ve attached the original petition below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

\---------- Forwarded message ---------

From: 🚨Alert - Trump Trial (via FFR)
Subject: re: Trump’s latest underhanded attack on Jack Smith
To: Top Democrat
❌ **DON’T SCROLL AWAY** ❌
❌ **DON’T DELETE THIS EMAIL** ❌
**DROP EVERYTHING AND READ THIS _AWFUL_ HEADLINE:**
**Trump is RELENTLESS in his attempts to intimidate Smith.**

**Smith must be under immense pressure. Now more than ever, he needs good Democrats like you to stand with him.**
**[_Top Democrat, sign our urgent petition standing with Special Counsel Jack Smith »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=22580%2E4449941%2EW_BrY2)**
[_30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED ON OUR EMERGENCY PETITION:_ Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=22580%2E4449941%2EW_BrY2)
---
Look, Jack Smith has done an amazing job as special counsel.

**But the GOP DOESN’T care.** They’re attacking Smith and his case from **_every angle_** in hopes of shielding Trump from justice!

We need to know that every Democrat in your state stands with Jack Smith – if he doesn’t get enough support, his case against Trump could TOTALLY COLLAPSE.
**[_Let’s set an example: Nobody threatens good, honest public servants like Jack Smith. Stand with Special Counsel Jack Smith »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/stand_with_jack_smith_new?source=FFR_20241130_EMPET_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=22580%2E4449941%2EW_BrY2)**

name: Steve Friend
subject: Thanks to Kash, I stood up to the Deep State
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=dc128280cc6a4a73af494cd25ab37065&_e=pHi5a7vMyMT-aZd2eBcZkr-stwWRArOih1dD_TcnwgUrPngmkivVpCSeekokATJjAyiMS02BYVHDLxA32BfF2Omg6NwqzTkkwUFDVu_WZnHhAlXDHAAxwtxY-8Vfk7m_mK29zPS9wX5344BkrIhEpzVTk7-tHFxEl17K4C4xq6bExrQAJ6LsGxBO0t7a8yDqRRh1cnhvG1kqZo3Hlr76WuIT18IXEhKEIwRsI-xtRUB7JDDsTCT0Y4iV7N_t2Jo5q2F1WlQoLuYTRO8sHdT9aWoD-ew2LPDtoVIuSoJ0j6S0aQHdp2BM3NdxCa_039zo8QaDG0Uiy-D0oYHCBV9BeHhtTjLjxKHvwoPfX1Vv532arE2tY0BRdRrDS3KjBNJkLXco9AitRNcn7APHsbl7FQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic.

When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something.

In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office.

**My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath._However, it nearly cost me everything._**

Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions.

To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State.

[You can help the Kash Foundation support whistleblowers and expose Deep State corruption by donating today.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=dc128280cc6a4a73af494cd25ab37065&_e=pHi5a7vMyMT-aZd2eBcZkr-stwWRArOih1dD_TcnwgUrPngmkivVpCSeekokATJjAyiMS02BYVHDLxA32BfF2Omg6NwqzTkkwUFDVu_WZnHhAlXDHAAxwtxY-8Vfk7m_mK29zPS9wX5344BkrIhEpzVTk7-tHFxEl17K4C4xq6bExrQAJ6LsGxBO0t7a8yDqRRh1cnhvG1kqZo3Hlr76WuIT18IXEhKEIwRsI-xtRUAEoUiXV1XF2BcF5HiZQpeI-J9NGpi1hYj_QDjC0FN9mp_pIXrdbGEbccv8PF_27yihwScG4aWFDZ-P2dqbz0InBlE_a9R7MZfeCs1xvy1cke_-6XU0adWqJ3cD1jO79Y0Q0O6YXJ-sDoNLHjqBR6QlcZn1hYKKdCawVRwgbb0ZGqVg14-yszrnyUi3Cjp8G-s%3D)

[Donate](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=dc128280cc6a4a73af494cd25ab37065&_e=pHi5a7vMyMT-aZd2eBcZkr-stwWRArOih1dD_TcnwgUrPngmkivVpCSeekokATJjAyiMS02BYVHDLxA32BfF2Omg6NwqzTkkwUFDVu_WZnHhAlXDHAAxwtxY-8Vfk7m_mK29zPS9wX5344BkrIhEpzVTk7-tHFxEl17K4C4xq6bExrQAJ6LsGxBO0t7a8yDqRRh1cnhvG1kqZo3Hlr76WuIT18IXEhKEIwRsI-xtRUClnmdG9AoNg14MHIS69Eo7xSBUYlUM-03k23selU-myYO2Z7VW2cvj9tkkFEb2uvOMsNS2sgPMIV-TsbIQ13Agcjo5nnBH4z5n0ktMJo1nMqPvpQsdVt0Z8G63b_9fyk_3679bcQzAbzI3IP8-Ysm8Jsypoq4wRXF46DiqXx_nQ7ckoUw2mAJty4458guG31k%3D)

I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking.

**Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.**

It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment.

_I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI_.

At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk.

I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions.

The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger.

Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty.

I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back.

[Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to speak about against the weaponizing of our justice system. You can help other whistleblowers come forward against the Deep State by donating $10, $50, or even $100 today. >>>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=dc128280cc6a4a73af494cd25ab37065&_e=pHi5a7vMyMT-aZd2eBcZkr-stwWRArOih1dD_TcnwgUrPngmkivVpCSeekokATJjAyiMS02BYVHDLxA32BfF2Omg6NwqzTkkwUFDVu_WZnHhAlXDHAAxwtxY-8Vfk7m_mK29zPS9wX5344BkrIhEpzVTk7-tHFxEl17K4C4xq6bExrQAJ6LsGxBO0t7a8yDqRRh1cnhvG1kqZo3Hlr76WuIT18IXEhKEIwRsI-xtRUBkBV4AuHhA4z2eb9xTXUwhhsElqWpQ4NlsJybVxlYzcnYq7bCLtdtHBzblTYIA_8jNO2DbZzR7mE0K93wl8rsJ_wNxL-8T_1i6O0g5DMXak5ma6sq1O6HVm3Wp75m1CTMG5fPYxmKpNLzTzldCYZTnQ1n-sQMRDXuZQ4Eh63m15n0isdD5tqHAAcRXLIAENKs%3D)

The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth.

**In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign.**
* Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at _The New York Times_.
* The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family.
* Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys.

But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government.

**The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O 'Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes.**

Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State.

clean_body: Peter, Working as an FBI special agent was my dream job. But when I became an agent, I swore an oath to protect and defend the United States Constitution against all enemies -- both foreign and domestic. When I discovered the FBI's National Security Branch had refocused counterterrorism from legitimate foreign actors to political opponents within our borders, I knew I had to say something. In August 2022, I made protected whistleblower disclosures about my concerns regarding the January 6th investigations assigned to my office. My whistleblowing was apolitical and in the spirit of upholding my oath.However, it nearly cost me everything. Thanks to the Kash Foundation, I was able to stand up to the Deep State and expose their efforts to villainize patriots. The Kash Foundation offers legal and financial help to whistleblowers, veterans, and American patriots who come forward with evidence against the Deep State's actions. To thank him for his efforts, I told Kash Patel that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the week to help the Kash Foundation take on the Deep State. I was a special agent for the Federal Bureau of Investigation for eight and a half years. During that time, I investigated approximately 200 violent crimes, such as aggravated assaults, murder, child abuse, rape, robbery, child molestation, child pornography, and human trafficking. Eventually, I was reassigned to the FBI 's unprecedented investigation of the political unrest at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021. It didn't take me long to uncover efforts by the FBI and Department of Justice to manipulate statistics and exaggerate the nationwide threat of domestic terrorism. I witnessed overzealous practices to harass American patriots and realized the FBI was turning its investigative processes into a punishment. I had no choice but to blow the whistle on the politicized FBI. At each level of my chain of command, leadership cautioned that despite my exemplary work performance, whistleblowing placed my otherwise bright future with the FBI at risk. I knew my decision would ultimately cost me my dream career. As a married father of two, I knew it would affect my family, but I also knew this was important, so I stuck by my convictions. The FBI cynically elected to close ranks and attack the messenger. Within one month of my disclosures, the FBI weaponized the security clearance processes to remove me from active duty. I was an unpaid, indefinitely suspended man trying to feed his family when Kash Patel reached out to me and said he wanted to help support my efforts to fight back. The FBI was hell-bent on suppressing me from exposing the truth. In addition to an indefinite, unpaid suspension, the FBI initiated a campaign of humiliation and intimidation to punish and pressure me to resign. Individuals at the FBI leaked my private medical information to a reporter at The New York Times. The FBI denied my request to seek outside employment in an obvious attempt to deprive me of the ability to support my family. Finally, the FBI Inspection Division imposed an illegal gag order in an attempt to prevent me from communicating with my family and attorneys. But thanks to the support provided by The Kash Foundation, I was able to withstand these attacks and stand up to the Government Gangsters who are weaponizing our government. The Kash Foundation has also helped Kyle Seraphin, Garrett O 'Boyle, and Marcus Allen expose the weaponization of the FBI for political purposes. Your generous donation will help the Kash Foundation support and encourage the next whistleblowers who come forward with evidence against the Deep State. Thank you, Steve Friend The Kash Foundation is a nonprofit organization formed under 501(c)(3) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions or gifts to The Kash Foundation are deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. No goods or services are given in exchange for any contribution. But, I know I can count on you, Peter. So, if you can, will you please chip in $ or any amount before midnight?

George

I’m a gay Afro-Latino man and a proud product of the Bronx, _born and bred._

I was raised by a single mother who kept my family afloat on a $4.25 minimum wage.

I grew up in public housing ridden with mold, leaks, vermin, and without consistent heat or water.

All the while, the city was shelling out millions on a Trump golf course right across from the street from me – _rather than housing for struggling New Yorkers._

Peter, **I know what it’s like** to be left behind by political leaders who pledged to serve you.

**I know what it’s like** to fight with everything you’ve got to make your voice heard.

And **I know what it’s like** to have to hide who you are for fear of violence.

So in 2020, I ran for Congress to deliver real and meaningful change for the hardworking people of the Bronx – **_the people who raised me._**

We’ve achieved so much together, but there is still so much work to do.

[That’s why I have to ask: Will you chip in $1 to support this people powered movement so I can continue fighting for you for years to come? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97924877/514995780/-1361974956?amount=1;amounts=1,2,3,4,5&refcode=RTFC_20241130_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmEyNDliNC02YWFmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hYne0HayXeA2m2iNhY7PA0icwSjALjyhl2_tg6BwLVI=)

clean_body: | = Hi Peter, = | = I’m a gay Afro-Latino man and a proud product of the Bronx, born and bred. I was raised by a single mother who kept my family afloat on a $4.25 minimum wage. I grew up in public housing ridden with mold, leaks, vermin, and without consistent heat or water. All the while, the city was shelling out millions on a Trump golf course right across from the street from me – rather than housing for struggling New Yorkers. Peter, I know what it’s like to be left behind by political leaders who pledged to serve you. I know what it’s like to fight with everything you’ve got to make your voice heard. And I know what it’s like to have to hide who you are for fear of violence. So in 2020, I ran for Congress to deliver real and meaningful change for the hardworking people of the Bronx – the people who raised me. We’ve achieved so much together, but there is still so much work to do. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. name: laura (personal)
subject: The last thing you want to think about
body:
Friend,

I know the last thing you want to think about is fundraising during the holiday. But midnight tonight marks an important fundraising deadline, our first since being elected to represent California’s 30th District.

Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight? [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q4-2024?refcode=you**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97924985/514996201/158001685?refcode=em-11.30.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ1YjA3NjktNmJhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3qAel_hSRWRmnsm87uV7Hm_G79q8-BdycGndad_B7o=)

My _least_ favorite part of campaigning for Congress is fundraising. Like you, I’d rather be spending time with family and friends over these next few days.

But the truth is every dollar we raise now sends the incoming administration the message that our district isn’t backing down in the fight for democracy and civil rights.

So before tonight's deadline, please add a donation of $3, or any amount you can, to help show our strength.

Here's that link again: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q4-2024?refcode=you**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97924986/514996202/158001685?refcode=em-11.30.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmQ1YjA3NjktNmJhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h3qAel_hSRWRmnsm87uV7Hm_G79q8-BdycGndad_B7o=)

Thank you, and I hope you’re enjoying the Holiday weekend.

Laura Friedman

Laura Friedman for Congress
PO Box 27296
Los Angeles, CA 90027
United States
We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/C_LAPt2gvkyS7ttbOCAOdg2?unsubscribedata=xLivAJwnpRBS7EJx3qPsJv8Wo6UKyLCeJjdMmyjH2rkxjrYITXX9jEcE8hTkBiyLFxxIigAYtVuVOFqgtf2rEStjCOly5imFiItH7mQ9KsJsyzSrihmGKxpKyBx3XsvKieiv9J668x0HVol6dSumlAR5f3dEMS9drP48WEzSHUe46sZAuJzsMRLbCrLbtVZ7vcVWRnPAEJCCwOLvX%2FzHArD8bZyo081NbJpxVrSchdyDJXp2kAhazgkUygCRAoDI63VFtiFOiFqnlLoYCNN36SUdpkGzAHp7SbFldNbV%2FnZgWZKQYurhR%2FK94KAG4eZK%2BA6W8NmKY7HwaZUKuLmTxQ0huC9ZHrOyZOE6RNCexGh0%2BDQn7KEvN%2BX4hGw1SwRYbVmcy4tBFi%2FyMclSfya9FIPacCh5XOqEBQDS7Dn4GH%2B%2Fa0PJ6mG%2Bf8lUnnOcrcLo).

subject: Is there anything I can say? >>

body:
| | | Ya'll -- I'm scratching my head trying to figure out if there's ANY WAY I can convince you to ACT!

Right now, Trump is teeing up his next wild administration, and every second we hesitate is another second MAGA Republicans could get the jump on us to stay in power even longer.

I've got a lot to catch you up on, but first I have to ask:

**[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to rush $5 before tonight's end-of-month deadline to flip the Senate out of Donald Trump's tiny hands?!](https://go.dscc.org/go/20088?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20241130-JamesCarville-CarvilleAnythingICanSayRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20241130-JamesCarville-CarvilleAnythingICanSayRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19052%2E9716520%2EHSuy20)**

What if I told you that Donald Trump's already hammering his MAGA majority in line to pass his wacko agenda?

What if I told you we have a helluva shot at retaking the Senate -- especially with TWO possible special elections coming up for Vance and Rubio's seats?

**What if I told you that if we pull this off and flip the Senate, we'd be cutting the Trump agenda's shelf life in HALF?**

Folks, there's plenty of reasons Trump and his cronies want you to give up the fight. But that's all the more reason to keep on fighting.

**So I'm going to say this as directly as I can: MAGA Republicans may have control for now, but you better believe we have a shot to take it ALL back. That's why I'm talking your ear off now, so please:**

**[It's time to roll up our sleeves. Will you donate $5 or more before tonight's end-of-month deadline to fight for every seat? clean_body: | | | Ya'll -- I'm scratching my head trying to figure out if there's ANY WAY I can convince you to ACT! Right now, Trump is teeing up his next wild administration, and every second we hesitate is another second MAGA Republicans could get the jump on us to stay in power even longer. I've got a lot to catch you up on, but first I have to ask: | | What if I told you that Donald Trump's already hammering his MAGA majority in line to pass his wacko agenda? What if I told you we have a helluva shot at retaking the Senate -- especially with TWO possible special elections coming up for Vance and Rubio's seats? What if I told you that if we pull this off and flip the Senate, we'd be cutting the Trump agenda's shelf life in HALF? Folks, there's plenty of reasons Trump and his cronies want you to give up the fight. But that's all the more reason to keep on fighting. So I'm going to say this as directly as I can: MAGA Republicans may have control for now, but you better believe we have a shot to take it ALL back. That's why I'm talking your ear off now, so please: We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you. With people like you on our side, I know the fight won't end here. James Carville P.S. Why are you still here?! Peter,
We’re just hours away from our first end-of-month fundraising deadline since Election Day, and we still need to raise $8,982 by midnight to get across the finish line.
I’ll say more about why it’s so important that we make up the difference in a moment. But for the sake of time, I’m just going to come out and ask right off the bat:
**[Will you pitch in $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you by midnight to help us close this gap so we can be prepared to fight to defend our shared values when Donald Trump takes office?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97925508/514997465/780881964?refcode=body&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMWQ2ZjQ1MC02ZmFmLWVmMTEtODhjZi02MDQ1YmRmZThkMjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-rgXu5A3EEjsaNxw33EWCP8qXLA7meaEz55j2rl7jB4=)**

Peter, the way I see it, we have two options next year:
We could bury our heads in the sand and try to wish away the second Trump presidency while they try to push their extreme Project 2025 agenda on us...
...OR we can roll up our sleeves, confront our challenges head-on, and defend our values and way of life, just like we always have.
If Donald Trump and JD Vance try to reverse our progress and bring a hateful agenda to Minnesota, I’ll be ready. But we have to stand together, starting with reaching tonight’s budget target.

name: John Fetterman
subject: We’re a few hours out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’ve always fought hard for PA, and I know you’ve got my back now, too.
#
Hey Derek, I know it’s a holiday weekend so I won’t take long. And believe me, I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t important. 🙄
We’re a few hours out from our November fundraising deadline, and the team tells me we’re short of our goal by a few donations. [**Can you pitch in $5 before midnight to help us get there?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241130-2?refcode=em20241130-9644&amount=5&refcode2=9644_434096_ORDwA9&akid=9644%2E434096%2EORDwA9)
If the results this year proved anything, it’s that we have some serious work to do over the next few years to keep PA and this seat blue in 2026 + 2028.
I need your help to do it, and reaching these monthly goals (even on a holiday weekend right after an election) is step one. I’ve always fought hard for PA, and I know you’ve got my back now, too.
[**If you can, pitch in before the deadline to help us reach our goal. And please enjoy the rest of your weekend.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241130-2?refcode=em20241130-9644&amount=5&refcode2=9644_434096_ORDwA9&akid=9644%2E434096%2EORDwA9)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20241130-2?amount=5&refcode=em20241130-9644&refcode2=9644_434096_ORDwA9&akid=9644%2E434096%2EORDwA9)**
Thanks,
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20241130-9644-footer&t=1&refcode2=9644_434096_ORDwA9&akid=9644%2E434096%2EORDwA9)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=9644%2E434096%2EORDwA9)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=9644%2E434096%2EORDwA9)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

NEAZ Dems organizers don’t just organize in the weeks leading up to the election, but they meet the needs of the community year-round. They’re a trust and reliable resource for communities that have been historically underinvested in and are regularly touring the furthest reaches of vast rural lands to discuss policy issues and where the candidates stand. **[We could use your help to reach this $10,000 end-of-month goal. As partners, Northeast Arizona Native Democrats and the Arizona Democratic Party are committed to working together to get out the vote on sovereign lands. Here are just a few highlights from this cycle:
* Over 80% of voters on sovereign land voted for Vice President Harris, over 83% voted for Gallego and nearly 90% of tribal voters voted for Jonathan Nez
* NEAZ led meaningful dialogues this cycle on reproductive rights and voters on tribal lands voted to codify abortion rights **_at a rate over 8% higher than the rest of the state_**
* **Nearly 100%** of tribal voters cast votes in county-level races
* We successfully increased turnout on White Mountain Apache Lands, thanks to the work of long-time organizers who have built relationships with voters over time

**Mobilizing in and investing in native voters is how we’ll continue to secure victories up and down the ballot and make sure that Indigenous issues are represented at the highest seats of government.[Will you make a grassroots contribution right now to help us invest in native voters in Arizona?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/97926063/514998476/472954119?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20241130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjdiNTA0MTgtNzNhZi1lZjExLTg4Y2YtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZDI5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=3_2H9Xl_p-YJ_xx46SDUuvh8FBty0N4dRvQcU7w6gKY=)**

clean_body: | = Hey there, team — I won’t keep you long. The work that the Northeast AZ Dems team put in this cycle was absolutely instrumental to our wins and expanding our big tent coalition. NEAZ Dems organizers don’t just organize in the weeks leading up to the election, but they meet the needs of the community year-round. They’re a trust and reliable resource for communities that have been historically underinvested in and are regularly touring the furthest reaches of vast rural lands to discuss policy issues and where the candidates stand. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to the Arizona Democratic Party and the Northeast Arizona Democrats immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you do, = Yolanda Bejarano, Chair \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: azdem.org <info@azdem.org> Date: Fri, Nov 29, 2024 Subject: Engaging tribal voters To: dpwillis67@gmail.com = Hi folks, November is Native American Heritage Month, a time to honor the richness and diversity of Native cultures across Arizona and the U.S. As we celebrate, we must also take action to empower Native communities and mobilize the next generation of Native voters to protect our democracy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through to the Arizona Democratic Party and the Northeast Arizona Democrats immediately: | = = | = = | = = As partners, Northeast Arizona Native Democrats and the Arizona Democratic Party are committed to working together to get out the vote on sovereign lands. Here are just a few highlights from this cycle: Over 80% of voters on sovereign land voted for Vice President Harris, over 83% voted for Gallego and nearly 90% of tribal voters voted for Jonathan Nez NEAZ led meaningful dialogues this cycle on reproductive rights and voters on tribal lands voted to codify abortion rights at a rate over 8% higher than the rest of the state Nearly 100% of tribal voters cast votes in county-level races We successfully increased turnout on White Mountain Apache Lands, thanks to the work of long-time organizers who have built relationships with voters over time Mobilizing in and investing in native voters is how we’ll continue to secure victories up and down the ballot and make sure that Indigenous issues are represented at the highest seats of government.= = Thank you so much for your time and support. Your contribution will make a significant impact on our efforts to engage Native voters and enhance our democracy. Sincerely, Arizona Democratic Party Arizona Democratic Party PO Box 36123 Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123 United States mailto:info@azdem.org | PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. RICK MCGUIRE, TREASURER. WWW.AZDEM.ORG

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Getting ready to head back to DC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The stakes truly couldn’t be higher.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241130-4556-footer&t=1&akid=4556%2E420207%2EqWwBXV)
Hi Peter, it’s Pramila.
As I get ready to head back to DC after a much needed holiday, I’m thinking about all the work we have ahead of us over the next four years. The stakes truly couldn’t be higher.
Not only will we have to organize against some of Donald Trump’s most dangerous policies, we also have to organize the Democratic Party around a bold, populist, working-class agenda.
That work begins right now. And one of the best ways we can be prepared for the challenges we’ll face next year is to make sure we reach _this year’s_ fundraising goals. But since I don’t take corporate PAC money, I’m counting on this people-powered movement to do it.
**With our November deadline just a few hours away, will you pitch in $3 to help us raise the last few dollars we need to reach our goal? You can use this secure link to make sure your donation counts instantly:**
[**https://www.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241130-2**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241130-2?refcode=em20241130-4556&amount=3&refcode2=4556_420207_qWwBXV&akid=4556%2E420207%2EqWwBXV)
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241130-4556-footer&t=2&refcode2=4556_420207_qWwBXV&akid=4556%2E420207%2EqWwBXV)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

name: DNC HQ
subject: LAST CALL: Please donate $3 to the DNC before midnight
body:
Here’s where things stand:
---
$3. One time. That is the donation we're asking you to make to the Democratic National Committee before our end-of-month fundraising deadline ends at midnight. $3 because we can’t just sit back and let Trump and his allies do whatever they want without a fight. $3 because this moment requires a strong, robust Democratic Party to fight back, organize, and stop the worst impulses of a second Trump administration and an emboldened Republican Party. $3 because the DNC is the organization best positioned to move urgent resources to the places they’re needed most as we take on the fights ahead. [**Please use this link to contribute $3 to the DNC before our end-of-month deadline ends:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241130_2355_fr&refcode2=2355_22930333_AmbJZ5&akid=2355%2E22930333%2EAmbJZ5) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241130_2355_fr&refcode2=2355_22930333_AmbJZ5&akid=2355%2E22930333%2EAmbJZ5)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2024?refcode=em_20241130_2355_fr&refcode2=2355_22930333_AmbJZ5&akid=2355%2E22930333%2EAmbJZ5)**
---
****
Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
